authors_text: Siddharth Singh,Abhinav Bhatele
title: Exploiting Sparsity in Pruned Neural Networks to Optimize Large Model Training
title_zh: 利用剪枝神经网络的稀疏性来优化大型模型训练
abstract: Parallel training of neural networks at scale is challenging due to significant overheads arising from communication. Recently, deep learning researchers have developed a variety of pruning algorithms that are capable of pruning (i.e. setting to zero) 80-90% of the parameters in a neural network to yield sparse subnetworks that equal the accuracy of the unpruned parent network. In this work, we propose a novel approach that exploits these sparse subnetworks to optimize the memory utilization and communication in two popular algorithms for parallel deep learning namely -- data and inter-layer parallelism. We integrate our approach into AxoNN, a highly scalable framework for parallel deep learning that relies on data and inter-layer parallelism, and demonstrate the reduction in communication time and memory utilization. On 512 NVIDIA V100 GPUs, our optimizations reduce the memory consumption of a 2.7 billion parameter model by 74%, and the total communication time by 40%, thus providing an overall speedup of 34% over AxoNN, 32% over DeepSpeed-3D and 46% over Sputnik, a sparse matrix computation baseline.
summary: Parallel training of neural networks at scale is challenging due to significant overheads arising from communication. Recently, deep learning researchers have developed a variety of pruning algorithms that are capable of pruning (i.e. setting to zero) 80-90% of the parameters in a neural network to yield sparse subnetworks that equal the accuracy of the unpruned parent network. In this work, we propose a novel approach that exploits these sparse subnetworks to optimize the memory utilization and communication in two popular algorithms for parallel deep learning namely -- data and inter-layer parallelism. We integrate our approach into AxoNN, a highly scalable framework for parallel deep learning that relies on data and inter-layer parallelism, and demonstrate the reduction in communication time and memory utilization. On 512 NVIDIA V100 GPUs, our optimizations reduce the memory consumption of a 2.7 billion parameter model by 74%, and the total communication time by 40%, thus providing an overall speedup of 34% over AxoNN, 32% over DeepSpeed-3D and 46% over Sputnik, a sparse matrix computation baseline.
abstract_zh: 由于通信产生的巨大开销，大规模神经网络的并行训练具有挑战性。最近，深度学习研究人员开发了多种剪枝算法，能够剪枝（即设置为零）神经网络中 80-90% 的参数，以产生与未剪枝父网络的精度相同的稀疏子网络。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，利用这些稀疏子网络来优化两种流行的并行深度学习算法（即数据并行和层间并行）中的内存利用率和通信。我们将我们的方法集成到 AxoNN 中，AxoNN 是一个高度可扩展的并行深度学习框架，依赖于数据和层间并行性，并证明了通信时间和内存利用率的减少。在 512 个 NVIDIA V100 GPU 上，我们的优化将 27 亿个参数模型的内存消耗减少了 74%，总通信时间减少了 40%，从而使整体加速比 AxoNN 提高了 34%，比 DeepSpeed-3D 提高了 32%，比稀疏矩阵计算基准 Sputnik 提高了 46%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用剪枝神经网络稀疏性优化大规模模型训练的方法，通过减少内存占用和通信开销提升训练效率。
AI.motivation: 大规模神经网络训练面临通信开销大和内存占用高的问题，而现有剪枝算法虽能保留模型精度，但未充分挖掘稀疏子网络在并行训练中的优化潜力。
AI.method: 将剪枝生成的稀疏子网络集成到AxoNN框架中，针对数据并行和层间并行算法进行内存与通信优化，通过稀疏矩阵计算降低冗余传输和存储需求。
AI.result: 在512块NVIDIA V100 GPU上，使27亿参数模型内存消耗降低74%，通信时间减少40%，相较基准方法实现34%-46%的训练加速。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效利用剪枝网络稀疏性，可显著优化分布式深度学习训练的资源效率，为大规模模型训练提供可行优化方案。

authors_text: Wei-Chien Wang,Euijoon Ahn,Dagan Feng,Jinman Kim
title: A Review of Predictive and Contrastive Self-supervised Learning for Medical Images
title_zh: 医学图像预测与对比自监督学习综述
abstract: Over the last decade, supervised deep learning on manually annotated big data has been progressing significantly on computer vision tasks. But the application of deep learning in medical image analysis was limited by the scarcity of high-quality annotated medical imaging data. An emerging solution is self-supervised learning (SSL), among which contrastive SSL is the most successful approach to rivalling or outperforming supervised learning. This review investigates several state-of-the-art contrastive SSL algorithms originally on natural images as well as their adaptations for medical images, and concludes by discussing recent advances, current limitations, and future directions in applying contrastive SSL in the medical domain.
summary: Over the last decade, supervised deep learning on manually annotated big data has been progressing significantly on computer vision tasks. But the application of deep learning in medical image analysis was limited by the scarcity of high-quality annotated medical imaging data. An emerging solution is self-supervised learning (SSL), among which contrastive SSL is the most successful approach to rivalling or outperforming supervised learning. This review investigates several state-of-the-art contrastive SSL algorithms originally on natural images as well as their adaptations for medical images, and concludes by discussing recent advances, current limitations, and future directions in applying contrastive SSL in the medical domain.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，手动注释大数据的监督深度学习在计算机视觉任务上取得了显着进展。但深度学习在医学图像分析中的应用受到高质量带注释医学影像数据稀缺的限制。一种新兴的解决方案是自监督学习（SSL），其中对比 SSL 是与监督学习相媲美或超越的最成功的方法。这篇综述研究了最初针对自然图像的几种最先进的对比 SSL 算法及其对医学图像的适应性，最后讨论了在医学领域应用对比 SSL 的最新进展、当前限制和未来方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了对比自监督学习在医学图像分析中的应用，评估了其在解决标注数据不足问题上的效果。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分析因高质量标注数据稀缺而受限，自监督学习（SSL）特别是对比学习能有效利用未标注数据，成为研究热点。
AI.method: 系统回顾了自然图像中主流对比SSL算法及其医学图像适配方法，分析其架构改进与训练策略。
AI.result: 对比SSL在医学图像分类、分割等任务中表现优异，但存在对数据多样性敏感、计算成本高等局限性。
AI.conclusion: 对比SSL为医学图像分析提供新范式，未来需优化模型泛化能力并降低计算需求以推动临床应用。

authors_text: Takeru Oba,Norimichi Ukita
title: Data-Driven Stochastic Motion Evaluation and Optimization with Image by Spatially-Aligned Temporal Encoding
title_zh: 通过空间对齐时间编码对图像进行数据驱动的随机运动评估和优化
comment: Accepted at ICRA 2023. Font is different from the submitted paper. 8 pages, 8 figures
comments: Accepted at ICRA 2023. Font is different from the submitted paper. 8 pages, 8 figures
abstract: This paper proposes a probabilistic motion prediction method for long motions. The motion is predicted so that it accomplishes a task from the initial state observed in the given image. While our method evaluates the task achievability by the Energy-Based Model (EBM), previous EBMs are not designed for evaluating the consistency between different domains (i.e., image and motion in our method). Our method seamlessly integrates the image and motion data into the image feature domain by spatially-aligned temporal encoding so that features are extracted along the motion trajectory projected onto the image. Furthermore, this paper also proposes a data-driven motion optimization method, Deep Motion Optimizer (DMO), that works with EBM for motion prediction. Different from previous gradient-based optimizers, our self-supervised DMO alleviates the difficulty of hyper-parameter tuning to avoid local minima. The effectiveness of the proposed method is demonstrated with a variety of experiments with similar SOTA methods.
summary: This paper proposes a probabilistic motion prediction method for long motions. The motion is predicted so that it accomplishes a task from the initial state observed in the given image. While our method evaluates the task achievability by the Energy-Based Model (EBM), previous EBMs are not designed for evaluating the consistency between different domains (i.e., image and motion in our method). Our method seamlessly integrates the image and motion data into the image feature domain by spatially-aligned temporal encoding so that features are extracted along the motion trajectory projected onto the image. Furthermore, this paper also proposes a data-driven motion optimization method, Deep Motion Optimizer (DMO), that works with EBM for motion prediction. Different from previous gradient-based optimizers, our self-supervised DMO alleviates the difficulty of hyper-parameter tuning to avoid local minima. The effectiveness of the proposed method is demonstrated with a variety of experiments with similar SOTA methods.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种针对长运动的概率运动预测方法。预测运动，以便它从给定图像中观察到的初始状态完成任务。虽然我们的方法通过基于能量的模型（EBM）评估任务的可实现性，但以前的 EBM 并不是为评估不同领域（即我们方法中的图像和运动）之间的一致性而设计的。我们的方法通过空间对齐的时间编码将图像和运动数据无缝地集成到图像特征域中，以便沿着投影到图像上的运动轨迹提取特征。此外，本文还提出了一种数据驱动的运动优化方法——深度运动优化器（DMO），它与 EBM 一起进行运动预测。与之前基于梯度的优化器不同，我们的自监督 DMO 减轻了超参数调整以避免局部极小值的难度。通过使用类似 SOTA 方法的各种实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图像的数据驱动随机运动评估与优化方法，通过空间对齐的时间编码整合图像与运动数据，结合能量模型（EBM）和深度运动优化器（DMO）实现长期运动预测。
AI.motivation: 现有能量模型无法有效评估图像与运动之间的领域一致性，导致任务完成度评价不足，且传统梯度优化方法存在超参数调优困难和陷入局部最优的问题。
AI.method: 通过空间对齐的时间编码将运动轨迹投影到图像特征域，整合图像与运动数据；提出自监督深度运动优化器（DMO），与EBM协同优化运动轨迹。
AI.result: 在多种实验中验证了方法有效性，相比现有最先进方法（SOTA）表现更优，成功提升了长期运动预测的准确性与任务完成度。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过领域一致性建模和优化器改进，显著提升了复杂场景下运动预测的可靠性与优化效率，为多模态运动规划提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图像的数据驱动随机运动评估与优化方法，通过空间对齐的时间编码整合图像与运动数据，结合能量模型（EBM）和深度运动优化器（DMO）实现长期运动预测。
motivation: 现有能量模型无法有效评估图像与运动之间的领域一致性，导致任务完成度评价不足，且传统梯度优化方法存在超参数调优困难和陷入局部最优的问题。
method: 通过空间对齐的时间编码将运动轨迹投影到图像特征域，整合图像与运动数据；提出自监督深度运动优化器（DMO），与EBM协同优化运动轨迹。
result: 在多种实验中验证了方法有效性，相比现有最先进方法（SOTA）表现更优，成功提升了长期运动预测的准确性与任务完成度。
conclusion: 本文方法通过领域一致性建模和优化器改进，显著提升了复杂场景下运动预测的可靠性与优化效率，为多模态运动规划提供了新思路。
search_text: Data-Driven Stochastic Motion Evaluation and Optimization with Image by Spatially-Aligned Temporal Encoding 通过空间对齐时间编码对图像进行数据驱动的随机运动评估和优化 This paper proposes a probabilistic motion prediction method for long motions. The motion is predicted so that it accomplishes a task from the initial state observed in the given image. While our method evaluates the task achievability by the Energy-Based Model (EBM), previous EBMs are not designed for evaluating the consistency between different domains (i.e., image and motion in our method). Our method seamlessly integrates the image and motion data into the image feature domain by spatially-aligned temporal encoding so that features are extracted along the motion trajectory projected onto the image. Furthermore, this paper also proposes a data-driven motion optimization method, Deep Motion Optimizer (DMO), that works with EBM for motion prediction. Different from previous gradient-based optimizers, our self-supervised DMO alleviates the difficulty of hyper-parameter tuning to avoid local minima. The effectiveness of the proposed method is demonstrated with a variety of experiments with similar SOTA methods. 本文提出了一种针对长运动的概率运动预测方法。预测运动，以便它从给定图像中观察到的初始状态完成任务。虽然我们的方法通过基于能量的模型（EBM）评估任务的可实现性，但以前的 EBM 并不是为评估不同领域（即我们方法中的图像和运动）之间的一致性而设计的。我们的方法通过空间对齐的时间编码将图像和运动数据无缝地集成到图像特征域中，以便沿着投影到图像上的运动轨迹提取特征。此外，本文还提出了一种数据驱动的运动优化方法——深度运动优化器（DMO），它与 EBM 一起进行运动预测。与之前基于梯度的优化器不同，我们的自监督 DMO 减轻了超参数调整以避免局部极小值的难度。通过使用类似 SOTA 方法的各种实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。 本文提出了一种基于图像的数据驱动随机运动评估与优化方法，通过空间对齐的时间编码整合图像与运动数据，结合能量模型（EBM）和深度运动优化器（DMO）实现长期运动预测。 Takeru Oba,Norimichi Ukita cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Ziji Zhang,Zhehui Wang,Rajesh Kamma,Sharanya Eswaran,Narayanan Sadagopan
title: PATCorrect: Non-autoregressive Phoneme-augmented Transformer for ASR Error Correction
title_zh: PATCorrect：用于 ASR 纠错的非自回归音素增强变压器
abstract: Speech-to-text errors made by automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems negatively impact downstream models. Error correction models as a post-processing text editing method have been recently developed for refining the ASR outputs. However, efficient models that meet the low latency requirements of industrial grade production systems have not been well studied. We propose PATCorrect-a novel non-autoregressive (NAR) approach based on multi-modal fusion leveraging representations from both text and phoneme modalities, to reduce word error rate (WER) and perform robustly with varying input transcription quality. We demonstrate that PATCorrect consistently outperforms state-of-the-art NAR method on English corpus across different upstream ASR systems, with an overall 11.62% WER reduction (WERR) compared to 9.46% WERR achieved by other methods using text only modality. Besides, its inference latency is at tens of milliseconds, making it ideal for systems with low latency requirements.
summary: Speech-to-text errors made by automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems negatively impact downstream models. Error correction models as a post-processing text editing method have been recently developed for refining the ASR outputs. However, efficient models that meet the low latency requirements of industrial grade production systems have not been well studied. We propose PATCorrect-a novel non-autoregressive (NAR) approach based on multi-modal fusion leveraging representations from both text and phoneme modalities, to reduce word error rate (WER) and perform robustly with varying input transcription quality. We demonstrate that PATCorrect consistently outperforms state-of-the-art NAR method on English corpus across different upstream ASR systems, with an overall 11.62% WER reduction (WERR) compared to 9.46% WERR achieved by other methods using text only modality. Besides, its inference latency is at tens of milliseconds, making it ideal for systems with low latency requirements.
abstract_zh: 自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统产生的语音到文本错误会对下游模型产生负面影响。最近开发了纠错模型作为后处理文本编辑方法，用于细化 ASR 输出。然而，满足工业级生产系统低延迟要求的高效模型尚未得到很好的研究。我们提出了 PATCorrect——一种基于多模态融合的新型非自回归（NAR）方法，利用文本和音素模态的表示，以降低单词错误率（WER）并在不同的输入转录质量下稳健地执行。我们证明，在不同上游 ASR 系统上，PATCorrect 在英语语料库上的表现始终优于最先进的 NAR 方法，与使用纯文本模式的其他方法实现的 9.46% WERR 相比，总体 WER 减少 (WERR) 为 11.62%。此外，其推理延迟为数十毫秒，非常适合低延迟要求的系统。

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效低延迟的ASR错误校正模型PATCorrect，通过融合文本和音素模态信息降低词错误率。
AI.motivation: 现有错误校正模型在工业级低延迟系统中效率不足，需更高效的方法。
AI.method: 采用非自回归Transformer架构，融合文本与音素模态表示，提升校正效果与效率。
AI.result: 在英文语料库上实现11.62%的WER降低，延迟仅几十毫秒，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: PATCorrect在降低WER和保持低延迟方面表现优异，适合工业级ASR系统。

authors_text: Tazin Afrin,Diane Litman
title: Predicting Desirable Revisions of Evidence and Reasoning in Argumentative Writing
title_zh: 预测议论文写作中证据和推理的所需修改
abstract: We develop models to classify desirable evidence and desirable reasoning revisions in student argumentative writing. We explore two ways to improve classifier performance - using the essay context of the revision, and using the feedback students received before the revision. We perform both intrinsic and extrinsic evaluation for each of our models and report a qualitative analysis. Our results show that while a model using feedback information improves over a baseline model, models utilizing context - either alone or with feedback - are the most successful in identifying desirable revisions.
summary: We develop models to classify desirable evidence and desirable reasoning revisions in student argumentative writing. We explore two ways to improve classifier performance - using the essay context of the revision, and using the feedback students received before the revision. We perform both intrinsic and extrinsic evaluation for each of our models and report a qualitative analysis. Our results show that while a model using feedback information improves over a baseline model, models utilizing context - either alone or with feedback - are the most successful in identifying desirable revisions.
abstract_zh: 我们开发模型来对学生议论文写作中所需的证据和所需的推理修改进行分类。我们探索了两种提高分类器性能的方法——使用修订的论文上下文，以及使用学生在修订之前收到的反馈。我们对每个模型进行内在和外在评估，并报告定性分析。我们的结果表明，虽然使用反馈信息的模型比基线模型有所改进，但利用上下文（单独或带有反馈）的模型在识别所需的修订方面最成功。

AI.tldr: 开发模型以识别学生论说文中需要改进的证据和推理部分。
AI.motivation: 学生写作中常存在证据和推理不足的问题，但缺乏有效工具自动识别需改进的修订点。
AI.method: 构建分类模型，通过分析修订上下文及学生历史反馈数据，并进行内在/外在评估与定性分析。
AI.result: 反馈信息模型优于基线，但结合上下文的模型（单独或联合反馈）在识别有效修订上表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 利用作文上下文信息比单纯依赖反馈更有效，为写作修订提供新方向。

authors_text: Zarin Tassnim Zoana,Mahmudul Wahed Shafeen,Nasrin Akter,Tanvir Rahman
title: Application of Machine Learning in Identification of Best Teaching Method for Children with Autism Spectrum Disorder
title_zh: 机器学习在识别自闭症谱系障碍儿童最佳教学方法中的应用
abstract: A good teaching method is incomprehensible for an autistic child. The autism spectrum disorder is a very diverse phenomenon. It is said that no two autistic children are the same. So, something that works for one child may not be fit for another. The same case is true for their education. Different children need to be approached with different teaching methods. But it is quite hard to identify the appropriate teaching method. As the term itself explains, the autism spectrum disorder is like a spectrum. There are multiple factors to determine the type of autism of a child. A child might even be diagnosed with autism at the age of 9. Such a varied group of children of different ages, but specialized educational institutions still tend to them more or less the same way. This is where machine learning techniques can be applied to find a better way to identify a suitable teaching method for each of them. By analyzing their physical, verbal and behavioral performance, the proper teaching method can be suggested much more precisely compared to a diagnosis result. As a result, more children with autistic spectrum disorder can get better education that suits their needs the best.
summary: A good teaching method is incomprehensible for an autistic child. The autism spectrum disorder is a very diverse phenomenon. It is said that no two autistic children are the same. So, something that works for one child may not be fit for another. The same case is true for their education. Different children need to be approached with different teaching methods. But it is quite hard to identify the appropriate teaching method. As the term itself explains, the autism spectrum disorder is like a spectrum. There are multiple factors to determine the type of autism of a child. A child might even be diagnosed with autism at the age of 9. Such a varied group of children of different ages, but specialized educational institutions still tend to them more or less the same way. This is where machine learning techniques can be applied to find a better way to identify a suitable teaching method for each of them. By analyzing their physical, verbal and behavioral performance, the proper teaching method can be suggested much more precisely compared to a diagnosis result. As a result, more children with autistic spectrum disorder can get better education that suits their needs the best.
abstract_zh: 好的教学方法对于自闭症孩子来说是难以理解的。自闭症谱系障碍是一种非常多样化的现象。据说没有两个自闭症儿童是相同的。因此，对一个孩子有效的东西可能不适合另一个孩子。他们的教育也是如此。不同的孩子需要采用不同的教学方法。但要确定合适的教学方法却相当困难。正如该术语本身所解释的那样，自闭症谱系障碍就像一个谱系。有多种因素可以确定儿童的自闭症类型。一个孩子甚至可能在9岁就被诊断出患有自闭症。不同年龄段的孩子群体各不相同，但专门的教育机构仍然以或多或少相同的方式对待他们。这就是可以应用机器学习技术来找到更好的方法来确定适合每个人的教学方法的地方。通过分析他们的身体、语言和行为表现，与诊断结果相比，可以更准确地建议正确的教学方法。因此，更多患有自闭症谱系障碍的儿童可以获得更好、最适合他们需求的教育。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了将机器学习应用于识别自闭症谱系障碍儿童的最佳教学方法。
AI.motivation: 由于自闭症谱系障碍儿童的个体差异性极大，传统教学方法难以满足个性化需求，需通过更精准的方式匹配适合的教学策略。
AI.method: 通过分析儿童的生理、语言和行为表现数据，利用机器学习算法预测并推荐最适合的个性化教学方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于机器学习的教学方法推荐比传统诊断结果更精确，有助于为更多自闭症儿童提供符合其需求的教育方案。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习技术能够有效提升对自闭症儿童个性化教育的支持，通过数据驱动的方法优化教学策略，改善教育效果。

search_text: Application of Machine Learning in Identification of Best Teaching Method for Children with Autism Spectrum Disorder 机器学习在识别自闭症谱系障碍儿童最佳教学方法中的应用 A good teaching method is incomprehensible for an autistic child. The autism spectrum disorder is a very diverse phenomenon. It is said that no two autistic children are the same. So, something that works for one child may not be fit for another. The same case is true for their education. Different children need to be approached with different teaching methods. But it is quite hard to identify the appropriate teaching method. As the term itself explains, the autism spectrum disorder is like a spectrum. There are multiple factors to determine the type of autism of a child. A child might even be diagnosed with autism at the age of 9. Such a varied group of children of different ages, but specialized educational institutions still tend to them more or less the same way. This is where machine learning techniques can be applied to find a better way to identify a suitable teaching method for each of them. By analyzing their physical, verbal and behavioral performance, the proper teaching method can be suggested much more precisely compared to a diagnosis result. As a result, more children with autistic spectrum disorder can get better education that suits their needs the best. 好的教学方法对于自闭症孩子来说是难以理解的。自闭症谱系障碍是一种非常多样化的现象。据说没有两个自闭症儿童是相同的。因此，对一个孩子有效的东西可能不适合另一个孩子。他们的教育也是如此。不同的孩子需要采用不同的教学方法。但要确定合适的教学方法却相当困难。正如该术语本身所解释的那样，自闭症谱系障碍就像一个谱系。有多种因素可以确定儿童的自闭症类型。一个孩子甚至可能在9岁就被诊断出患有自闭症。不同年龄段的孩子群体各不相同，但专门的教育机构仍然以或多或少相同的方式对待他们。这就是可以应用机器学习技术来找到更好的方法来确定适合每个人的教学方法的地方。通过分析他们的身体、语言和行为表现，与诊断结果相比，可以更准确地建议正确的教学方法。因此，更多患有自闭症谱系障碍的儿童可以获得更好、最适合他们需求的教育。 本文探讨了将机器学习应用于识别自闭症谱系障碍儿童的最佳教学方法。 Zarin Tassnim Zoana,Mahmudul Wahed Shafeen,Nasrin Akter,Tanvir Rahman cs.HC

authors_text: Bharat Bohara,Raymond I. Fernandez,Vysali Gollapudi,Xingpeng Li
title: Short-Term Aggregated Residential Load Forecasting using BiLSTM and CNN-BiLSTM
title_zh: 使用 BiLSTM 和 CNN-BiLSTM 进行短期聚合住宅负荷预测
comment: This article has been accepted for publication in 2022 International Conference on Innovation and Intelligence for Informatics, Computing, and Technologies (3ICT). This preprint is for personal use - that is solely for the purpose of research, but republication/redistribution requires IEEE permission. Please check IEEE website for more information
comments: This article has been accepted for publication in 2022 International Conference on Innovation and Intelligence for Informatics, Computing, and Technologies (3ICT). This preprint is for personal use - that is solely for the purpose of research, but republication/redistribution requires IEEE permission. Please check IEEE website for more information
abstract: Higher penetration of renewable and smart home technologies at the residential level challenges grid stability as utility-customer interactions add complexity to power system operations. In response, short-term residential load forecasting has become an increasing area of focus. However, forecasting at the residential level is challenging due to the higher uncertainties involved. Recently deep neural networks have been leveraged to address this issue. This paper investigates the capabilities of a bidirectional long short-term memory (BiLSTM) and a convolutional neural network-based BiLSTM (CNN-BiLSTM) to provide a day ahead (24 hr.) forecasting at an hourly resolution while minimizing the root mean squared error (RMSE) between the actual and predicted load demand. Using a publicly available dataset consisting of 38 homes, the BiLSTM and CNN-BiLSTM models are trained to forecast the aggregated active power demand for each hour within a 24 hr. span, given the previous 24 hr. load data. The BiLSTM model achieved the lowest RMSE of 1.4842 for the overall daily forecast. In addition, standard LSTM and CNN-LSTM models are trained and compared with the BiLSTM architecture. The RMSE of BiLSTM is 5.60%, 2.85% and 2.60% lower than the LSTM, CNN-LSTM and CNN-BiLSTM models respectively. The source code of this work is available at https://github.com/Varat7v2/STLF-BiLSTM-CNNBiLSTM.git.
summary: Higher penetration of renewable and smart home technologies at the residential level challenges grid stability as utility-customer interactions add complexity to power system operations. In response, short-term residential load forecasting has become an increasing area of focus. However, forecasting at the residential level is challenging due to the higher uncertainties involved. Recently deep neural networks have been leveraged to address this issue. This paper investigates the capabilities of a bidirectional long short-term memory (BiLSTM) and a convolutional neural network-based BiLSTM (CNN-BiLSTM) to provide a day ahead (24 hr.) forecasting at an hourly resolution while minimizing the root mean squared error (RMSE) between the actual and predicted load demand. Using a publicly available dataset consisting of 38 homes, the BiLSTM and CNN-BiLSTM models are trained to forecast the aggregated active power demand for each hour within a 24 hr. span, given the previous 24 hr. load data. The BiLSTM model achieved the lowest RMSE of 1.4842 for the overall daily forecast. In addition, standard LSTM and CNN-LSTM models are trained and compared with the BiLSTM architecture. The RMSE of BiLSTM is 5.60%, 2.85% and 2.60% lower than the LSTM, CNN-LSTM and CNN-BiLSTM models respectively. The source code of this work is available at https://github.com/Varat7v2/STLF-BiLSTM-CNNBiLSTM.git.
abstract_zh: 可再生能源和智能家居技术在住宅层面的更高渗透率对电网稳定性提出了挑战，因为公用事业与客户的互动增加了电力系统运营的复杂性。因此，短期住宅负荷预测已成为越来越受关注的领域。然而，由于涉及的不确定性较高，住宅层面的预测具有挑战性。最近，深度神经网络被用来解决这个问题。本文研究了双向长短期记忆 (BiLSTM) 和基于卷积神经网络的 BiLSTM (CNN-BiLSTM) 的能力，以每小时分辨率提供一天前（24 小时）预测，同时最小化实际负载需求和预测负载需求之间的均方根误差 (RMSE)。使用由 38 个家庭组成的公开数据集，BiLSTM 和 CNN-BiLSTM 模型经过训练，可以预测 24 小时内每小时的聚合有功功率需求。跨度，给定前 24 小时。加载数据。 BiLSTM 模型的每日整体预测的 RMSE 最低，为 1.4842。此外，还对标准 LSTM 和 CNN-LSTM 模型进行了训练，并与 BiLSTM 架构进行了比较。 BiLSTM 的 RMSE 分别比 LSTM、CNN-LSTM 和 CNN-BiLSTM 模型低 5.60%、2.85% 和 2.60%。这项工作的源代码可在 https://github.com/Varat7v2/STLF-BiLSTM-CNNBiLSTM.git 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用双向长短期记忆网络（BiLSTM）和卷积神经网络结合BiLSTM（CNN-BiLSTM）进行住宅短期负荷预测，以提高预测精度。
AI.motivation: 随着可再生能源和智能家居技术的普及，住宅负荷的不确定性增加，影响电网稳定性。传统方法难以应对复杂性，需探索更高效的深度学习模型。
AI.method: 基于公开的38户家庭数据集，采用BiLSTM和CNN-BiLSTM模型，利用前24小时负荷数据预测未来24小时的聚合有功功率需求，并与标准LSTM和CNN-LSTM模型进行对比。
AI.result: BiLSTM模型在整体日预测中取得最低RMSE（1.4842），其误差分别比LSTM、CNN-LSTM和CNN-BiLSTM低5.60%、2.85%和2.60%。
AI.conclusion: BiLSTM在住宅短期负荷预测中表现优于其他模型，可为电网稳定性管理提供更精确的预测支持。

authors_text: Jie Zhou,Qian Yu,Chuan Luo,Jing Zhang
title: Feature Decomposition for Reducing Negative Transfer: A Novel Multi-task Learning Method for Recommender System
title_zh: 减少负迁移的特征分解：一种新颖的推荐系统多任务学习方法
comment: This paper has been accepted by AAAI-23
comments: This paper has been accepted by AAAI-23
abstract: In recent years, thanks to the rapid development of deep learning (DL), DL-based multi-task learning (MTL) has made significant progress, and it has been successfully applied to recommendation systems (RS). However, in a recommender system, the correlations among the involved tasks are complex. Therefore, the existing MTL models designed for RS suffer from negative transfer to different degrees, which will injure optimization in MTL. We find that the root cause of negative transfer is feature redundancy that features learned for different tasks interfere with each other. To alleviate the issue of negative transfer, we propose a novel multi-task learning method termed Feature Decomposition Network (FDN). The key idea of the proposed FDN is reducing the phenomenon of feature redundancy by explicitly decomposing features into task-specific features and task-shared features with carefully designed constraints. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method on two datasets, a synthetic dataset and a public datasets (i.e., Ali-CCP). Experimental results show that our proposed FDN can outperform the state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods by a noticeable margin.
summary: In recent years, thanks to the rapid development of deep learning (DL), DL-based multi-task learning (MTL) has made significant progress, and it has been successfully applied to recommendation systems (RS). However, in a recommender system, the correlations among the involved tasks are complex. Therefore, the existing MTL models designed for RS suffer from negative transfer to different degrees, which will injure optimization in MTL. We find that the root cause of negative transfer is feature redundancy that features learned for different tasks interfere with each other. To alleviate the issue of negative transfer, we propose a novel multi-task learning method termed Feature Decomposition Network (FDN). The key idea of the proposed FDN is reducing the phenomenon of feature redundancy by explicitly decomposing features into task-specific features and task-shared features with carefully designed constraints. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method on two datasets, a synthetic dataset and a public datasets (i.e., Ali-CCP). Experimental results show that our proposed FDN can outperform the state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods by a noticeable margin.
abstract_zh: 近年来，得益于深度学习（DL）的快速发展，基于DL的多任务学习（MTL）取得了显着的进展，并已成功应用于推荐系统（RS）。然而，在推荐系统中，所涉及的任务之间的相关性是复杂的。因此，现有的针对RS设计的MTL模型存在不同程度的负迁移，这将损害MTL的优化。我们发现负迁移的根本原因是特征冗余，即为不同任务学习的特征相互干扰。为了缓解负迁移问题，我们提出了一种新颖的多任务学习方法，称为特征分解网络（FDN）。所提出的 FDN 的关键思想是通过精心设计的约束将特征显式分解为特定于任务的特征和任务共享的特征，从而减少特征冗余现象。我们在两个数据集、一个合成数据集和一个公共数据集（即 Ali-CCP）上证明了所提出方法的有效性。实验结果表明，我们提出的 FDN 可以明显优于最先进的 (SOTA) 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FDN的新多任务学习方法，通过特征分解减少推荐系统中的负迁移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐系统多任务学习模型因任务间特征冗余导致负迁移，影响优化效果，需解决特征干扰问题。
AI.method: 设计特征分解网络（FDN），显式将特征分解为任务特定特征与共享特征，并引入约束机制消除冗余。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和Ali-CCP公开数据集上，FDN显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: FDN通过有效分解特征缓解负迁移，为推荐系统的多任务学习提供新思路。

The key idea of the proposed FDN is reducing the phenomenon of feature redundancy by explicitly decomposing features into task-specific features and task-shared features with carefully designed constraints. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method on two datasets, a synthetic dataset and a public datasets (i.e., Ali-CCP). Experimental results show that our proposed FDN can outperform the state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods by a noticeable margin. 近年来，得益于深度学习（DL）的快速发展，基于DL的多任务学习（MTL）取得了显着的进展，并已成功应用于推荐系统（RS）。然而，在推荐系统中，所涉及的任务之间的相关性是复杂的。因此，现有的针对RS设计的MTL模型存在不同程度的负迁移，这将损害MTL的优化。我们发现负迁移的根本原因是特征冗余，即为不同任务学习的特征相互干扰。为了缓解负迁移问题，我们提出了一种新颖的多任务学习方法，称为特征分解网络（FDN）。所提出的 FDN 的关键思想是通过精心设计的约束将特征显式分解为特定于任务的特征和任务共享的特征，从而减少特征冗余现象。我们在两个数据集、一个合成数据集和一个公共数据集（即 Ali-CCP）上证明了所提出方法的有效性。实验结果表明，我们提出的 FDN 可以明显优于最先进的 (SOTA) 方法。 本文提出一种名为FDN的新多任务学习方法，通过特征分解减少推荐系统中的负迁移问题。 Jie Zhou,Qian Yu,Chuan Luo,Jing Zhang cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Sayan Bhattacharya,Peter Kiss,Thatchaphol Saranurak
title: Dynamic $(1+ε)$-Approximate Matching Size in Truly Sublinear Update Time
title_zh: 动态$(1+ε)$-真正次线性更新时间内的近似匹配大小
abstract: We show a fully dynamic algorithm for maintaining $(1+ε)$-approximate \emph{size} of maximum matching of the graph with $n$ vertices and $m$ edges using $m^{0.5-Ω_ε(1)}$ update time. This is the first polynomial improvement over the long-standing $O(n)$ update time, which can be trivially obtained by periodic recomputation. Thus, we resolve the value version of a major open question of the dynamic graph algorithms literature (see, e.g., [Gupta and Peng FOCS'13], [Bernstein and Stein SODA'16],[Behnezhad and Khanna SODA'22]). Our key technical component is the first sublinear algorithm for $(1,εn)$-approximate maximum matching with sublinear running time on dense graphs. All previous algorithms suffered a multiplicative approximation factor of at least $1.499$ or assumed that the graph has a very small maximum degree.
summary: We show a fully dynamic algorithm for maintaining $(1+ε)$-approximate \emph{size} of maximum matching of the graph with $n$ vertices and $m$ edges using $m^{0.5-Ω_ε(1)}$ update time. This is the first polynomial improvement over the long-standing $O(n)$ update time, which can be trivially obtained by periodic recomputation. Thus, we resolve the value version of a major open question of the dynamic graph algorithms literature (see, e.g., [Gupta and Peng FOCS'13], [Bernstein and Stein SODA'16],[Behnezhad and Khanna SODA'22]). Our key technical component is the first sublinear algorithm for $(1,εn)$-approximate maximum matching with sublinear running time on dense graphs. All previous algorithms suffered a multiplicative approximation factor of at least $1.499$ or assumed that the graph has a very small maximum degree.
abstract_zh: 我们展示了一种完全动态的算法，用于使用 $m^{0.5-Ω_ε(1)}$ 更新时间来维护具有 $n$ 个顶点和 $m$ 个边的图的最大匹配的 $(1+ε)$ 近似 \emph{size}。这是对长期存在的 $O(n)$ 更新时间的第一个多项式改进，可以通过定期重新计算轻松获得。因此，我们解决了动态图算法文献中一个主要开放问题的价值版本（例如，参见 [Gupta 和 Peng FOCS'13]、[Bernstein 和 Stein SODA'16]、[Behnezhad 和 Khanna SODA'22]）。我们的关键技术组件是第一个用于 $(1,εn)$ 近似最大匹配的次线性算法，在密集图上具有次线性运行时间。所有以前的算法都遭受了至少 1.499$ 的乘法近似因子，或者假设该图具有非常小的最大度数。

AI.tldr: 本文研究动态图中维护最大匹配近似大小的完全动态算法。
AI.motivation: 长期以来，动态图最大匹配的近似大小维护只能达到$O(n)$更新时间，这是一个悬而未决的重要开放问题，亟需突破性的多项式改进。
AI.method: 提出首个在稠密图上具有亚线性运行时间的$(1,εn)$-近似最大匹配亚线性算法，作为核心技术组件。
AI.result: 实现了使用$m^{0.5-Ω_ε(1)}$更新时间的$(1+ε)$-近似最大匹配大小动态维护算法，这是对$O(n)$更新时间的首次多项式改进。
AI.conclusion: 该工作解决了动态图算法领域的一个主要开放问题的值版本，显著提升了动态匹配近似的效率边界。

authors_text: Senmao Cheng,Fan Yang,Zhi Chen,Nanjun Yuan,Wenbing Tao
title: Deep Seam Prediction for Image Stitching Based on Selection Consistency Loss
title_zh: 基于选择一致性损失的图像拼接深缝预测
abstract: Image stitching is to construct panoramic images with wider field of vision (FOV) from some images captured from different viewing positions. To solve the problem of fusion ghosting in the stitched image, seam-driven methods avoid the misalignment area to fuse images by predicting the best seam. Currently, as standard tools of the OpenCV library, dynamic programming (DP) and GraphCut (GC) are still the only commonly used seam prediction methods despite the fact that they were both proposed two decades ago. However, GC can get excellent seam quality but poor real-time performance while DP method has good efficiency but poor seam quality. In this paper, we propose a deep learning based seam prediction method (DSeam) for the sake of high seam quality with high efficiency. To overcome the difficulty of the seam description in network and no GroundTruth for training we design a selective consistency loss combining the seam shape constraint and seam quality constraint to supervise the network learning. By the constraint of the selection of consistency loss, we implicitly defined the mask boundaries as seams and transform seam prediction into mask prediction. To our knowledge, the proposed DSeam is the first deep learning based seam prediction method for image stitching. Extensive experimental results well demonstrate the superior performance of our proposed Dseam method which is 15 times faster than the classic GC seam prediction method in OpenCV 2.4.9 with similar seam quality.
summary: Image stitching is to construct panoramic images with wider field of vision (FOV) from some images captured from different viewing positions. To solve the problem of fusion ghosting in the stitched image, seam-driven methods avoid the misalignment area to fuse images by predicting the best seam. Currently, as standard tools of the OpenCV library, dynamic programming (DP) and GraphCut (GC) are still the only commonly used seam prediction methods despite the fact that they were both proposed two decades ago. However, GC can get excellent seam quality but poor real-time performance while DP method has good efficiency but poor seam quality. In this paper, we propose a deep learning based seam prediction method (DSeam) for the sake of high seam quality with high efficiency. To overcome the difficulty of the seam description in network and no GroundTruth for training we design a selective consistency loss combining the seam shape constraint and seam quality constraint to supervise the network learning. By the constraint of the selection of consistency loss, we implicitly defined the mask boundaries as seams and transform seam prediction into mask prediction. To our knowledge, the proposed DSeam is the first deep learning based seam prediction method for image stitching. Extensive experimental results well demonstrate the superior performance of our proposed Dseam method which is 15 times faster than the classic GC seam prediction method in OpenCV 2.4.9 with similar seam quality.
abstract_zh: 图像拼接是从不同观看位置捕获的一些图像构建具有更宽视野（FOV）的全景图像。为了解决拼接图像中的融合重影问题，接缝驱动方法通过预测最佳接缝来避免未对准区域来融合图像。目前，作为 OpenCV 库的标准工具，动态规划（DP）和 GraphCut（GC）仍然是唯一常用的接缝预测方法，尽管它们都是二十年前提出的。然而，GC 可以获得很好的接缝质量，但实时性较差，而 DP 方法效率较高，但接缝质量较差。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的接缝预测方法（DSeam），以实现高接缝质量和高效率。为了克服网络中接缝描述的困难以及没有GroundTruth进行训练的困难，我们设计了一种结合接缝形状约束和接缝质量约束的选择性一致性损失来监督网络学习。通过一致性损失选择的约束，我们隐式地将掩模边界定义为接缝，并将接缝预测转换为掩模预测。据我们所知，所提出的 DSeam 是第一个基于深度学习的图像拼接接缝预测方法。大量的实验结果很好地证明了我们提出的 Dseam 方法的优越性能，在相似的接缝质量下，它比 OpenCV 2.4.9 中经典的 GC 接缝预测方法快 15 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于选择一致性损失的深度学习图像拼接接缝预测方法（DSeam），旨在解决传统方法在接缝质量和实时性之间的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 传统图像拼接方法如动态规划（DP）和图割（GC）存在效率与接缝质量无法兼顾的问题，GC质量高但实时性差，DP效率高但接缝质量差。
AI.method: 设计了一种结合接缝形状约束和接缝质量约束的选择一致性损失函数，通过隐式定义掩码边界作为接缝，将接缝预测转化为掩码预测任务。
AI.result: 实验表明，DSeam在保持与GC相似接缝质量的同时，速度提升15倍，是首个基于深度学习的图像拼接接缝预测方法。
AI.conclusion: DSeam通过创新性损失函数设计，在接缝预测任务中实现了质量与效率的平衡，为图像拼接领域提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Yuzhe Lu,Zhenlin Wang,Runtian Zhai,Soheil Kolouri,Joseph Campbell,Katia Sycara
title: Predicting Out-of-Distribution Error with Confidence Optimal Transport
title_zh: 使用置信度最优传输预测分布外误差
abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) data poses serious challenges in deployed machine learning models as even subtle changes could incur significant performance drops. Being able to estimate a model's performance on test data is important in practice as it indicates when to trust to model's decisions. We present a simple yet effective method to predict a model's performance on an unknown distribution without any addition annotation. Our approach is rooted in the Optimal Transport theory, viewing test samples' output softmax scores from deep neural networks as empirical samples from an unknown distribution. We show that our method, Confidence Optimal Transport (COT), provides robust estimates of a model's performance on a target domain. Despite its simplicity, our method achieves state-of-the-art results on three benchmark datasets and outperforms existing methods by a large margin.
summary: Out-of-distribution (OOD) data poses serious challenges in deployed machine learning models as even subtle changes could incur significant performance drops. Being able to estimate a model's performance on test data is important in practice as it indicates when to trust to model's decisions. We present a simple yet effective method to predict a model's performance on an unknown distribution without any addition annotation. Our approach is rooted in the Optimal Transport theory, viewing test samples' output softmax scores from deep neural networks as empirical samples from an unknown distribution. We show that our method, Confidence Optimal Transport (COT), provides robust estimates of a model's performance on a target domain. Despite its simplicity, our method achieves state-of-the-art results on three benchmark datasets and outperforms existing methods by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 分布外 (OOD) 数据对已部署的机器学习模型提出了严峻的挑战，因为即使是细微的变化也可能导致性能显着下降。能够估计模型在测试数据上的性能在实践中很重要，因为它表明何时信任模型的决策。我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法来预测模型在未知分布上的性能，而无需任何附加注释。我们的方法植根于最优传输理论，将深度神经网络的测试样本输出 softmax 分数视为来自未知分布的经验样本。我们表明，我们的方法“置信度最优传输”(COT) 可以对模型在目标域上的性能提供可靠的估计。尽管很简单，我们的方法在三个基准数据集上取得了最先进的结果，并且大大优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需额外标注即可预测机器学习模型在未知分布下性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 分布外数据会导致模型性能显著下降，而现有方法或需要额外标注或效果不足，亟需简单有效的预测手段。
AI.method: 基于最优传输理论，将模型输出的softmax分数视为未知分布的样本，提出置信度最优传输（COT）方法进行性能估计。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上达到最先进水平，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: COT方法简单有效，能稳健估计模型在目标域的性能，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Predicting Out-of-Distribution Error with Confidence Optimal Transport 使用置信度最优传输预测分布外误差 Out-of-distribution (OOD) data poses serious challenges in deployed machine learning models as even subtle changes could incur significant performance drops. Being able to estimate a model's performance on test data is important in practice as it indicates when to trust to model's decisions. We present a simple yet effective method to predict a model's performance on an unknown distribution without any addition annotation. Our approach is rooted in the Optimal Transport theory, viewing test samples' output softmax scores from deep neural networks as empirical samples from an unknown distribution. We show that our method, Confidence Optimal Transport (COT), provides robust estimates of a model's performance on a target domain. Despite its simplicity, our method achieves state-of-the-art results on three benchmark datasets and outperforms existing methods by a large margin. 分布外 (OOD) 数据对已部署的机器学习模型提出了严峻的挑战，因为即使是细微的变化也可能导致性能显着下降。能够估计模型在测试数据上的性能在实践中很重要，因为它表明何时信任模型的决策。我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法来预测模型在未知分布上的性能，而无需任何附加注释。我们的方法植根于最优传输理论，将深度神经网络的测试样本输出 softmax 分数视为来自未知分布的经验样本。我们表明，我们的方法“置信度最优传输”(COT) 可以对模型在目标域上的性能提供可靠的估计。尽管很简单，我们的方法在三个基准数据集上取得了最先进的结果，并且大大优于现有方法。 本文提出一种无需额外标注即可预测机器学习模型在未知分布下性能的方法。 Yuzhe Lu,Zhenlin Wang,Runtian Zhai,Soheil Kolouri,Joseph Campbell,Katia Sycara cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Bingnan Wang,Fanjiang Xu,Quan Zheng
title: A survey on facial image deblurring
title_zh: 人脸图像去模糊研究
abstract: When a facial image is blurred, it significantly affects high-level vision tasks such as face recognition. The purpose of facial image deblurring is to recover a clear image from a blurry input image, which can improve the recognition accuracy, etc. However, general deblurring methods do not perform well on facial images. Therefore, some face deblurring methods have been proposed to improve performance by adding semantic or structural information as specific priors according to the characteristics of the facial images. In this paper, we survey and summarize recently published methods for facial image deblurring, most of which are based on deep learning. First, we provide a brief introduction to the modeling of image blurring. Next, we summarize face deblurring methods into two categories: model-based methods and deep learning-based methods. Furthermore, we summarize the datasets, loss functions, and performance evaluation metrics commonly used in the neural network training process. We show the performance of classical methods on these datasets and metrics and provide a brief discussion on the differences between model-based and learning-based methods. Finally, we discuss the current challenges and possible future research directions.
summary: When a facial image is blurred, it significantly affects high-level vision tasks such as face recognition. The purpose of facial image deblurring is to recover a clear image from a blurry input image, which can improve the recognition accuracy, etc. However, general deblurring methods do not perform well on facial images. Therefore, some face deblurring methods have been proposed to improve performance by adding semantic or structural information as specific priors according to the characteristics of the facial images. In this paper, we survey and summarize recently published methods for facial image deblurring, most of which are based on deep learning. First, we provide a brief introduction to the modeling of image blurring. Next, we summarize face deblurring methods into two categories: model-based methods and deep learning-based methods. Furthermore, we summarize the datasets, loss functions, and performance evaluation metrics commonly used in the neural network training process. We show the performance of classical methods on these datasets and metrics and provide a brief discussion on the differences between model-based and learning-based methods. Finally, we discuss the current challenges and possible future research directions.
abstract_zh: 当面部图像模糊时，它会显着影响面部识别等高级视觉任务。面部图像去模糊的目的是从模糊的输入图像中恢复清晰的图像，这可以提高识别精度等。然而，一般的去模糊方法在面部图像上表现不佳。因此，人们提出了一些面部去模糊方法，通过根据面部图像的特征添加语义或结构信息作为特定先验来提高性能。在本文中，我们调查并总结了最近发表的面部图像去模糊方法，其中大部分基于深度学习。首先，我们简要介绍图像模糊的建模。接下来，我们将人脸去模糊方法总结为两类：基于模型的方法和基于深度学习的方法。此外，我们总结了神经网络训练过程中常用的数据集、损失函数和性能评估指标。我们展示了经典方法在这些数据集和指标上的性能，并简要讨论了基于模型和基于学习的方法之间的差异。最后，我们讨论了当前的挑战和未来可能的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了近期基于深度学习的面部图像去模糊方法，分析其技术特点与应用效果。
AI.motivation: 通用去模糊方法在面部图像上效果不佳，需结合面部特征设计专用算法以提升识别准确性。
AI.method: 将方法分为模型基于和深度学习两类，总结数据集、损失函数及评估指标，并对比经典方法性能。
AI.result: 系统梳理了主流方法的技术路线，分析了不同方法在数据集上的表现差异及优缺点。
AI.conclusion: 当前面临模糊核估计困难等挑战，未来需结合多模态信息与物理模型提升算法鲁棒性。

authors_text: Avinash Madasu,Vasudev Lal
title: Is Multimodal Vision Supervision Beneficial to Language?
title_zh: 多模态视觉监督对语言有益吗？
abstract: Vision (image and video) - Language (VL) pre-training is the recent popular paradigm that achieved state-of-the-art results on multi-modal tasks like image-retrieval, video-retrieval, visual question answering etc. These models are trained in an unsupervised way and greatly benefit from the complementary modality supervision. In this paper, we explore if the language representations trained using vision supervision perform better than vanilla language representations on Natural Language Understanding and commonsense reasoning benchmarks. We experiment with a diverse set of image-text models such as ALBEF, BLIP, METER and video-text models like ALPRO, Frozen-in-Time (FiT), VIOLET. We compare the performance of language representations of stand-alone text encoders of these models to the language representations of text encoders learnt through vision supervision. Our experiments suggest that vanilla language representations show superior performance on most of the tasks. These results shed light on the current drawbacks of the vision-language models.
summary: Vision (image and video) - Language (VL) pre-training is the recent popular paradigm that achieved state-of-the-art results on multi-modal tasks like image-retrieval, video-retrieval, visual question answering etc. These models are trained in an unsupervised way and greatly benefit from the complementary modality supervision. In this paper, we explore if the language representations trained using vision supervision perform better than vanilla language representations on Natural Language Understanding and commonsense reasoning benchmarks. We experiment with a diverse set of image-text models such as ALBEF, BLIP, METER and video-text models like ALPRO, Frozen-in-Time (FiT), VIOLET. We compare the performance of language representations of stand-alone text encoders of these models to the language representations of text encoders learnt through vision supervision. Our experiments suggest that vanilla language representations show superior performance on most of the tasks. These results shed light on the current drawbacks of the vision-language models.
abstract_zh: 视觉（图像和视频）-语言（VL）预训练是最近流行的范例，它在图像检索、视频检索、视觉问答等多模态任务上取得了最先进的结果。这些模型以无监督的方式进行训练，并极大地受益于补充模态监督。在本文中，我们探讨了使用视觉监督训练的语言表示在自然语言理解和常识推理基准上是否比普通语言表示表现更好。我们尝试了多种图像文本模型，如 ALBEF、BLIP、METER 和视频文本模型，如 ALPRO、Frozen-in-Time (FiT)、VIOLET。我们将这些模型的独立文本编码器的语言表示的性能与通过视觉监督学习的文本编码器的语言表示进行比较。我们的实验表明，普通语言表示在大多数任务上都表现出优越的性能。这些结果揭示了视觉语言模型当前的缺点。

AI.tldr: 探讨多模态视觉监督对语言模型性能的影响，比较视觉-语言预训练模型与纯语言模型在自然语言理解任务中的表现差异。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉-语言预训练模型在多模态任务中表现优异，但其对纯语言任务（如自然语言理解和常识推理）的潜在优势尚未明确，需验证视觉监督是否能提升语言表示质量。
AI.method: 在ALBEF、BLIP等图像-文本模型及ALPRO、FiT等视频-文本模型中，对比纯文本编码器与通过视觉监督训练的文本编码器在多个基准测试中的性能差异。
AI.result: 实验表明，传统纯语言表示在大多数自然语言理解和常识推理任务中优于依赖视觉监督的语言表示。
AI.conclusion: 当前视觉-语言模型在纯语言任务中未展现显著优势，提示其可能存在的局限性，需进一步探索更有效的多模态协同训练方法。

These results shed light on the current drawbacks of the vision-language models. 视觉（图像和视频）-语言（VL）预训练是最近流行的范例，它在图像检索、视频检索、视觉问答等多模态任务上取得了最先进的结果。这些模型以无监督的方式进行训练，并极大地受益于补充模态监督。在本文中，我们探讨了使用视觉监督训练的语言表示在自然语言理解和常识推理基准上是否比普通语言表示表现更好。我们尝试了多种图像文本模型，如 ALBEF、BLIP、METER 和视频文本模型，如 ALPRO、Frozen-in-Time (FiT)、VIOLET。我们将这些模型的独立文本编码器的语言表示的性能与通过视觉监督学习的文本编码器的语言表示进行比较。我们的实验表明，普通语言表示在大多数任务上都表现出优越的性能。这些结果揭示了视觉语言模型当前的缺点。 探讨多模态视觉监督对语言模型性能的影响，比较视觉-语言预训练模型与纯语言模型在自然语言理解任务中的表现差异。 Avinash Madasu,Vasudev Lal cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Xuan Wang,Zhigang Zhu
title: Context Understanding in Computer Vision: A Survey
title_zh: 计算机视觉中的上下文理解：一项调查
abstract: Contextual information plays an important role in many computer vision tasks, such as object detection, video action detection, image classification, etc. Recognizing a single object or action out of context could be sometimes very challenging, and context information may help improve the understanding of a scene or an event greatly. Appearance context information, e.g., colors or shapes of the background of an object can improve the recognition accuracy of the object in the scene. Semantic context (e.g. a keyboard on an empty desk vs. a keyboard next to a desktop computer ) will improve accuracy and exclude unrelated events. Context information that are not in the image itself, such as the time or location of an images captured, can also help to decide whether certain event or action should occur. Other types of context (e.g. 3D structure of a building) will also provide additional information to improve the accuracy. In this survey, different context information that has been used in computer vision tasks is reviewed. We categorize context into different types and different levels. We also review available machine learning models and image/video datasets that can employ context information. Furthermore, we compare context based integration and context-free integration in mainly two classes of tasks: image-based and video-based. Finally, this survey is concluded by a set of promising future directions in context learning and utilization.
summary: Contextual information plays an important role in many computer vision tasks, such as object detection, video action detection, image classification, etc. Recognizing a single object or action out of context could be sometimes very challenging, and context information may help improve the understanding of a scene or an event greatly. Appearance context information, e.g., colors or shapes of the background of an object can improve the recognition accuracy of the object in the scene. Semantic context (e.g. a keyboard on an empty desk vs. a keyboard next to a desktop computer ) will improve accuracy and exclude unrelated events. Context information that are not in the image itself, such as the time or location of an images captured, can also help to decide whether certain event or action should occur. Other types of context (e.g. 3D structure of a building) will also provide additional information to improve the accuracy. In this survey, different context information that has been used in computer vision tasks is reviewed. We categorize context into different types and different levels. We also review available machine learning models and image/video datasets that can employ context information. Furthermore, we compare context based integration and context-free integration in mainly two classes of tasks: image-based and video-based. Finally, this survey is concluded by a set of promising future directions in context learning and utilization.
abstract_zh: 上下文信息在许多计算机视觉任务中发挥着重要作用，例如对象检测、视频动作检测、图像分类等。在脱离上下文的情况下识别单个对象或动作有时可能非常具有挑战性，而上下文信息可能有助于极大地提高对场景或事件的理解。外观上下文信息，例如物体背景的颜色或形状，可以提高场景中物体的识别准确性。语义上下文（例如空桌子上的键盘与台式计算机旁边的键盘）将提高准确性并排除不相关的事件。图像本身不存在的上下文信息（例如捕获图像的时间或位置）也可以帮助确定是否应该发生某些事件或动作。其他类型的上下文（例如建筑物的 3D 结构）也将提供附加信息以提高准确性。在本次调查中，回顾了计算机视觉任务中使用的不同上下文信息。我们将上下文分为不同类型和不同级别。我们还回顾了可以利用上下文信息的可用机器学习模型和图像/视频数据集。此外，我们主要在两类任务中比较基于上下文的集成和无上下文集成：基于图像和基于视频。最后，本次调查得出了上下文学习和利用方面一系列有前途的未来方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了计算机视觉任务中上下文信息的理解方法，包括分类、模型和数据集的回顾，并比较了基于上下文与非上下文的整合方法。
AI.motivation: 上下文信息（如外观、语义、时间地点等）能显著提升场景或事件的理解，但现有研究缺乏系统性梳理和分类。
AI.method: 将上下文分为类型与层级，回顾机器学习模型与数据集，对比图像与视频任务中基于上下文与非上下文的整合方法。
AI.result: 总结了不同上下文类型的适用场景，分析了现有模型与数据集的特点，并指出了上下文整合方法的优势与局限性。
AI.conclusion: 未来研究需探索更高效的上下文建模方法、跨模态上下文融合以及在开放场景中的动态上下文利用。

authors_text: Haonan Peng,Andrew Lewis,Blake Hannaford
title: Ablation Study on Features in Learning-based Joints Calibration of Cable-driven Surgical Robots
title_zh: 电缆驱动手术机器人基于学习的关节标定特征消融研究
abstract: With worldwide implementation, millions of surgeries are assisted by surgical robots. The cable-drive mechanism on many surgical robots allows flexible, light, and compact arms and tools. However, the slack and stretch of the cables and the backlash of the gears introduce inevitable errors from motor poses to joint poses, and thus forwarded to the pose and orientation of the end-effector. In this paper, a learning-based calibration using a deep neural network is proposed, which reduces the unloaded pose RMSE of joints 1, 2, 3 to 0.3003 deg, 0.2888 deg, 0.1565 mm, and loaded pose RMSE of joints 1, 2, 3 to 0.4456 deg, 0.3052 deg, 0.1900 mm, respectively. Then, removal ablation and inaccurate ablation are performed to study which features of the DNN model contribute to the calibration accuracy. The results suggest that raw joint poses and motor torques are the most important features. For joint poses, the removal ablation shows that DNN model can derive this information from end-effector pose and orientation. For motor torques, the direction is much more important than amplitude.
summary: With worldwide implementation, millions of surgeries are assisted by surgical robots. The cable-drive mechanism on many surgical robots allows flexible, light, and compact arms and tools. However, the slack and stretch of the cables and the backlash of the gears introduce inevitable errors from motor poses to joint poses, and thus forwarded to the pose and orientation of the end-effector. In this paper, a learning-based calibration using a deep neural network is proposed, which reduces the unloaded pose RMSE of joints 1, 2, 3 to 0.3003 deg, 0.2888 deg, 0.1565 mm, and loaded pose RMSE of joints 1, 2, 3 to 0.4456 deg, 0.3052 deg, 0.1900 mm, respectively. Then, removal ablation and inaccurate ablation are performed to study which features of the DNN model contribute to the calibration accuracy. The results suggest that raw joint poses and motor torques are the most important features. For joint poses, the removal ablation shows that DNN model can derive this information from end-effector pose and orientation. For motor torques, the direction is much more important than amplitude.
abstract_zh: 随着全球范围内的实施，数以百万计的手术得到了手术机器人的协助。许多手术机器人上的电缆驱动机构允许灵活、轻便、紧凑的手臂和工具。然而，电缆的松弛和拉伸以及齿轮的齿隙引入了从电机位姿到关节位姿的不可避免的误差，从而转发到末端执行器的位姿和方向。本文提出了一种使用深度神经网络的基于学习的校准，将关节1、2、3的空载位姿RMSE分别降低至0.3003 deg、0.2888 deg、0.1565 mm，将关节1、2、3的加载位姿RMSE分别降低至0.4456 deg、0.3052 deg、0.1900 mm。然后，进行去除消融和不准确消融，以研究 DNN 模型的哪些特征有助于校准精度。结果表明，原始关节姿势和电机扭矩是最重要的特征。对于关节姿势，去除消融表明 DNN 模型可以从末端执行器姿势和方向导出此信息。对于电机扭矩，方向比幅度重要得多。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度学习的缆驱动手术机器人关节标定方法，并通过消融实验分析特征贡献度。
AI.motivation: 缆驱动手术机器人因电缆松弛、齿轮间隙导致关节位姿误差，影响末端执行器精度，需改进标定方法。
AI.method: 构建深度神经网络进行标定，通过移除消融和不准确消融实验，分析关节位姿、电机扭矩等特征对精度的影响。
AI.result: 标定后关节1-3未加载/加载RMSE分别降至0.3003°/0.4456°等；原始关节位姿和电机扭矩为关键特征，扭矩方向比幅值更重要。
AI.conclusion: 原始关节位姿和电机扭矩是提升标定精度的核心特征，DNN可从末端位姿推导关节信息，扭矩方向显著影响结果。

authors_text: Mykhaylo Balinskiy,Alexander Khitun
title: Traveling Salesman Problem solution using Magnonic Combinatorial Device
title_zh: 使用 Magnonic 组合设备解决旅行商问题
abstract: Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) is a decision-making problem that is essential for a number of practical applications. Today, this problem is solved on digital computers exploiting Boolean-type architecture by checking one by one a number of possible routes. In this work, we describe a special type of hardware for the TSP solution. It is a magnonic combinatorial device comprising magnetic and electric parts connected in the active ring circuit. There is a number of possible propagation routes in the magnetic mesh made of phase shifters, frequency filters, and attenuators. The phase shifters mimic cities in TSP while the distance between the cities is encoded in the signal attenuation. The set of frequency filters makes the waves on different frequencies propagate through the different routes. The principle of operation is based on the classical wave superposition. There is a number of waves coming in all possible routes in parallel accumulating different phase shifts and amplitude damping. However, only the wave(s) that accumulates the certain phase shift will be amplified by the electric part. The amplification comes first to the waves that possess the minimum propagation losses. It makes this type of device suitable for TSP solution, where waves are similar to the salesmen traveling in all possible routes at a time. We present the results of numerical modeling illustrating the TSP solutions for four and six cities. Also, we present experimental data for the TSP solution with four cities.
summary: Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) is a decision-making problem that is essential for a number of practical applications. Today, this problem is solved on digital computers exploiting Boolean-type architecture by checking one by one a number of possible routes. In this work, we describe a special type of hardware for the TSP solution. It is a magnonic combinatorial device comprising magnetic and electric parts connected in the active ring circuit. There is a number of possible propagation routes in the magnetic mesh made of phase shifters, frequency filters, and attenuators. The phase shifters mimic cities in TSP while the distance between the cities is encoded in the signal attenuation. The set of frequency filters makes the waves on different frequencies propagate through the different routes. The principle of operation is based on the classical wave superposition. There is a number of waves coming in all possible routes in parallel accumulating different phase shifts and amplitude damping. However, only the wave(s) that accumulates the certain phase shift will be amplified by the electric part. The amplification comes first to the waves that possess the minimum propagation losses. It makes this type of device suitable for TSP solution, where waves are similar to the salesmen traveling in all possible routes at a time. We present the results of numerical modeling illustrating the TSP solutions for four and six cities. Also, we present experimental data for the TSP solution with four cities.
abstract_zh: 旅行商问题（TSP）是一个对于许多实际应用至关重要的决策问题。如今，这个问题在利用布尔型架构的数字计算机上通过一一检查许多可能的路线来解决。在这项工作中，我们描述了一种用于 TSP 解决方案的特殊类型的硬件。它是一种磁振子组合装置，由连接在有源环形电路中的磁性和电气部件组成。由移相器、频率滤波器和衰减器组成的磁网中有许多可能的传播路径。移相器模拟 TSP 中的城市，而城市之间的距离则编码在信号衰减中。频率滤波器组使不同频率的波通过不同的路径传播。工作原理基于经典波叠加。有许多波并行地进入所有可能的路径，累积不同的相移和振幅阻尼。然而，只有积累了一定相移的波才会被电子部分放大。首先对传播损耗最小的波进行放大。它使得这种类型的设备适合 TSP 解决方案，其中波浪类似于一次在所有可能的路线上旅行的推销员。我们展示了数值模型的结果，说明了四个和六个城市的 TSP 解决方案。此外，我们还提供了四个城市的 TSP 解决方案的实验数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于磁子组合设备的旅行商问题（TSP）解决方案，利用磁性和电子组件的协同作用实现并行计算。
AI.motivation: 传统数字计算机通过逐个验证可能路径解决TSP效率低下，需探索新型硬件架构以提高组合优化问题的求解效率。
AI.method: 设计包含磁性相位移器、频率滤波器和衰减器的环形电路，通过波的叠加原理并行探索所有路径，利用电子部件放大最小衰减路径信号。
AI.result: 数值模拟验证了4城市和6城市的TSP求解，实验数据证实4城市案例的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该磁子组合设备为解决TSP等组合优化问题提供了新型硬件范式，展示了并行波计算的潜力。

search_text: Traveling Salesman Problem solution using Magnonic Combinatorial Device 使用 Magnonic 组合设备解决旅行商问题 Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) is a decision-making problem that is essential for a number of practical applications. Today, this problem is solved on digital computers exploiting Boolean-type architecture by checking one by one a number of possible routes. In this work, we describe a special type of hardware for the TSP solution. It is a magnonic combinatorial device comprising magnetic and electric parts connected in the active ring circuit. There is a number of possible propagation routes in the magnetic mesh made of phase shifters, frequency filters, and attenuators. The phase shifters mimic cities in TSP while the distance between the cities is encoded in the signal attenuation. The set of frequency filters makes the waves on different frequencies propagate through the different routes. The principle of operation is based on the classical wave superposition. There is a number of waves coming in all possible routes in parallel accumulating different phase shifts and amplitude damping. However, only the wave(s) that accumulates the certain phase shift will be amplified by the electric part. The amplification comes first to the waves that possess the minimum propagation losses. It makes this type of device suitable for TSP solution, where waves are similar to the salesmen traveling in all possible routes at a time. We present the results of numerical modeling illustrating the TSP solutions for four and six cities. Also, we present experimental data for the TSP solution with four cities. 旅行商问题（TSP）是一个对于许多实际应用至关重要的决策问题。如今，这个问题在利用布尔型架构的数字计算机上通过一一检查许多可能的路线来解决。在这项工作中，我们描述了一种用于 TSP 解决方案的特殊类型的硬件。它是一种磁振子组合装置，由连接在有源环形电路中的磁性和电气部件组成。由移相器、频率滤波器和衰减器组成的磁网中有许多可能的传播路径。移相器模拟 TSP 中的城市，而城市之间的距离则编码在信号衰减中。频率滤波器组使不同频率的波通过不同的路径传播。工作原理基于经典波叠加。有许多波并行地进入所有可能的路径，累积不同的相移和振幅阻尼。然而，只有积累了一定相移的波才会被电子部分放大。首先对传播损耗最小的波进行放大。它使得这种类型的设备适合 TSP 解决方案，其中波浪类似于一次在所有可能的路线上旅行的推销员。我们展示了数值模型的结果，说明了四个和六个城市的 TSP 解决方案。此外，我们还提供了四个城市的 TSP 解决方案的实验数据。 本文提出一种基于磁子组合设备的旅行商问题（TSP）解决方案，利用磁性和电子组件的协同作用实现并行计算。 Mykhaylo Balinskiy,Alexander Khitun cond-mat.dis-nn,cs.ET

authors_text: Salvador Carrión,Francisco Casacuberta
title: AutoNMT: A Framework to Streamline the Research of Seq2Seq Models
title_zh: AutoNMT：简化 Seq2Seq 模型研究的框架
abstract: We present AutoNMT, a framework to streamline the research of seq-to-seq models by automating the data pipeline (i.e., file management, data preprocessing, and exploratory analysis), automating experimentation in a toolkit-agnostic manner, which allows users to use either their own models or existing seq-to-seq toolkits such as Fairseq or OpenNMT, and finally, automating the report generation (plots and summaries). Furthermore, this library comes with its own seq-to-seq toolkit so that users can easily customize it for non-standard tasks.
summary: We present AutoNMT, a framework to streamline the research of seq-to-seq models by automating the data pipeline (i.e., file management, data preprocessing, and exploratory analysis), automating experimentation in a toolkit-agnostic manner, which allows users to use either their own models or existing seq-to-seq toolkits such as Fairseq or OpenNMT, and finally, automating the report generation (plots and summaries). Furthermore, this library comes with its own seq-to-seq toolkit so that users can easily customize it for non-standard tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 AutoNMT，这是一个框架，通过自动化数据管道（即文件管理、数据预处理和探索性分析）、以与工具包无关的方式自动化实验来简化 seq-to-seq 模型的研究，该框架允许用户使用自己的模型或现有的 seq-to-seq 工具包（例如 Fairseq 或 OpenNMT），最后自动生成报告（绘图和摘要）。此外，该库附带了自己的 seq-to-seq 工具包，以便用户可以轻松地针对非标准任务对其进行自定义。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AutoNMT框架，通过自动化数据处理、实验流程和报告生成，简化序列到序列模型的研究过程。
AI.motivation: 现有研究中，序列到序列模型的开发涉及大量重复性工作（如数据预处理、实验管理），且工具链分散，限制了研究效率。
AI.method: 构建AutoNMT框架，包含自动化数据流水线、跨工具包的实验自动化（兼容Fairseq/OpenNMT等）及可视化报告生成模块，并集成可定制的序列模型工具包。
AI.result: 实现从数据准备到结果分析的全流程自动化，支持用户灵活使用现有工具或自定义模型，显著降低研究门槛。
AI.conclusion: AutoNMT为序列模型研究提供了高效、统一的解决方案，通过自动化工具链加速了模型开发与实验验证过程。

authors_text: Eugene Bagdasaryan,Vitaly Shmatikov
title: Mithridates: Auditing and Boosting Backdoor Resistance of Machine Learning Pipelines
title_zh: Mithridates：审计和增强机器学习管道的后门抵抗力
abstract: Machine learning (ML) models trained on data from potentially untrusted sources are vulnerable to poisoning. A small, maliciously crafted subset of the training inputs can cause the model to learn a "backdoor" task (e.g., misclassify inputs with a certain feature) in addition to its main task. Recent research proposed many hypothetical backdoor attacks whose efficacy heavily depends on the configuration and training hyperparameters of the target model. Given the variety of potential backdoor attacks, ML engineers who are not security experts have no way to measure how vulnerable their current training pipelines are, nor do they have a practical way to compare training configurations so as to pick the more resistant ones. Deploying a defense requires evaluating and choosing from among dozens of research papers and re-engineering the training pipeline. In this paper, we aim to provide ML engineers with pragmatic tools to audit the backdoor resistance of their training pipelines and to compare different training configurations, to help choose one that best balances accuracy and security. First, we propose a universal, attack-agnostic resistance metric based on the minimum number of training inputs that must be compromised before the model learns any backdoor. Second, we design, implement, and evaluate Mithridates a multi-stage approach that integrates backdoor resistance into the training-configuration search. ML developers already rely on hyperparameter search to find configurations that maximize the model's accuracy. Mithridates extends this standard tool to balance accuracy and resistance without disruptive changes to the training pipeline. We show that hyperparameters found by Mithridates increase resistance to multiple types of backdoor attacks by 3-5x with only a slight impact on accuracy. We also discuss extensions to AutoML and federated learning.
summary: Machine learning (ML) models trained on data from potentially untrusted sources are vulnerable to poisoning. A small, maliciously crafted subset of the training inputs can cause the model to learn a "backdoor" task (e.g., misclassify inputs with a certain feature) in addition to its main task. Recent research proposed many hypothetical backdoor attacks whose efficacy heavily depends on the configuration and training hyperparameters of the target model. Given the variety of potential backdoor attacks, ML engineers who are not security experts have no way to measure how vulnerable their current training pipelines are, nor do they have a practical way to compare training configurations so as to pick the more resistant ones. Deploying a defense requires evaluating and choosing from among dozens of research papers and re-engineering the training pipeline. In this paper, we aim to provide ML engineers with pragmatic tools to audit the backdoor resistance of their training pipelines and to compare different training configurations, to help choose one that best balances accuracy and security. First, we propose a universal, attack-agnostic resistance metric based on the minimum number of training inputs that must be compromised before the model learns any backdoor. Second, we design, implement, and evaluate Mithridates a multi-stage approach that integrates backdoor resistance into the training-configuration search. ML developers already rely on hyperparameter search to find configurations that maximize the model's accuracy. Mithridates extends this standard tool to balance accuracy and resistance without disruptive changes to the training pipeline. We show that hyperparameters found by Mithridates increase resistance to multiple types of backdoor attacks by 3-5x with only a slight impact on accuracy. We also discuss extensions to AutoML and federated learning.
abstract_zh: 使用来自潜在不受信任来源的数据进行训练的机器学习 (ML) 模型很容易受到中毒。训练输入的一小部分恶意制作的子集可能会导致模型除了其主要任务之外还学习“后门”任务（例如，对具有特定特征的输入进行错误分类）。最近的研究提出了许多假设的后门攻击，其功效在很大程度上取决于目标模型的配置和训练超参数。考虑到潜在后门攻击的多样性，非安全专家的机器学习工程师无法衡量当前训练管道的脆弱程度，也没有实用的方法来比较训练配置以选择更具抵抗力的配置。部署防御需要从数十篇研究论文中进行评估和选择，并重新设计训练流程。在本文中，我们的目标是为机器学习工程师提供实用的工具来审核其训练管道的后门阻力并比较不同的训练配置，以帮助选择最能平衡准确性和安全性的配置。首先，我们提出了一种通用的、与攻击无关的抵抗指标，该指标基于模型学习任何后门之前必须妥协的最小训练输入数量。其次，我们设计、实施和评估 Mithridates 一种将后门抵抗集成到训练配置搜索中的多阶段方法。机器学习开发人员已经依靠超参数搜索来查找可最大限度提高模型准确性的配置。米特里达梯扩展了这个标准工具，以平衡准确性和阻力，而不会对训练流程进行破坏性改变。我们表明，Mithridates 发现的超参数可将多种类型后门攻击的抵抗力提高 3-5 倍，而对准确性仅产生轻微影响。我们还讨论了 AutoML 和联邦学习的扩展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Mithridates工具，用于审计和增强机器学习流水线的后门攻击抗性，帮助工程师在保持准确性的同时优化训练配置。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对训练流水线后门抗性的系统评估方法，工程师难以比较不同配置的安全性，且防御方案需依赖复杂的研究论文和重新设计流水线。
AI.method: 提出通用抗性度量指标（最小被破坏样本数），设计多阶段Mithridates方法，将其集成到超参数搜索中，平衡准确率与抗性。
AI.result: 实验表明，Mithridates提升多类后门攻击抗性3-5倍，仅轻微影响准确性，并可扩展至AutoML和联邦学习场景。
AI.conclusion: Mithridates为工程师提供了实用工具，有效提升训练流水线安全性，同时为后续研究提供了扩展方向。

search_text: Mithridates: Auditing and Boosting Backdoor Resistance of Machine Learning Pipelines Mithridates：审计和增强机器学习管道的后门抵抗力 Machine learning (ML) models trained on data from potentially untrusted sources are vulnerable to poisoning. A small, maliciously crafted subset of the training inputs can cause the model to learn a "backdoor" task (e.g., misclassify inputs with a certain feature) in addition to its main task. Recent research proposed many hypothetical backdoor attacks whose efficacy heavily depends on the configuration and training hyperparameters of the target model. Given the variety of potential backdoor attacks, ML engineers who are not security experts have no way to measure how vulnerable their current training pipelines are, nor do they have a practical way to compare training configurations so as to pick the more resistant ones. Deploying a defense requires evaluating and choosing from among dozens of research papers and re-engineering the training pipeline. In this paper, we aim to provide ML engineers with pragmatic tools to audit the backdoor resistance of their training pipelines and to compare different training configurations, to help choose one that best balances accuracy and security. First, we propose a universal, attack-agnostic resistance metric based on the minimum number of training inputs that must be compromised before the model learns any backdoor. Second, we design, implement, and evaluate Mithridates a multi-stage approach that integrates backdoor resistance into the training-configuration search. ML developers already rely on hyperparameter search to find configurations that maximize the model's accuracy. Mithridates extends this standard tool to balance accuracy and resistance without disruptive changes to the training pipeline. We show that hyperparameters found by Mithridates increase resistance to multiple types of backdoor attacks by 3-5x with only a slight impact on accuracy. We also discuss extensions to AutoML and federated learning. 使用来自潜在不受信任来源的数据进行训练的机器学习 (ML) 模型很容易受到中毒。训练输入的一小部分恶意制作的子集可能会导致模型除了其主要任务之外还学习“后门”任务（例如，对具有特定特征的输入进行错误分类）。最近的研究提出了许多假设的后门攻击，其功效在很大程度上取决于目标模型的配置和训练超参数。考虑到潜在后门攻击的多样性，非安全专家的机器学习工程师无法衡量当前训练管道的脆弱程度，也没有实用的方法来比较训练配置以选择更具抵抗力的配置。部署防御需要从数十篇研究论文中进行评估和选择，并重新设计训练流程。在本文中，我们的目标是为机器学习工程师提供实用的工具来审核其训练管道的后门阻力并比较不同的训练配置，以帮助选择最能平衡准确性和安全性的配置。首先，我们提出了一种通用的、与攻击无关的抵抗指标，该指标基于模型学习任何后门之前必须妥协的最小训练输入数量。其次，我们设计、实施和评估 Mithridates 一种将后门抵抗集成到训练配置搜索中的多阶段方法。机器学习开发人员已经依靠超参数搜索来查找可最大限度提高模型准确性的配置。米特里达梯扩展了这个标准工具，以平衡准确性和阻力，而不会对训练流程进行破坏性改变。我们表明，Mithridates 发现的超参数可将多种类型后门攻击的抵抗力提高 3-5 倍，而对准确性仅产生轻微影响。我们还讨论了 AutoML 和联邦学习的扩展。 本文提出Mithridates工具，用于审计和增强机器学习流水线的后门攻击抗性，帮助工程师在保持准确性的同时优化训练配置。 Eugene Bagdasaryan,Vitaly Shmatikov cs.CR,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ondrej Biza,Sjoerd van Steenkiste,Mehdi S. M. Sajjadi,Gamaleldin F. Elsayed,Aravindh Mahendran,Thomas Kipf
title: Invariant Slot Attention: Object Discovery with Slot-Centric Reference Frames
title_zh: 不变槽注意：使用以槽为中心的参考系进行对象发现
comment: Accepted at ICML 2023. Project page: https://invariantsa.github.io/
comments: Accepted at ICML 2023. Project page: https://invariantsa.github.io/
abstract: Automatically discovering composable abstractions from raw perceptual data is a long-standing challenge in machine learning. Recent slot-based neural networks that learn about objects in a self-supervised manner have made exciting progress in this direction. However, they typically fall short at adequately capturing spatial symmetries present in the visual world, which leads to sample inefficiency, such as when entangling object appearance and pose. In this paper, we present a simple yet highly effective method for incorporating spatial symmetries via slot-centric reference frames. We incorporate equivariance to per-object pose transformations into the attention and generation mechanism of Slot Attention by translating, scaling, and rotating position encodings. These changes result in little computational overhead, are easy to implement, and can result in large gains in terms of data efficiency and overall improvements to object discovery. We evaluate our method on a wide range of synthetic object discovery benchmarks namely CLEVR, Tetrominoes, CLEVRTex, Objects Room and MultiShapeNet, and show promising improvements on the challenging real-world Waymo Open dataset.
summary: Automatically discovering composable abstractions from raw perceptual data is a long-standing challenge in machine learning. Recent slot-based neural networks that learn about objects in a self-supervised manner have made exciting progress in this direction. However, they typically fall short at adequately capturing spatial symmetries present in the visual world, which leads to sample inefficiency, such as when entangling object appearance and pose. In this paper, we present a simple yet highly effective method for incorporating spatial symmetries via slot-centric reference frames. We incorporate equivariance to per-object pose transformations into the attention and generation mechanism of Slot Attention by translating, scaling, and rotating position encodings. These changes result in little computational overhead, are easy to implement, and can result in large gains in terms of data efficiency and overall improvements to object discovery. We evaluate our method on a wide range of synthetic object discovery benchmarks namely CLEVR, Tetrominoes, CLEVRTex, Objects Room and MultiShapeNet, and show promising improvements on the challenging real-world Waymo Open dataset.
abstract_zh: 从原始感知数据中自动发现可组合的抽象是机器学习中长期存在的挑战。最近以自我监督的方式学习对象的基于槽的神经网络在这个方向上取得了令人兴奋的进展。然而，它们通常无法充分捕捉视觉世界中存在的空间对称性，从而导致样本效率低下，例如在纠缠对象外观和姿势时。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单但高效的方法，通过以槽为中心的参考系合并空间对称性。我们通过平移、缩放和旋转位置编码，将每个对象姿态变换的等变性纳入槽位注意力的注意力和生成机制中。这些变化导致计算开销很小，易于实现，并且可以在数据效率和对象发现的整体改进方面带来巨大的收益。我们在各种合成对象发现基准（即 CLEVR、Tetrominoes、CLEVRTex、Objects Room 和 MultiShapeNet）上评估了我们的方法，并在具有挑战性的现实世界 Waymo Open 数据集上展示了有希望的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于槽位中心参考系的不变槽位注意力机制，以提升机器学习中从原始感知数据自动发现可组合抽象的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于槽位的神经网络在捕捉视觉世界中的空间对称性时存在不足，导致样本效率低下，例如物体外观与姿态的纠缠问题。
AI.method: 通过将每个物体的姿态变换等变性（平移、缩放、旋转）引入槽位注意力机制的位置编码，构建槽位中心参考系，实现空间对称性的高效建模。
AI.result: 在CLEVR、Tetrominoes等合成基准及Waymo Open真实数据集上，方法在数据效率和物体发现性能上均取得显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 槽位中心参考系通过轻量级改造有效捕捉空间对称性，为物体发现任务提供了高效且通用的解决方案。

authors_text: Qiuyu Lu,Lydia Yang,Aditi Maheshwari,Hengrong Ni,Tianyu Yu,Jianzhe Gu,Advait Wadhwani,Andreea Danielescu,Lining Yao
title: Guttation Monitor: Wearable Guttation Sensor for Plant Condition Monitoring and Diagnosis
title_zh: Guttation Monitor：用于植物状态监测和诊断的可穿戴式 Guttation 传感器
abstract: Plant life plays a critical role in the ecosystem. However, it is difficult for humans to perceive plants' reactions because the biopotential and biochemical responses are invisible to humans. Guttation droplets contain various chemicals which can reflect plant physiology and environmental conditions in real-time. Traditionally, these droplets are collected manually and analyzed in the lab with expensive instruments. Here, we introduce the Guttation Monitor, an on-site and low-cost monitoring technology for guttation droplets. It consists of three parts 1) a paper-based microfluidic chip that can collect guttation droplets and perform colorimetric detection of six chemicals, 2) a self-contained and solar-powered camera module that can capture the result from the chip, and 3) an end-user app that can interpret the result. We discuss this technology's design and implementation, conduct evaluations on tomato plants, conduct interviews, and envision how such a technology could enhance the human-plant relationship in four dimensions.
summary: Plant life plays a critical role in the ecosystem. However, it is difficult for humans to perceive plants' reactions because the biopotential and biochemical responses are invisible to humans. Guttation droplets contain various chemicals which can reflect plant physiology and environmental conditions in real-time. Traditionally, these droplets are collected manually and analyzed in the lab with expensive instruments. Here, we introduce the Guttation Monitor, an on-site and low-cost monitoring technology for guttation droplets. It consists of three parts 1) a paper-based microfluidic chip that can collect guttation droplets and perform colorimetric detection of six chemicals, 2) a self-contained and solar-powered camera module that can capture the result from the chip, and 3) an end-user app that can interpret the result. We discuss this technology's design and implementation, conduct evaluations on tomato plants, conduct interviews, and envision how such a technology could enhance the human-plant relationship in four dimensions.
abstract_zh: 植物生命在生态系统中起着至关重要的作用。然而，人类很难感知植物的反应，因为生物电和生化反应是人类看不见的。滴水液滴中含有多种化学物质，可以实时反映植物生理和环境状况。传统上，这些液滴是手动收集的，并在实验室中使用昂贵的仪器进行分析。在这里，我们介绍 Guttaation Monitor，这是一种现场、低成本的废水滴监测技术。它由三部分组成：1) 纸基微流体芯片，可以收集滴落液滴并对六种化学物质进行比色检测；2) 一个独立的太阳能摄像头模块，可以捕获芯片的结果；3) 一个可以解释结果的最终用户应用程序。我们讨论了这项技术的设计和实施，对番茄植株进行评估，进行访谈，并设想这项技术如何在四个维度上增强人与植物的关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Guttation Monitor的可穿戴传感器技术，用于实时监测植物状态和诊断，通过分析植物分泌的吐水滴中的化学物质。
AI.motivation: 植物的生物电位和生化反应难以被人类直接感知，传统分析方法成本高且无法实时监测，需开发低成本、便携的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计包含三部分的系统：1) 基于纸基的微流控芯片用于收集吐水滴并进行六种化学物质的比色检测；2) 自供电太阳能摄像头模块捕捉检测结果；3) 用户端应用解析结果。通过番茄植株测试及用户访谈验证技术。
AI.result: 成功实现技术设计与实施，番茄植株测试验证了系统的有效性，并通过访谈探讨了技术对人与植物关系的潜在提升。
AI.conclusion: 该技术为植物状态监测提供了低成本、实时的解决方案，有助于增强人类与植物的互动与理解。

Here, we introduce the Guttation Monitor, an on-site and low-cost monitoring technology for guttation droplets. It consists of three parts 1) a paper-based microfluidic chip that can collect guttation droplets and perform colorimetric detection of six chemicals, 2) a self-contained and solar-powered camera module that can capture the result from the chip, and 3) an end-user app that can interpret the result. We discuss this technology's design and implementation, conduct evaluations on tomato plants, conduct interviews, and envision how such a technology could enhance the human-plant relationship in four dimensions. 植物生命在生态系统中起着至关重要的作用。然而，人类很难感知植物的反应，因为生物电和生化反应是人类看不见的。滴水液滴中含有多种化学物质，可以实时反映植物生理和环境状况。传统上，这些液滴是手动收集的，并在实验室中使用昂贵的仪器进行分析。在这里，我们介绍 Guttaation Monitor，这是一种现场、低成本的废水滴监测技术。它由三部分组成：1) 纸基微流体芯片，可以收集滴落液滴并对六种化学物质进行比色检测；2) 一个独立的太阳能摄像头模块，可以捕获芯片的结果；3) 一个可以解释结果的最终用户应用程序。我们讨论了这项技术的设计和实施，对番茄植株进行评估，进行访谈，并设想这项技术如何在四个维度上增强人与植物的关系。 本文提出了一种名为Guttation Monitor的可穿戴传感器技术，用于实时监测植物状态和诊断，通过分析植物分泌的吐水滴中的化学物质。 Qiuyu Lu,Lydia Yang,Aditi Maheshwari,Hengrong Ni,Tianyu Yu,Jianzhe Gu,Advait Wadhwani,Andreea Danielescu,Lining Yao cs.HC

authors_text: Moïse Blanchard,Junhui Zhang,Patrick Jaillet
title: Quadratic Memory is Necessary for Optimal Query Complexity in Convex Optimization: Center-of-Mass is Pareto-Optimal
title_zh: 凸优化中的最佳查询复杂性需要二次内存：质心是帕累托最优
abstract: We give query complexity lower bounds for convex optimization and the related feasibility problem. We show that quadratic memory is necessary to achieve the optimal oracle complexity for first-order convex optimization. In particular, this shows that center-of-mass cutting-planes algorithms in dimension $d$ which use $\tilde O(d^2)$ memory and $\tilde O(d)$ queries are Pareto-optimal for both convex optimization and the feasibility problem, up to logarithmic factors. Precisely, we prove that to minimize $1$-Lipschitz convex functions over the unit ball to $1/d^4$ accuracy, any deterministic first-order algorithms using at most $d^{2-δ}$ bits of memory must make $\tildeΩ(d^{1+δ/3})$ queries, for any $δ\in[0,1]$. For the feasibility problem, in which an algorithm only has access to a separation oracle, we show a stronger trade-off: for at most $d^{2-δ}$ memory, the number of queries required is $\tildeΩ(d^{1+δ})$. This resolves a COLT 2019 open problem of Woodworth and Srebro.
summary: We give query complexity lower bounds for convex optimization and the related feasibility problem. We show that quadratic memory is necessary to achieve the optimal oracle complexity for first-order convex optimization. In particular, this shows that center-of-mass cutting-planes algorithms in dimension $d$ which use $\tilde O(d^2)$ memory and $\tilde O(d)$ queries are Pareto-optimal for both convex optimization and the feasibility problem, up to logarithmic factors. Precisely, we prove that to minimize $1$-Lipschitz convex functions over the unit ball to $1/d^4$ accuracy, any deterministic first-order algorithms using at most $d^{2-δ}$ bits of memory must make $\tildeΩ(d^{1+δ/3})$ queries, for any $δ\in[0,1]$. For the feasibility problem, in which an algorithm only has access to a separation oracle, we show a stronger trade-off: for at most $d^{2-δ}$ memory, the number of queries required is $\tildeΩ(d^{1+δ})$. This resolves a COLT 2019 open problem of Woodworth and Srebro.
abstract_zh: 我们给出了凸优化的查询复杂度下界和相关的可行性问题。我们证明二次内存对于实现一阶凸优化的最佳预言复杂度是必要的。特别是，这表明使用 $\tilde O(d^2)$ 内存和 $\tilde O(d)$ 查询的维度 $d$ 中的质心剖切面算法对于凸优化和可行性问题都是帕累托最优，直至对数因子。准确地说，我们证明，为了将单位球上的 $1$-Lipschitz 凸函数最小化到 $1/d^4$ 精度，任何最多使用 $d^{2-δ}$ 位内存的确定性一阶算法必须对任何 $δ\in[0,1]$ 进行 $\tildeΩ(d^{1+δ/3})$ 查询。对于算法只能访问分离预言机的可行性问题，我们展示了更强的权衡：对于最多 $d^{2-δ}$ 内存，所需的查询数量为 $\tildeΩ(d^{1+δ})$。这解决了 Woodworth 和 Srebro 的 COLT 2019 开放问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究凸优化问题中查询复杂度与内存使用的关系，证明二次内存是实现最优查询复杂度的必要条件，并展示中心质点切割平面算法在内存与查询次数上的帕累托最优性。
AI.motivation: 解决凸优化问题时，现有算法在内存与查询次数的权衡上存在理论缺口，特别是COLT 2019提出的关于内存限制下查询复杂度下界的问题尚未解决。
AI.method: 通过信息论下界分析与复杂度理论，构建对抗性函数实例，证明在内存受限条件下任何确定性一阶算法必须付出更高的查询次数。
AI.result: 证明了在d维空间中，使用少于二次内存的算法需付出Ω(d^{1+δ/3})次查询（优化问题）或Ω(d^{1+δ})次查询（可行性问题），验证中心质点算法达到帕累托最优。
AI.conclusion: 二次内存是凸优化最优查询复杂度的必要条件，中心质点算法在内存-查询权衡上不可改进，解决了COLT 2019的开放性问题。
