authors_text: Filip Szatkowski,Karol J. Piczak,Przemysław Spurek,Jacek Tabor,Tomasz Trzciński
title: Hypernetworks build Implicit Neural Representations of Sounds
title_zh: 超网络构建声音的隐式神经表示
abstract: Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) are nowadays used to represent multimedia signals across various real-life applications, including image super-resolution, image compression, or 3D rendering. Existing methods that leverage INRs are predominantly focused on visual data, as their application to other modalities, such as audio, is nontrivial due to the inductive biases present in architectural attributes of image-based INR models. To address this limitation, we introduce HyperSound, the first meta-learning approach to produce INRs for audio samples that leverages hypernetworks to generalize beyond samples observed in training. Our approach reconstructs audio samples with quality comparable to other state-of-the-art models and provides a viable alternative to contemporary sound representations used in deep neural networks for audio processing, such as spectrograms.
summary: Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) are nowadays used to represent multimedia signals across various real-life applications, including image super-resolution, image compression, or 3D rendering. Existing methods that leverage INRs are predominantly focused on visual data, as their application to other modalities, such as audio, is nontrivial due to the inductive biases present in architectural attributes of image-based INR models. To address this limitation, we introduce HyperSound, the first meta-learning approach to produce INRs for audio samples that leverages hypernetworks to generalize beyond samples observed in training. Our approach reconstructs audio samples with quality comparable to other state-of-the-art models and provides a viable alternative to contemporary sound representations used in deep neural networks for audio processing, such as spectrograms.
abstract_zh: 隐式神经表示 (INR) 如今用于表示各种现实生活应用中的多媒体信号，包括图像超分辨率、图像压缩或 3D 渲染。利用 INR 的现有方法主要集中在视觉数据上，因为基于图像的 INR 模型的架构属性中存在归纳偏差，因此它们在音频等其他模式中的应用并不简单。为了解决这个限制，我们引入了 HyperSound，这是第一个为音频样本生成 INR 的元学习方法，它利用超网络来泛化训练中观察到的样本之外的内容。我们的方法重建的音频样本的质量可与其他最先进的模型相媲美，并为用于音频处理的深度神经网络（例如声谱图）中使用的当代声音表示提供了可行的替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HyperSound方法，利用超网络构建音频的隐式神经表示（INRs），以解决传统方法在音频应用中的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有INR方法多聚焦于视觉数据，音频等其他模态因架构归纳偏置难以有效应用，需探索新型神经表示方法。
AI.method: 通过元学习框架设计超网络，生成可泛化到训练外样本的音频INRs，替代传统频谱图表示。
AI.result: 音频重建质量达到现有最优模型水平，验证了INRs在音频处理中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: HyperSound成功将INRs扩展至音频领域，为深度音频处理提供了新型神经表示方案。

authors_text: Ali Harandi,Ahmad Moeineddin,Michael Kaliske,Stefanie Reese,Shahed Rezaei
title: Mixed formulation of physics-informed neural networks for thermo-mechanically coupled systems and heterogeneous domains
title_zh: 用于热机耦合系统和异构域的物理信息神经网络的混合公式
abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) are a new tool for solving boundary value problems by defining loss functions of neural networks based on governing equations, boundary conditions, and initial conditions. Recent investigations have shown that when designing loss functions for many engineering problems, using first-order derivatives and combining equations from both strong and weak forms can lead to much better accuracy, especially when there are heterogeneity and variable jumps in the domain. This new approach is called the mixed formulation for PINNs, which takes ideas from the mixed finite element method. In this method, the PDE is reformulated as a system of equations where the primary unknowns are the fluxes or gradients of the solution, and the secondary unknowns are the solution itself. In this work, we propose applying the mixed formulation to solve multi-physical problems, specifically a stationary thermo-mechanically coupled system of equations. Additionally, we discuss both sequential and fully coupled unsupervised training and compare their accuracy and computational cost. To improve the accuracy of the network, we incorporate hard boundary constraints to ensure valid predictions. We then investigate how different optimizers and architectures affect accuracy and efficiency. Finally, we introduce a simple approach for parametric learning that is similar to transfer learning. This approach combines data and physics to address the limitations of PINNs regarding computational cost and improves the network's ability to predict the response of the system for unseen cases. The outcomes of this work will be useful for many other engineering applications where deep learning is employed on multiple coupled systems of equations for fast and reliable computations.
summary: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) are a new tool for solving boundary value problems by defining loss functions of neural networks based on governing equations, boundary conditions, and initial conditions. Recent investigations have shown that when designing loss functions for many engineering problems, using first-order derivatives and combining equations from both strong and weak forms can lead to much better accuracy, especially when there are heterogeneity and variable jumps in the domain. This new approach is called the mixed formulation for PINNs, which takes ideas from the mixed finite element method. In this method, the PDE is reformulated as a system of equations where the primary unknowns are the fluxes or gradients of the solution, and the secondary unknowns are the solution itself. In this work, we propose applying the mixed formulation to solve multi-physical problems, specifically a stationary thermo-mechanically coupled system of equations. Additionally, we discuss both sequential and fully coupled unsupervised training and compare their accuracy and computational cost. To improve the accuracy of the network, we incorporate hard boundary constraints to ensure valid predictions. We then investigate how different optimizers and architectures affect accuracy and efficiency. Finally, we introduce a simple approach for parametric learning that is similar to transfer learning. This approach combines data and physics to address the limitations of PINNs regarding computational cost and improves the network's ability to predict the response of the system for unseen cases. The outcomes of this work will be useful for many other engineering applications where deep learning is employed on multiple coupled systems of equations for fast and reliable computations.
abstract_zh: 物理信息神经网络（PINN）是一种通过基于控制方程、边界条件和初始条件定义神经网络损失函数来解决边值问题的新工具。最近的研究表明，在为许多工程问题设计损失函数时，使用一阶导数并结合强形式和弱形式的方程可以带来更好的精度，特别是当域中存在异质性和变量跳跃时。这种新方法称为 PINN 的混合公式，它借鉴了混合有限元方法的思想。在该方法中，偏微分方程被重新表述为一个方程组，其中主要未知数是解的通量或梯度，次要未知数是解本身。在这项工作中，我们建议应用混合公式来解决多物理问题，特别是稳态热机耦合方程组。此外，我们还讨论了顺序训练和完全耦合的无监督训练，并比较了它们的准确性和计算成本。为了提高网络的准确性，我们采用硬边界约束来确保预测有效。然后我们研究不同的优化器和架构如何影响准确性和效率。最后，我们介绍一种类似于迁移学习的简单参数学习方法。这种方法结合了数据和物理，以解决 PINN 在计算成本方面的局限性，并提高网络预测系统对未见过的情况的响应的能力。这项工作的成果将对许多其他工程应用有用，在这些工程应用中，深度学习被应用于多个耦合方程组，以实现快速可靠的计算。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将混合公式应用于物理信息神经网络（PINNs），以解决热-机械耦合系统及异质域中的多物理问题，并改进训练方法与参数学习策略。
AI.motivation: 传统PINNs在处理异质域和变量跳跃时存在精度不足的问题，而混合公式结合强弱形式方程能显著提升准确性，因此需将其扩展至多物理耦合系统并优化训练效率。
AI.method: 通过混合有限元思想，将PDE改写为包含通量/梯度（主未知数）和解本身（次未知数）的方程组；采用顺序与全耦合无监督训练，引入硬边界约束，并比较优化器与网络架构的影响；最后提出类似迁移学习的参数学习方法。
AI.result: 混合公式提升了解的精度，硬边界约束有效，不同优化器与架构对效率有显著影响，参数学习方法增强了模型对未见案例的预测能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多物理耦合系统的快速可靠计算提供了新思路，适用于工程领域中需结合数据与物理规律的深度学习场景。

search_text: Mixed formulation of physics-informed neural networks for thermo-mechanically coupled systems and heterogeneous domains 用于热机耦合系统和异构域的物理信息神经网络的混合公式 Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) are a new tool for solving boundary value problems by defining loss functions of neural networks based on governing equations, boundary conditions, and initial conditions. Recent investigations have shown that when designing loss functions for many engineering problems, using first-order derivatives and combining equations from both strong and weak forms can lead to much better accuracy, especially when there are heterogeneity and variable jumps in the domain. This new approach is called the mixed formulation for PINNs, which takes ideas from the mixed finite element method. In this method, the PDE is reformulated as a system of equations where the primary unknowns are the fluxes or gradients of the solution, and the secondary unknowns are the solution itself. In this work, we propose applying the mixed formulation to solve multi-physical problems, specifically a stationary thermo-mechanically coupled system of equations. Additionally, we discuss both sequential and fully coupled unsupervised training and compare their accuracy and computational cost. To improve the accuracy of the network, we incorporate hard boundary constraints to ensure valid predictions. We then investigate how different optimizers and architectures affect accuracy and efficiency. Finally, we introduce a simple approach for parametric learning that is similar to transfer learning. This approach combines data and physics to address the limitations of PINNs regarding computational cost and improves the network's ability to predict the response of the system for unseen cases. The outcomes of this work will be useful for many other engineering applications where deep learning is employed on multiple coupled systems of equations for fast and reliable computations. 物理信息神经网络（PINN）是一种通过基于控制方程、边界条件和初始条件定义神经网络损失函数来解决边值问题的新工具。最近的研究表明，在为许多工程问题设计损失函数时，使用一阶导数并结合强形式和弱形式的方程可以带来更好的精度，特别是当域中存在异质性和变量跳跃时。这种新方法称为 PINN 的混合公式，它借鉴了混合有限元方法的思想。在该方法中，偏微分方程被重新表述为一个方程组，其中主要未知数是解的通量或梯度，次要未知数是解本身。在这项工作中，我们建议应用混合公式来解决多物理问题，特别是稳态热机耦合方程组。此外，我们还讨论了顺序训练和完全耦合的无监督训练，并比较了它们的准确性和计算成本。为了提高网络的准确性，我们采用硬边界约束来确保预测有效。然后我们研究不同的优化器和架构如何影响准确性和效率。最后，我们介绍一种类似于迁移学习的简单参数学习方法。这种方法结合了数据和物理，以解决 PINN 在计算成本方面的局限性，并提高网络预测系统对未见过的情况的响应的能力。这项工作的成果将对许多其他工程应用有用，在这些工程应用中，深度学习被应用于多个耦合方程组，以实现快速可靠的计算。 本文提出将混合公式应用于物理信息神经网络（PINNs），以解决热-机械耦合系统及异质域中的多物理问题，并改进训练方法与参数学习策略。 Ali Harandi,Ahmad Moeineddin,Michael Kaliske,Stefanie Reese,Shahed Rezaei cs.CE,cs.AI

authors_text: Elliot Fosong,Arrasy Rahman,Ignacio Carlucho,Stefano V. Albrecht
title: Learning Complex Teamwork Tasks Using a Given Sub-task Decomposition
title_zh: 使用给定的子任务分解学习复杂的团队合作任务
abstract: Training a team to complete a complex task via multi-agent reinforcement learning can be difficult due to challenges such as policy search in a large joint policy space, and non-stationarity caused by mutually adapting agents. To facilitate efficient learning of complex multi-agent tasks, we propose an approach which uses an expert-provided decomposition of a task into simpler multi-agent sub-tasks. In each sub-task, a subset of the entire team is trained to acquire sub-task-specific policies. The sub-teams are then merged and transferred to the target task, where their policies are collectively fine-tuned to solve the more complex target task. We show empirically that such approaches can greatly reduce the number of timesteps required to solve a complex target task relative to training from-scratch. However, we also identify and investigate two problems with naive implementations of approaches based on sub-task decomposition, and propose a simple and scalable method to address these problems which augments existing actor-critic algorithms. We demonstrate the empirical benefits of our proposed method, enabling sub-task decomposition approaches to be deployed in diverse multi-agent tasks.
summary: Training a team to complete a complex task via multi-agent reinforcement learning can be difficult due to challenges such as policy search in a large joint policy space, and non-stationarity caused by mutually adapting agents. To facilitate efficient learning of complex multi-agent tasks, we propose an approach which uses an expert-provided decomposition of a task into simpler multi-agent sub-tasks. In each sub-task, a subset of the entire team is trained to acquire sub-task-specific policies. The sub-teams are then merged and transferred to the target task, where their policies are collectively fine-tuned to solve the more complex target task. We show empirically that such approaches can greatly reduce the number of timesteps required to solve a complex target task relative to training from-scratch. However, we also identify and investigate two problems with naive implementations of approaches based on sub-task decomposition, and propose a simple and scalable method to address these problems which augments existing actor-critic algorithms. We demonstrate the empirical benefits of our proposed method, enabling sub-task decomposition approaches to be deployed in diverse multi-agent tasks.
abstract_zh: 由于诸如大型联合策略空间中的策略搜索以及相互适应代理引起的非平稳性等挑战，训练团队通过多代理强化学习完成复杂的任务可能很困难。为了促进复杂多智能体任务的有效学习，我们提出了一种方法，该方法使用专家提供的将任务分解为更简单的多智能体子任务的方法。在每个子任务中，整个团队的一个子集接受培训以获取特定于子任务的策略。然后，子团队被合并并转移到目标任务，在那里他们的策略被集体微调以解决更复杂的目标任务。我们凭经验证明，相对于从头开始的训练，这种方法可以大大减少解决复杂目标任务所需的时间步数。然而，我们还识别并研究了基于子任务分解的方法的简单实现的两个问题，并提出了一种简单且可扩展的方法来解决这些问题，从而增强了现有的行动者批评家算法。我们展示了我们提出的方法的经验优势，使得子任务分解方法能够部署在不同的多智能体任务中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于专家提供的子任务分解方法，通过分阶段训练子团队并合并策略，解决复杂多智能体任务的学习效率问题。
AI.motivation: 多智能体强化学习在复杂任务中面临策略搜索空间大、非稳态性等挑战，从零开始训练效率低下。
AI.method: 利用专家分解的子任务，分阶段训练子团队获取子任务策略，再合并策略并通过微调解决整体任务。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著减少训练时长，且提出的改进方法有效解决了子任务分解的两个关键问题。
AI.conclusion: 子任务分解结合策略微调能高效解决复杂团队任务，且方法具有可扩展性，适用于多样化的多智能体场景。

authors_text: Lloyd Windrim,Arman Melkumyan,Richard J. Murphy,Anna Chlingaryan,Raymond Leung
title: Unsupervised ore/waste classification on open-cut mine faces using close-range hyperspectral data
title_zh: 使用近距离高光谱数据对露天矿工作面进行无监督矿石/废物分类
comment: Manuscript has been accepted for publication in Geoscience Frontiers. Keywords: Hyperspectral imaging, remote sensing, mineral mapping, machine learning, convolutional neural networks, transfer learning, data augmentation, illumination invariance
comments: Manuscript has been accepted for publication in Geoscience Frontiers. Keywords: Hyperspectral imaging, remote sensing, mineral mapping, machine learning, convolutional neural networks, transfer learning, data augmentation, illumination invariance
abstract: The remote mapping of minerals and discrimination of ore and waste on surfaces are important tasks for geological applications such as those in mining. Such tasks have become possible using ground-based, close-range hyperspectral sensors which can remotely measure the reflectance properties of the environment with high spatial and spectral resolution. However, autonomous mapping of mineral spectra measured on an open-cut mine face remains a challenging problem due to the subtleness of differences in spectral absorption features between mineral and rock classes as well as variability in the illumination of the scene. An additional layer of difficulty arises when there is no annotated data available to train a supervised learning algorithm. A pipeline for unsupervised mapping of spectra on a mine face is proposed which draws from several recent advances in the hyperspectral machine learning literature. The proposed pipeline brings together unsupervised and self-supervised algorithms in a unified system to map minerals on a mine face without the need for human-annotated training data. The pipeline is evaluated with a hyperspectral image dataset of an open-cut mine face comprising mineral ore martite and non-mineralised shale. The combined system is shown to produce a superior map to its constituent algorithms, and the consistency of its mapping capability is demonstrated using data acquired at two different times of day.
summary: The remote mapping of minerals and discrimination of ore and waste on surfaces are important tasks for geological applications such as those in mining. Such tasks have become possible using ground-based, close-range hyperspectral sensors which can remotely measure the reflectance properties of the environment with high spatial and spectral resolution. However, autonomous mapping of mineral spectra measured on an open-cut mine face remains a challenging problem due to the subtleness of differences in spectral absorption features between mineral and rock classes as well as variability in the illumination of the scene. An additional layer of difficulty arises when there is no annotated data available to train a supervised learning algorithm. A pipeline for unsupervised mapping of spectra on a mine face is proposed which draws from several recent advances in the hyperspectral machine learning literature. The proposed pipeline brings together unsupervised and self-supervised algorithms in a unified system to map minerals on a mine face without the need for human-annotated training data. The pipeline is evaluated with a hyperspectral image dataset of an open-cut mine face comprising mineral ore martite and non-mineralised shale. The combined system is shown to produce a superior map to its constituent algorithms, and the consistency of its mapping capability is demonstrated using data acquired at two different times of day.
abstract_zh: 矿物的远程测绘以及地表矿石和废物的辨别是采矿等地质应用的重要任务。使用地面近距离高光谱传感器可以实现此类任务，这些传感器可以以高空间和光谱分辨率远程测量环境的反射特性。然而，由于矿物和岩石类别之间光谱吸收特征的微妙差异以及场景照明的变化，在露天矿工作面上测量的矿物光谱的自主测绘仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。当没有可用于训练监督学习算法的注释数据时，就会出现额外的困难。借鉴了高光谱机器学习文献的一些最新进展，提出了一种用于矿井工作面光谱无监督映射的管道。拟议的管道将无监督和自监督算法汇集在一个统一的系统中，以绘制矿面上的矿物图，而无需人工注释的训练数据。使用露天矿工作面的高光谱图像数据集对管道进行评估，该露天矿工作面包括矿物玛铁矿和非矿化页岩。组合系统能够生成优于其组成算法的地图，并且使用一天中两个不同时间获取的数据证明了其绘图能力的一致性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需人工标注数据的无监督方法，利用近距高光谱数据对露天矿场的矿石与废石进行分类。
AI.motivation: 传统矿石识别依赖标注数据且受光照变化影响大，而露天矿场常缺乏标注数据，需开发自主映射方法。
AI.method: 融合无监督与自监督学习算法，构建统一系统处理高光谱数据，自动识别矿石与废石。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在矿场数据集上优于单一算法，且在不同光照条件下保持映射一致性。
AI.conclusion: 无需标注数据的无监督方法可有效实现矿场矿物映射，为实际采矿应用提供可行解决方案。

search_text: Unsupervised ore/waste classification on open-cut mine faces using close-range hyperspectral data 使用近距离高光谱数据对露天矿工作面进行无监督矿石/废物分类 The remote mapping of minerals and discrimination of ore and waste on surfaces are important tasks for geological applications such as those in mining. Such tasks have become possible using ground-based, close-range hyperspectral sensors which can remotely measure the reflectance properties of the environment with high spatial and spectral resolution. However, autonomous mapping of mineral spectra measured on an open-cut mine face remains a challenging problem due to the subtleness of differences in spectral absorption features between mineral and rock classes as well as variability in the illumination of the scene. An additional layer of difficulty arises when there is no annotated data available to train a supervised learning algorithm. A pipeline for unsupervised mapping of spectra on a mine face is proposed which draws from several recent advances in the hyperspectral machine learning literature. The proposed pipeline brings together unsupervised and self-supervised algorithms in a unified system to map minerals on a mine face without the need for human-annotated training data. The pipeline is evaluated with a hyperspectral image dataset of an open-cut mine face comprising mineral ore martite and non-mineralised shale. The combined system is shown to produce a superior map to its constituent algorithms, and the consistency of its mapping capability is demonstrated using data acquired at two different times of day. 矿物的远程测绘以及地表矿石和废物的辨别是采矿等地质应用的重要任务。使用地面近距离高光谱传感器可以实现此类任务，这些传感器可以以高空间和光谱分辨率远程测量环境的反射特性。然而，由于矿物和岩石类别之间光谱吸收特征的微妙差异以及场景照明的变化，在露天矿工作面上测量的矿物光谱的自主测绘仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。当没有可用于训练监督学习算法的注释数据时，就会出现额外的困难。借鉴了高光谱机器学习文献的一些最新进展，提出了一种用于矿井工作面光谱无监督映射的管道。拟议的管道将无监督和自监督算法汇集在一个统一的系统中，以绘制矿面上的矿物图，而无需人工注释的训练数据。使用露天矿工作面的高光谱图像数据集对管道进行评估，该露天矿工作面包括矿物玛铁矿和非矿化页岩。组合系统能够生成优于其组成算法的地图，并且使用一天中两个不同时间获取的数据证明了其绘图能力的一致性。 本文提出一种无需人工标注数据的无监督方法，利用近距高光谱数据对露天矿场的矿石与废石进行分类。 Lloyd Windrim,Arman Melkumyan,Richard J. authors_text: Yuying Li,Yuchen Liu,Donald S. Williamson
title: A Composite T60 Regression and Classification Approach for Speech Dereverberation
title_zh: 用于语音去混响的复合 T60 回归和分类方法
abstract: Dereverberation is often performed directly on the reverberant audio signal, without knowledge of the acoustic environment. Reverberation time, T60, however, is an essential acoustic factor that reflects how reverberation may impact a signal. In this work, we propose to perform dereverberation while leveraging key acoustic information from the environment. More specifically, we develop a joint learning approach that uses a composite T60 module and a separate dereverberation module to simultaneously perform reverberation time estimation and dereverberation. The reverberation time module provides key features to the dereverberation module during fine tuning. We evaluate our approach in simulated and real environments, and compare against several approaches. The results show that this composite framework improves performance in environments.
summary: Dereverberation is often performed directly on the reverberant audio signal, without knowledge of the acoustic environment. Reverberation time, T60, however, is an essential acoustic factor that reflects how reverberation may impact a signal. In this work, we propose to perform dereverberation while leveraging key acoustic information from the environment. More specifically, we develop a joint learning approach that uses a composite T60 module and a separate dereverberation module to simultaneously perform reverberation time estimation and dereverberation. The reverberation time module provides key features to the dereverberation module during fine tuning. We evaluate our approach in simulated and real environments, and compare against several approaches. The results show that this composite framework improves performance in environments.
abstract_zh: 去混响通常直接对混响音频信号执行，而不需要了解声学环境。然而，混响时间 T60 是一个重要的声学因素，反映了混响对信号的影响。在这项工作中，我们建议在利用环境中的关键声学信息的同时执行去混响。更具体地说，我们开发了一种联合学习方法，使用复合 T60 模块和单独的去混响模块来同时执行混响时间估计和去混响。混响时间模块在微调期间为去混响模块提供了关键功能。我们在模拟和真实环境中评估我们的方法，并与几种方法进行比较。结果表明，该复合框架提高了环境性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合T60估计与语音去混响的联合学习框架，通过复合模块提升去混响效果。
AI.motivation: 传统去混响方法未利用声学环境信息（如混响时间T60），而T60是影响信号的关键因素，需将其纳入模型以提升性能。
AI.method: 设计包含T60估计模块和独立去混响模块的复合框架，在微调阶段通过T60模块提取的特征增强去混响模块的性能。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实环境中验证，该框架相比其他方法显著提升了去混响效果。
AI.conclusion: 整合T60信息的复合框架能有效提升语音去混响性能，为环境感知驱动的声学处理提供了新思路。

authors_text: Mukai Li,Shansan Gong,Jiangtao Feng,Yiheng Xu,Jun Zhang,Zhiyong Wu,Lingpeng Kong
title: In-Context Learning with Many Demonstration Examples
title_zh: 通过许多演示示例进行情境学习
abstract: Large pre-training language models (PLMs) have shown promising in-context learning abilities. However, due to the backbone transformer architecture, existing PLMs are bottlenecked by the memory and computational cost when scaling up to a large context size, leaving instruction tuning and in-context learning of many demonstration examples, as well as long-range language modeling under-explored. In this study, we propose a long-range language model EVALM based on an efficient transformer mechanism. EVALM is trained with 8k tokens per batch line and can test up to 256k-lengthed contexts with extrapolation, 128 times to the limit of existing PLMs (e.g. GPT3). Based on EVALM, we scale up the size of examples efficiently in both instruction tuning and in-context learning to explore the boundary of the benefits from more annotated data. Experimental results on a diverse set of tasks show that EVALM achieves 4.1% higher accuracy on average, and the average length of achieving the best accuracy score over tasks is around 12k. We find that in-context learning can achieve higher performance with more demonstrations under many-shot instruction tuning (8k), and further extending the length of instructions (16k) can further improve the upper bound of scaling in-context learning.
summary: Large pre-training language models (PLMs) have shown promising in-context learning abilities. However, due to the backbone transformer architecture, existing PLMs are bottlenecked by the memory and computational cost when scaling up to a large context size, leaving instruction tuning and in-context learning of many demonstration examples, as well as long-range language modeling under-explored. In this study, we propose a long-range language model EVALM based on an efficient transformer mechanism. EVALM is trained with 8k tokens per batch line and can test up to 256k-lengthed contexts with extrapolation, 128 times to the limit of existing PLMs (e.g. GPT3). Based on EVALM, we scale up the size of examples efficiently in both instruction tuning and in-context learning to explore the boundary of the benefits from more annotated data. Experimental results on a diverse set of tasks show that EVALM achieves 4.1% higher accuracy on average, and the average length of achieving the best accuracy score over tasks is around 12k. We find that in-context learning can achieve higher performance with more demonstrations under many-shot instruction tuning (8k), and further extending the length of instructions (16k) can further improve the upper bound of scaling in-context learning.
abstract_zh: 大型预训练语言模型（PLM）已显示出有前景的上下文学习能力。然而，由于骨干变压器架构的原因，现有的 PLM 在扩展到较大的上下文大小时会受到内存和计算成本的瓶颈，导致许多演示示例的指令调整和上下文学习以及远程语言建模尚未得到充分探索。在本研究中，我们提出了一种基于高效变压器机制的远程语言模型 EVALM。 EVALM 每批处理线使用 8k 个令牌进行训练，可以通过外推法测试多达 256k 长度的上下文，是现有 PLM（例如 GPT3）限制的 128 倍。基于 EVALM，我们在指令调优和上下文学习中有效地扩大了示例的大小，以探索更多注释数据的好处边界。在不同任务集上的实验结果表明，EVALM 的准确率平均提高了 4.1%，并且在任务中获得最佳准确率分数的平均长度约为 12k。我们发现，在多镜头指令调整（8k）下，上下文学习可以通过更多演示获得更高的性能，并且进一步扩展指令长度（16k）可以进一步提高上下文学习扩展的上限。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高效Transformer机制的长程语言模型EVALM，旨在解决大规模上下文场景下预训练语言模型的内存和计算瓶颈问题，并探索大量示例对上下文学习效果的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练语言模型在处理超长上下文时受限于内存和计算成本，导致指令微调和上下文学习中大量示例的应用尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 设计高效Transformer架构的EVALM模型，采用8k tokens/batch训练，并支持256k长度上下文测试。通过扩展指令微调和上下文学习中的示例规模，研究更多标注数据带来的性能提升边界。
AI.result: EVALM在多任务中平均准确率提升4.1%，最佳性能平均在12k长度时达成。8k示例的many-shot指令微调和16k指令长度扩展进一步提升了上下文学习上限。
AI.conclusion: EVALM验证了长程上下文处理的有效性，表明增加示例数量和指令长度可显著提升上下文学习效果，为未来超长上下文建模提供了新方向。

motivation: 现有预训练语言模型在处理超长上下文时受限于内存和计算成本，导致指令微调和上下文学习中大量示例的应用尚未充分探索。
method: 设计高效Transformer架构的EVALM模型，采用8k tokens/batch训练，并支持256k长度上下文测试。通过扩展指令微调和上下文学习中的示例规模，研究更多标注数据带来的性能提升边界。
result: EVALM在多任务中平均准确率提升4.1%，最佳性能平均在12k长度时达成。8k示例的many-shot指令微调和16k指令长度扩展进一步提升了上下文学习上限。
conclusion: EVALM验证了长程上下文处理的有效性，表明增加示例数量和指令长度可显著提升上下文学习效果，为未来超长上下文建模提供了新方向。
search_text: In-Context Learning with Many Demonstration Examples 通过许多演示示例进行情境学习 Large pre-training language models (PLMs) have shown promising in-context learning abilities. However, due to the backbone transformer architecture, existing PLMs are bottlenecked by the memory and computational cost when scaling up to a large context size, leaving instruction tuning and in-context learning of many demonstration examples, as well as long-range language modeling under-explored. In this study, we propose a long-range language model EVALM based on an efficient transformer mechanism. EVALM is trained with 8k tokens per batch line and can test up to 256k-lengthed contexts with extrapolation, 128 times to the limit of existing PLMs (e.g. GPT3). Based on EVALM, we scale up the size of examples efficiently in both instruction tuning and in-context learning to explore the boundary of the benefits from more annotated data. Experimental results on a diverse set of tasks show that EVALM achieves 4.1% higher accuracy on average, and the average length of achieving the best accuracy score over tasks is around 12k. We find that in-context learning can achieve higher performance with more demonstrations under many-shot instruction tuning (8k), and further extending the length of instructions (16k) can further improve the upper bound of scaling in-context learning. 大型预训练语言模型（PLM）已显示出有前景的上下文学习能力。然而，由于骨干变压器架构的原因，现有的 PLM 在扩展到较大的上下文大小时会受到内存和计算成本的瓶颈，导致许多演示示例的指令调整和上下文学习以及远程语言建模尚未得到充分探索。在本研究中，我们提出了一种基于高效变压器机制的远程语言模型 EVALM。 EVALM 每批处理线使用 8k 个令牌进行训练，可以通过外推法测试多达 256k 长度的上下文，是现有 PLM（例如 GPT3）限制的 128 倍。基于 EVALM，我们在指令调优和上下文学习中有效地扩大了示例的大小，以探索更多注释数据的好处边界。在不同任务集上的实验结果表明，EVALM 的准确率平均提高了 4.1%，并且在任务中获得最佳准确率分数的平均长度约为 12k。我们发现，在多镜头指令调整（8k）下，上下文学习可以通过更多演示获得更高的性能，并且进一步扩展指令长度（16k）可以进一步提高上下文学习扩展的上限。 本文提出了一种基于高效Transformer机制的长程语言模型EVALM，旨在解决大规模上下文场景下预训练语言模型的内存和计算瓶颈问题，并探索大量示例对上下文学习效果的影响。 Mukai Li,Shansan Gong,Jiangtao Feng,Yiheng Xu,Jun Zhang,Zhiyong Wu,Lingpeng Kong cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Maciej P. Polak,Shrey Modi,Anna Latosinska,Jinming Zhang,Ching-Wen Wang,Shaonan Wang,Ayan Deep Hazra,Dane Morgan
title: Flexible, Model-Agnostic Method for Materials Data Extraction from Text Using General Purpose Language Models
title_zh: 使用通用语言模型从文本中提取材料数据的灵活的、与模型无关的方法
abstract: Accurate and comprehensive material databases extracted from research papers are crucial for materials science and engineering, but their development requires significant human effort. With large language models (LLMs) transforming the way humans interact with text, LLMs provide an opportunity to revolutionize data extraction. In this study, we demonstrate a simple and efficient method for extracting materials data from full-text research papers leveraging the capabilities of LLMs combined with human supervision. This approach is particularly suitable for mid-sized databases and requires minimal to no coding or prior knowledge about the extracted property. It offers high recall and nearly perfect precision in the resulting database. The method is easily adaptable to new and superior language models, ensuring continued utility. We show this by evaluating and comparing its performance on GPT-3 and GPT-3.5/4 (which underlie ChatGPT), as well as free alternatives such as BART and DeBERTaV3. We provide a detailed analysis of the method's performance in extracting sentences containing bulk modulus data, achieving up to 90% precision at 96% recall, depending on the amount of human effort involved. We further demonstrate the method's broader effectiveness by developing a database of critical cooling rates for metallic glasses over twice the size of previous human curated databases.

It offers high recall and nearly perfect precision in the resulting database. The method is easily adaptable to new and superior language models, ensuring continued utility. We show this by evaluating and comparing its performance on GPT-3 and GPT-3.5/4 (which underlie ChatGPT), as well as free alternatives such as BART and DeBERTaV3. We provide a detailed analysis of the method's performance in extracting sentences containing bulk modulus data, achieving up to 90% precision at 96% recall, depending on the amount of human effort involved. We further demonstrate the method's broader effectiveness by developing a database of critical cooling rates for metallic glasses over twice the size of previous human curated databases.
abstract_zh: 从研究论文中提取的准确而全面的材料数据库对于材料科学和工程至关重要，但其开发需要大量的人力。随着大型语言模型 (LLM) 改变了人类与文本交互的方式，LLM 提供了彻底改变数据提取的机会。在这项研究中，我们展示了一种简单有效的方法，利用法学硕士的能力与人工监督相结合，从全文研究论文中提取材料数据。这种方法特别适合中型数据库，并且需要很少甚至不需要编码或有关提取属性的先验知识。它在结果数据库中提供了高召回率和近乎完美的精确度。该方法很容易适应新的、更先进的语言模型，确保持续的实用性。我们通过评估和比较其在 GPT-3 和 GPT-3.5/4（ChatGPT 的基础）以及免费替代品（例如 BART 和 DeBERTaV3）上的性能来展示这一点。我们对该方法在提取包含体积模量数据的句子方面的性能进行了详细分析，根据所涉及的人力工作量，实现了高达 90% 的精确度和 96% 的召回率。我们通过开发金属玻璃临界冷却速率数据库，其大小是之前人类管理数据库的两倍以上，进一步证明了该方法的更广泛有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于通用语言模型的灵活且模型无关的方法，用于从文本中提取材料数据。
AI.motivation: 构建准确的材料数据库需要大量人工工作，而大型语言模型（LLMs）为自动化数据提取提供了新机遇。
AI.method: 结合LLMs与人工监督，无需编码或领域知识，通过调整模型参数和人类校验实现高效数据提取。
AI.result: 在提取体积模量数据时达到90%精度和96%召回率，并构建出两倍于人工数据库规模的金属玻璃临界冷却率数据库。
AI.conclusion: 该方法具有高适应性与扩展性，可适用于不同语言模型及新型材料数据提取任务。

authors_text: Allen Z. Ren,Hongkai Dai,Benjamin Burchfiel,Anirudha Majumdar
title: AdaptSim: Task-Driven Simulation Adaptation for Sim-to-Real Transfer
title_zh: AdaptSim：用于模拟到真实传输的任务驱动模拟适应
abstract: Simulation parameter settings such as contact models and object geometry approximations are critical to training robust robotic policies capable of transferring from simulation to real-world deployment. Previous approaches typically handcraft distributions over such parameters (domain randomization), or identify parameters that best match the dynamics of the real environment (system identification). However, there is often an irreducible gap between simulation and reality: attempting to match the dynamics between simulation and reality across all states and tasks may be infeasible and may not lead to policies that perform well in reality for a specific task. Addressing this issue, we propose AdaptSim, a new task-driven adaptation framework for sim-to-real transfer that aims to optimize task performance in target (real) environments -- instead of matching dynamics between simulation and reality. First, we meta-learn an adaptation policy in simulation using reinforcement learning for adjusting the simulation parameter distribution based on the current policy's performance in a target environment. We then perform iterative real-world adaptation by inferring new simulation parameter distributions for policy training, using a small amount of real data. We perform experiments in three robotic tasks: (1) swing-up of linearized double pendulum, (2) dynamic table-top pushing of a bottle, and (3) dynamic scooping of food pieces with a spatula. Our extensive simulation and hardware experiments demonstrate AdaptSim achieving 1-3x asymptotic performance and $\sim$2x real data efficiency when adapting to different environments, compared to methods based on Sys-ID and directly training the task policy in target environments. Website: https://irom-lab.github.io/AdaptSim/
summary: Simulation parameter settings such as contact models and object geometry approximations are critical to training robust robotic policies capable of transferring from simulation to real-world deployment. Previous approaches typically handcraft distributions over such parameters (domain randomization), or identify parameters that best match the dynamics of the real environment (system identification). However, there is often an irreducible gap between simulation and reality: attempting to match the dynamics between simulation and reality across all states and tasks may be infeasible and may not lead to policies that perform well in reality for a specific task. Addressing this issue, we propose AdaptSim, a new task-driven adaptation framework for sim-to-real transfer that aims to optimize task performance in target (real) environments -- instead of matching dynamics between simulation and reality. First, we meta-learn an adaptation policy in simulation using reinforcement learning for adjusting the simulation parameter distribution based on the current policy's performance in a target environment. We then perform iterative real-world adaptation by inferring new simulation parameter distributions for policy training, using a small amount of real data. We perform experiments in three robotic tasks: (1) swing-up of linearized double pendulum, (2) dynamic table-top pushing of a bottle, and (3) dynamic scooping of food pieces with a spatula. Our extensive simulation and hardware experiments demonstrate AdaptSim achieving 1-3x asymptotic performance and $\sim$2x real data efficiency when adapting to different environments, compared to methods based on Sys-ID and directly training the task policy in target environments. Website: https://irom-lab.github.io/AdaptSim/
abstract_zh: 接触模型和物体几何近似等模拟参数设置对于训练能够从模拟转移到现实世界部署的稳健机器人策略至关重要。以前的方法通常会手工处理这些参数的分布（域随机化），或识别与真实环境动态最匹配的参数（系统识别）。然而，模拟与现实之间通常存在不可缩小的差距：试图在所有状态和任务中匹配模拟与现实之间的动态可能是不可行的，并且可能不会导致在现实中针对特定任务表现良好的策略。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 AdaptSim，这是一种用于模拟到真实传输的新任务驱动适应框架，旨在优化目标（真实）环境中的任务性能，而不是匹配模拟与现实之间的动态。首先，我们使用强化学习来元学习模拟中的适应策略，以便根据当前策略在目标环境中的表现来调整模拟参数分布。然后，我们使用少量真实数据，通过推断用于策略训练的新模拟参数分布来执行迭代现实世界适应。我们在三个机器人任务中进行了实验：（1）线性双摆的摆动，（2）动态桌面推动瓶子，以及（3）用抹刀动态舀食物。我们大量的仿真和硬件实验表明，与基于 Sys-ID 并直接在目标环境中训练任务策略的方法相比，AdaptSim 在适应不同环境时实现了 1-3 倍的渐近性能和 $\sim$2 倍的真实数据效率。网站：https://irom-lab.github.io/AdaptSim/

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaptSim框架，通过任务驱动的仿真参数优化，解决仿真到现实的机器人策略迁移问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过域随机化或系统辨识匹配仿真与现实动态，但存在不可约减的差距，且难以针对特定任务优化策略性能。
AI.method: 在仿真中通过强化学习元学习调整参数分布，基于目标环境策略性能进行迭代优化，并利用少量真实数据进行现实环境适应。
AI.result: 在三个机器人任务中，AdaptSim相比系统辨识和直接训练方法，实现1-3倍性能提升和约2倍真实数据效率。
AI.conclusion: AdaptSim通过聚焦任务性能而非动态匹配，有效提升仿真到现实的迁移效率，减少对真实数据的依赖。

We perform experiments in three robotic tasks: (1) swing-up of linearized double pendulum, (2) dynamic table-top pushing of a bottle, and (3) dynamic scooping of food pieces with a spatula. Our extensive simulation and hardware experiments demonstrate AdaptSim achieving 1-3x asymptotic performance and $\sim$2x real data efficiency when adapting to different environments, compared to methods based on Sys-ID and directly training the task policy in target environments. Website: https://irom-lab.github.io/AdaptSim/ 接触模型和物体几何近似等模拟参数设置对于训练能够从模拟转移到现实世界部署的稳健机器人策略至关重要。以前的方法通常会手工处理这些参数的分布（域随机化），或识别与真实环境动态最匹配的参数（系统识别）。然而，模拟与现实之间通常存在不可缩小的差距：试图在所有状态和任务中匹配模拟与现实之间的动态可能是不可行的，并且可能不会导致在现实中针对特定任务表现良好的策略。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 AdaptSim，这是一种用于模拟到真实传输的新任务驱动适应框架，旨在优化目标（真实）环境中的任务性能，而不是匹配模拟与现实之间的动态。首先，我们使用强化学习来元学习模拟中的适应策略，以便根据当前策略在目标环境中的表现来调整模拟参数分布。然后，我们使用少量真实数据，通过推断用于策略训练的新模拟参数分布来执行迭代现实世界适应。我们在三个机器人任务中进行了实验：（1）线性双摆的摆动，（2）动态桌面推动瓶子，以及（3）用抹刀动态舀食物。我们大量的仿真和硬件实验表明，与基于 Sys-ID 并直接在目标环境中训练任务策略的方法相比，AdaptSim 在适应不同环境时实现了 1-3 倍的渐近性能和 $\sim$2 倍的真实数据效率。网站：https://irom-lab.github.io/AdaptSim/ 本文提出AdaptSim框架，通过任务驱动的仿真参数优化，解决仿真到现实的机器人策略迁移问题。 Allen Z. Ren,Hongkai Dai,Benjamin Burchfiel,Anirudha Majumdar cs.RO,cs.LG,eess.SY

authors_text: Duy-Thanh Nguyen,Abhiroop Bhattacharjee,Abhishek Moitra,Priyadarshini Panda
title: DeepCAM: A Fully CAM-based Inference Accelerator with Variable Hash Lengths for Energy-efficient Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: DeepCAM：完全基于 CAM 的推理加速器，具有可变哈希长度，适用于节能深度神经网络
comment: Accepted to Design, Automation and Test in Europe (DATE) Conference, 2023
comments: Accepted to Design, Automation and Test in Europe (DATE) Conference, 2023
abstract: With ever increasing depth and width in deep neural networks to achieve state-of-the-art performance, deep learning computation has significantly grown, and dot-products remain dominant in overall computation time. Most prior works are built on conventional dot-product where weighted input summation is used to represent the neuron operation. However, another implementation of dot-product based on the notion of angles and magnitudes in the Euclidean space has attracted limited attention. This paper proposes DeepCAM, an inference accelerator built on two critical innovations to alleviate the computation time bottleneck of convolutional neural networks. The first innovation is an approximate dot-product built on computations in the Euclidean space that can replace addition and multiplication with simple bit-wise operations. The second innovation is a dynamic size content addressable memory-based (CAM-based) accelerator to perform bit-wise operations and accelerate the CNNs with a lower computation time. Our experiments on benchmark image recognition datasets demonstrate that DeepCAM is up to 523x and 3498x faster than Eyeriss and traditional CPUs like Intel Skylake, respectively. Furthermore, the energy consumed by our DeepCAM approach is 2.16x to 109x less compared to Eyeriss.
summary: With ever increasing depth and width in deep neural networks to achieve state-of-the-art performance, deep learning computation has significantly grown, and dot-products remain dominant in overall computation time. Most prior works are built on conventional dot-product where weighted input summation is used to represent the neuron operation. However, another implementation of dot-product based on the notion of angles and magnitudes in the Euclidean space has attracted limited attention. This paper proposes DeepCAM, an inference accelerator built on two critical innovations to alleviate the computation time bottleneck of convolutional neural networks. The first innovation is an approximate dot-product built on computations in the Euclidean space that can replace addition and multiplication with simple bit-wise operations. The second innovation is a dynamic size content addressable memory-based (CAM-based) accelerator to perform bit-wise operations and accelerate the CNNs with a lower computation time. Our experiments on benchmark image recognition datasets demonstrate that DeepCAM is up to 523x and 3498x faster than Eyeriss and traditional CPUs like Intel Skylake, respectively. Furthermore, the energy consumed by our DeepCAM approach is 2.16x to 109x less compared to Eyeriss.
abstract_zh: 随着深度神经网络的深度和宽度不断增加以实现最先进的性能，深度学习计算显着增长，并且点积在整体计算时间中仍然占主导地位。大多数先前的工作都是基于传统的点积，其中加权输入求和用于表示神经元操作。然而，基于欧几里德空间中角度和大小概念的点积的另一种实现引起了有限的关注。本文提出了 DeepCAM，这是一种基于两项关键创新的推理加速器，旨在缓解卷积神经网络的计算时间瓶颈。第一项创新是基于欧几里得空间中的计算构建的近似点积，它可以用简单的按位运算代替加法和乘法。第二项创新是基于动态大小内容可寻址内存（基于 CAM）的加速器，用于执行按位运算并以较短的计算时间加速 CNN。我们在基准图像识别数据集上进行的实验表明，DeepCAM 的速度分别比 Eyeriss 和 Intel Skylake 等传统 CPU 快 523 倍和 3498 倍。此外，与 Eyeriss 相比，我们的 DeepCAM 方法消耗的能量减少了 2.16 倍至 109 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepCAM，一种基于内容可寻址存储器（CAM）的推理加速器，通过欧几里得空间计算和动态哈希长度设计，提升卷积神经网络的能效与计算速度。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习计算依赖加法乘法的点积运算，导致高能耗与长计算时间；而基于欧几里得空间的角度-幅度计算方法未被充分探索，需设计新型加速架构。
AI.method: 提出两种创新：1）用位运算替代加乘法的近似点积算法；2）基于动态哈希长度的CAM加速器，通过位操作加速CNN计算。
AI.result: 在图像识别基准测试中，DeepCAM相较Eyeriss快523倍，较Intel Skylake CPU快3498倍，能耗降低2.16至109倍。
AI.conclusion: DeepCAM通过欧几里得空间计算与CAM架构有效缓解CNN计算瓶颈，在能效与速度上显著优于现有方案。

However, another implementation of dot-product based on the notion of angles and magnitudes in the Euclidean space has attracted limited attention. authors_text: Andriy Dmytruk,Giuseppe Silano,Davide Bicego,Daniel Bonilla Licea,Martin Saska
title: A Perception-Aware NMPC for Vision-Based Target Tracking and Collision Avoidance with a Multi-Rotor UAV
title_zh: 用于多旋翼无人机基于视觉的目标跟踪和避免碰撞的感知感知 NMPC
abstract: A perception-aware Nonlinear Model Predictive Control (NMPC) strategy aimed at performing vision-based target tracking and collision avoidance with a multi-rotor aerial vehicle is presented in this paper. The proposed control strategy considers both realistic actuation limits at the torque level and visual perception constraints to enforce the visibility coverage of a target while complying with the mission objectives. Furthermore, the approach allows to safely navigate in a workspace area populated by dynamic obstacles with a ballistic motion. The formulation is meant to be generic and set upon a large class of multi-rotor vehicles that covers both coplanar designs like quadrotors as well as fully-actuated platforms with tilted propellers. The feasibility and effectiveness of the control strategy are demonstrated via closed-loop simulations achieved in MATLAB.
summary: A perception-aware Nonlinear Model Predictive Control (NMPC) strategy aimed at performing vision-based target tracking and collision avoidance with a multi-rotor aerial vehicle is presented in this paper. The proposed control strategy considers both realistic actuation limits at the torque level and visual perception constraints to enforce the visibility coverage of a target while complying with the mission objectives. Furthermore, the approach allows to safely navigate in a workspace area populated by dynamic obstacles with a ballistic motion. The formulation is meant to be generic and set upon a large class of multi-rotor vehicles that covers both coplanar designs like quadrotors as well as fully-actuated platforms with tilted propellers. The feasibility and effectiveness of the control strategy are demonstrated via closed-loop simulations achieved in MATLAB.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种感知感知的非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）策略，旨在利用多旋翼飞行器执行基于视觉的目标跟踪和防撞。所提出的控制策略考虑了扭矩水平的实际驱动限制和视觉感知约束，以在遵守任务目标的同时增强目标的可见度覆盖范围。此外，该方法允许在充满动态障碍物和弹道运动的工作区域中安全地导航。该公式是通用的，适用于一大类多旋翼飞行器，涵盖四旋翼等共面设计以及带有倾斜螺旋桨的全驱动平台。通过 MATLAB 中的闭环仿真证明了该控制策略的可行性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合感知约束的非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）策略，用于多旋翼无人机的视觉目标跟踪与避障。
AI.motivation: 现有控制方法未能有效平衡执行器物理限制与视觉感知约束，导致动态环境中目标跟踪与避障性能不足。
AI.method: 设计感知感知的NMPC框架，整合扭矩级执行限制与视觉覆盖约束，适用于多种多旋翼无人机结构，并通过MATLAB闭环仿真验证。
AI.result: 仿真结果验证了该策略在动态障碍物环境中实现安全导航、目标可见性维持及任务目标达成的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的通用控制方法为多旋翼无人机在复杂动态场景中的自主导航提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Lyubomyr Demkiv,Massimiliano Ruffo,Giuseppe Silano,Jan Bednar,Martin Saska
title: An Application of Stereo Thermal Vision for Preliminary Inspection of Electrical Power Lines by MAVs
title_zh: 立体热视觉在 MAV 电力线路初步检查中的应用
abstract: An application of stereo thermal vision to perform preliminary inspection operations of electrical power lines by a particular class of small Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs), aka Micro Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (MAVs), is presented in this paper. The proposed hardware and software setup allows the detection of overheated power equipment, one of the major causes of power outages. The stereo vision complements the GPS information by finely detecting the potential source of damage while also providing a measure of the harm extension. The reduced sizes and the light weight of the vehicle enable to survey areas otherwise difficult to access with standard UAVs. Gazebo simulations and real flight experiments demonstrate the feasibility and effectiveness of the proposed setup.
summary: An application of stereo thermal vision to perform preliminary inspection operations of electrical power lines by a particular class of small Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs), aka Micro Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (MAVs), is presented in this paper. The proposed hardware and software setup allows the detection of overheated power equipment, one of the major causes of power outages. The stereo vision complements the GPS information by finely detecting the potential source of damage while also providing a measure of the harm extension. The reduced sizes and the light weight of the vehicle enable to survey areas otherwise difficult to access with standard UAVs. Gazebo simulations and real flight experiments demonstrate the feasibility and effectiveness of the proposed setup.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了立体热视觉应用，通过特定类别的小型无人机（UAV）（又名微型无人机（MAV））对电力线路进行初步检查操作。所提出的硬件和软件设置可以检测过热的电力设备，这是停电的主要原因之一。立体视觉通过精细检测潜在的损害源来补充 GPS 信息，同时还提供损害范围的测量。车辆尺寸减小且重量轻，使得能够勘测标准无人机难以进入的区域。 Gazebo 模拟和真实飞行实验证明了所提出的设置的可行性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合立体热成像技术与微型无人机（MAVs）的电力线路初步检测方法，用于识别过热设备并评估损害范围。
AI.motivation: 电力设备过热是导致停电的主要原因，传统检测方法存在覆盖范围和灵活性的局限，需更高效的检测手段。
AI.method: 采用立体热成像系统与微型无人机（MAVs）结合，通过GPS辅助定位，利用视觉检测识别过热设备，并评估损害范围。
AI.result: 仿真与实际飞行实验验证了该方法在检测过热设备及评估损害范围方面的有效性与可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为电力线路检测提供了有效且灵活的解决方案，尤其适用于传统手段难以覆盖的区域。

search_text: An Application of Stereo Thermal Vision for Preliminary Inspection of Electrical Power Lines by MAVs 立体热视觉在 MAV 电力线路初步检查中的应用 An application of stereo thermal vision to perform preliminary inspection operations of electrical power lines by a particular class of small Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs), aka Micro Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (MAVs), is presented in this paper. The proposed hardware and software setup allows the detection of overheated power equipment, one of the major causes of power outages. The stereo vision complements the GPS information by finely detecting the potential source of damage while also providing a measure of the harm extension. The reduced sizes and the light weight of the vehicle enable to survey areas otherwise difficult to access with standard UAVs. Gazebo simulations and real flight experiments demonstrate the feasibility and effectiveness of the proposed setup. 本文介绍了立体热视觉应用，通过特定类别的小型无人机（UAV）（又名微型无人机（MAV））对电力线路进行初步检查操作。所提出的硬件和软件设置可以检测过热的电力设备，这是停电的主要原因之一。立体视觉通过精细检测潜在的损害源来补充 GPS 信息，同时还提供损害范围的测量。车辆尺寸减小且重量轻，使得能够勘测标准无人机难以进入的区域。 Gazebo 模拟和真实飞行实验证明了所提出的设置的可行性和有效性。 本文提出了一种结合立体热成像技术与微型无人机（MAVs）的电力线路初步检测方法，用于识别过热设备并评估损害范围。 Lyubomyr Demkiv,Massimiliano Ruffo,Giuseppe Silano,Jan Bednar,Martin Saska cs.RO

authors_text: David Stein,Silvia Di Gregorio,Bjoern Andres
title: Partial Optimality in Cubic Correlation Clustering
title_zh: 三次相关聚类中的部分最优性
abstract: The higher-order correlation clustering problem is an expressive model, and recently, local search heuristics have been proposed for several applications. Certifying optimality, however, is NP-hard and practically hampered already by the complexity of the problem statement. Here, we focus on establishing partial optimality conditions for the special case of complete graphs and cubic objective functions. In addition, we define and implement algorithms for testing these conditions and examine their effect numerically, on two datasets.
summary: The higher-order correlation clustering problem is an expressive model, and recently, local search heuristics have been proposed for several applications. Certifying optimality, however, is NP-hard and practically hampered already by the complexity of the problem statement. Here, we focus on establishing partial optimality conditions for the special case of complete graphs and cubic objective functions. In addition, we define and implement algorithms for testing these conditions and examine their effect numerically, on two datasets.
abstract_zh: 高阶相关聚类问题是一种表达模型，最近，局部搜索启发法已被提出用于多种应用。然而，证明最优性是 NP 困难的，并且实际上已经受到问题陈述的复杂性的阻碍。在这里，我们重点关注为完全图和三次目标函数的特殊情况建立部分最优条件。此外，我们定义并实现了用于测试这些条件的算法，并在两个数据集上以数值方式检查它们的影响。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了高阶相关聚类问题中部分最优条件的建立与验证，特别是在完全图和三次目标函数的情况。
AI.motivation: 高阶相关聚类问题虽然表达能力强，但验证最优性是NP难的，且由于问题本身的复杂性，在实践中受到限制。因此，论文试图为完全图和三次目标函数的情况建立部分最优条件。
AI.method: 论文定义并实现了一组用于测试这些部分最优条件的算法，并在两个数据集上进行了数值实验。
AI.result: 论文通过数值实验验证了所提出的部分最优条件的有效性，并展示了这些条件在实际数据集上的应用效果。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为高阶相关聚类问题提供了一种在完全图和三次目标函数下验证部分最优性的方法，并通过实验验证了其可行性。

authors_text: Akhil Bagaria,Ray Jiang,Ramana Kumar,Tom Schaul
title: Scaling Goal-based Exploration via Pruning Proto-goals
title_zh: 通过修剪原始目标来扩展基于目标的探索
abstract: One of the gnarliest challenges in reinforcement learning (RL) is exploration that scales to vast domains, where novelty-, or coverage-seeking behaviour falls short. Goal-directed, purposeful behaviours are able to overcome this, but rely on a good goal space. The core challenge in goal discovery is finding the right balance between generality (not hand-crafted) and tractability (useful, not too many). Our approach explicitly seeks the middle ground, enabling the human designer to specify a vast but meaningful proto-goal space, and an autonomous discovery process to refine this to a narrower space of controllable, reachable, novel, and relevant goals. The effectiveness of goal-conditioned exploration with the latter is then demonstrated in three challenging environments.
summary: One of the gnarliest challenges in reinforcement learning (RL) is exploration that scales to vast domains, where novelty-, or coverage-seeking behaviour falls short. Goal-directed, purposeful behaviours are able to overcome this, but rely on a good goal space. The core challenge in goal discovery is finding the right balance between generality (not hand-crafted) and tractability (useful, not too many). Our approach explicitly seeks the middle ground, enabling the human designer to specify a vast but meaningful proto-goal space, and an autonomous discovery process to refine this to a narrower space of controllable, reachable, novel, and relevant goals. The effectiveness of goal-conditioned exploration with the latter is then demonstrated in three challenging environments.
abstract_zh: 强化学习 (RL) 中最棘手的挑战之一是扩展到广阔领域的探索，而在这些领域中，寻求新颖性或覆盖范围的行为是不够的。以目标为导向、有目的的行为能够克服这一点，但依赖于良好的目标空间。目标发现的核心挑战是在通用性（不是手工制作）和易处理性（有用，但不是太多）之间找到适当的平衡。我们的方法明确寻求中间立场，使人类设计师能够指定一个巨大但有意义的原始目标空间，以及一个自主发现过程，将其细化为可控、可达到、新颖和相关目标的更窄空间。然后在三个具有挑战性的环境中证明了后者的目标条件探索的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过修剪原初目标空间来提升强化学习中大规模领域探索效率的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统基于新颖性或覆盖率的探索策略难以应对大规模领域，而目标导向行为虽有效但依赖合适的目标空间，如何在通用性与可操作性间取得平衡是核心挑战。
AI.method: 由人类定义广阔但有意义的原初目标空间，通过自主发现机制筛选出可控、可达、新颖且相关的子目标集，用于指导探索过程。
AI.result: 在三个复杂环境中验证了该方法相较于基线策略在目标可达性和探索效率上的显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为大规模强化学习提供了可扩展的目标发现框架，平衡了目标空间的泛化能力与实际可用性。

authors_text: Giuseppe Silano,Tomas Baca,Robert Penicka,Davide Liuzza,Martin Saska
title: Power Line Inspection Tasks with Multi-Aerial Robot Systems via Signal Temporal Logic Specifications
title_zh: 通过信号时序逻辑规范使用多空中机器人系统执行电力线路检查任务
abstract: A framework for computing feasible and constrained trajectories for a fleet of quad-rotors leveraging on Signal Temporal Logic (STL) specifications for power line inspection tasks is proposed in this paper. The planner allows the formulation of complex missions that avoid obstacles and maintain a safe distance between drones while performing the planned mission. An optimization problem is set to generate optimal strategies that satisfy these specifications and also take vehicle constraints into account. Further, an event-triggered replanner is proposed to reply to unforeseen events and external disturbances. An energy minimization term is also considered to implicitly save quad-rotors battery life while carrying out the mission. Numerical simulations in MATLAB and experimental results show the validity and the effectiveness of the proposed approach, and demonstrate its applicability in real-world scenarios.
summary: A framework for computing feasible and constrained trajectories for a fleet of quad-rotors leveraging on Signal Temporal Logic (STL) specifications for power line inspection tasks is proposed in this paper. The planner allows the formulation of complex missions that avoid obstacles and maintain a safe distance between drones while performing the planned mission. An optimization problem is set to generate optimal strategies that satisfy these specifications and also take vehicle constraints into account. Further, an event-triggered replanner is proposed to reply to unforeseen events and external disturbances. An energy minimization term is also considered to implicitly save quad-rotors battery life while carrying out the mission. Numerical simulations in MATLAB and experimental results show the validity and the effectiveness of the proposed approach, and demonstrate its applicability in real-world scenarios.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种利用信号时态逻辑（STL）规范来计算四旋翼机队可行且受约束的轨迹的框架，用于电力线路检查任务。规划器允许制定复杂的任务，在执行计划任务时避开障碍物并保持无人机之间的安全距离。设置优化问题来生成满足这些规范并考虑车辆约束的最佳策略。此外，提出了事件触发的重新规划器来应对不可预见的事件和外部干扰。能量最小化项也被认为可以在执行任务时隐式地节省四旋翼电池的寿命。 MATLAB中的数值模拟和实验结果表明了该方法的有效性和有效性，并证明了其在实际场景中的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于信号时间逻辑（STL）规范的框架，用于多旋翼无人机在电力线路巡检任务中的轨迹规划与优化。
AI.motivation: 传统无人机编队规划难以兼顾复杂任务约束、动态避障及能量效率，亟需一种能处理多目标、多约束的系统化方法。
AI.method: 通过STL规范建模任务约束，构建考虑车辆动力学和安全距离的优化问题，并设计事件触发的再规划机制与能量最小化目标函数。
AI.result: MATLAB仿真与实验验证了方法在动态避障、安全编队及能耗控制方面的有效性，证明其在实际场景中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为多无人机复杂任务规划提供了系统性解决方案，在满足安全与约束的同时提升了任务效率和能源利用率。

search_text: Power Line Inspection Tasks with Multi-Aerial Robot Systems via Signal Temporal Logic Specifications 通过信号时序逻辑规范使用多空中机器人系统执行电力线路检查任务 A framework for computing feasible and constrained trajectories for a fleet of quad-rotors leveraging on Signal Temporal Logic (STL) specifications for power line inspection tasks is proposed in this paper. The planner allows the formulation of complex missions that avoid obstacles and maintain a safe distance between drones while performing the planned mission. An optimization problem is set to generate optimal strategies that satisfy these specifications and also take vehicle constraints into account. Further, an event-triggered replanner is proposed to reply to unforeseen events and external disturbances. An energy minimization term is also considered to implicitly save quad-rotors battery life while carrying out the mission. Numerical simulations in MATLAB and experimental results show the validity and the effectiveness of the proposed approach, and demonstrate its applicability in real-world scenarios. 本文提出了一种利用信号时态逻辑（STL）规范来计算四旋翼机队可行且受约束的轨迹的框架，用于电力线路检查任务。规划器允许制定复杂的任务，在执行计划任务时避开障碍物并保持无人机之间的安全距离。设置优化问题来生成满足这些规范并考虑车辆约束的最佳策略。此外，提出了事件触发的重新规划器来应对不可预见的事件和外部干扰。能量最小化项也被认为可以在执行任务时隐式地节省四旋翼电池的寿命。 MATLAB中的数值模拟和实验结果表明了该方法的有效性和有效性，并证明了其在实际场景中的适用性。 本文提出一种基于信号时间逻辑（STL）规范的框架，用于多旋翼无人机在电力线路巡检任务中的轨迹规划与优化。 Giuseppe Silano,Tomas Baca,Robert Penicka,Davide Liuzza,Martin Saska cs.RO,cs.MA

authors_text: Fabian Spaeh,Charalampos E. Tsourakakis
title: Learning Mixtures of Markov Chains with Quality Guarantees
title_zh: 具有质量保证的马尔可夫链的学习混合
abstract: A large number of modern applications ranging from listening songs online and browsing the Web to using a navigation app on a smartphone generate a plethora of user trails. Clustering such trails into groups with a common sequence pattern can reveal significant structure in human behavior that can lead to improving user experience through better recommendations, and even prevent suicides [LMCR14]. One approach to modeling this problem mathematically is as a mixture of Markov chains. Recently, Gupta, Kumar and Vassilvitski [GKV16] introduced an algorithm (GKV-SVD) based on the singular value decomposition (SVD) that under certain conditions can perfectly recover a mixture of L chains on n states, given only the distribution of trails of length 3 (3-trail). In this work we contribute to the problem of unmixing Markov chains by highlighting and addressing two important constraints of the GKV-SVD algorithm [GKV16]: some chains in the mixture may not even be weakly connected, and secondly in practice one does not know beforehand the true number of chains. We resolve these issues in the Gupta et al. paper [GKV16]. Specifically, we propose an algebraic criterion that enables us to choose a value of L efficiently that avoids overfitting. Furthermore, we design a reconstruction algorithm that outputs the true mixture in the presence of disconnected chains and is robust to noise. We complement our theoretical results with experiments on both synthetic and real data, where we observe that our method outperforms the GKV-SVD algorithm. Finally, we empirically observe that combining an EM-algorithm with our method performs best in practice, both in terms of reconstruction error with respect to the distribution of 3-trails and the mixture of Markov Chains.
summary: A large number of modern applications ranging from listening songs online and browsing the Web to using a navigation app on a smartphone generate a plethora of user trails. Clustering such trails into groups with a common sequence pattern can reveal significant structure in human behavior that can lead to improving user experience through better recommendations, and even prevent suicides [LMCR14]. One approach to modeling this problem mathematically is as a mixture of Markov chains. Recently, Gupta, Kumar and Vassilvitski [GKV16] introduced an algorithm (GKV-SVD) based on the singular value decomposition (SVD) that under certain conditions can perfectly recover a mixture of L chains on n states, given only the distribution of trails of length 3 (3-trail). In this work we contribute to the problem of unmixing Markov chains by highlighting and addressing two important constraints of the GKV-SVD algorithm [GKV16]: some chains in the mixture may not even be weakly connected, and secondly in practice one does not know beforehand the true number of chains. We resolve these issues in the Gupta et al. paper [GKV16]. Specifically, we propose an algebraic criterion that enables us to choose a value of L efficiently that avoids overfitting. Furthermore, we design a reconstruction algorithm that outputs the true mixture in the presence of disconnected chains and is robust to noise. We complement our theoretical results with experiments on both synthetic and real data, where we observe that our method outperforms the GKV-SVD algorithm. Finally, we empirically observe that combining an EM-algorithm with our method performs best in practice, both in terms of reconstruction error with respect to the distribution of 3-trails and the mixture of Markov Chains.
abstract_zh: 从在线听歌曲、浏览网页到使用智能手机上的导航应用程序，大量现代应用程序生成了大量的用户轨迹。将这些踪迹聚类成具有共同序列模式的组可以揭示人类行为的重要结构，从而可以通过更好的推荐来改善用户体验，甚至可以防止自杀[LMCR14]。对这个问题进行数学建模的一种方法是混合马尔可夫链。最近，Gupta、Kumar 和 Vassilvitski [GKV16] 引入了一种基于奇异值分解（SVD）的算法（GKV-SVD），该算法在某些条件下可以完美地恢复 n 个状态上的 L 链的混合，仅给出长度为 3 的轨迹（3-trail）的分布。在这项工作中，我们通过强调和解决 GKV-SVD 算法 [GKV16] 的两个重要约束来解决马尔可夫链的分解问题：混合中的某些链甚至可能不是弱连接的，其次在实践中人们事先不知道链的真实数量。我们在 Gupta 等人的论文中解决了这些问题。论文[GKV16]。具体来说，我们提出了一种代数准则，使我们能够有效地选择 L 值，避免过度拟合。此外，我们设计了一种重建算法，可以在存在断开链的情况下输出真实的混合物，并且对噪声具有鲁棒性。我们通过对合成数据和真实数据的实验来补充我们的理论结果，我们观察到我们的方法优于 GKV-SVD 算法。最后，我们凭经验观察到，将 EM 算法与我们的方法相结合在实践中表现最佳，无论是在 3 尾迹分布的重构误差方面还是在马尔可夫链的混合方面。

AI.tldr: 提出一种算法解决混合马尔可夫链的分离问题，即使在链不连通且未知数量的情况下也能有效恢复。
AI.motivation: 用户行为轨迹聚类可揭示人类行为模式，优化推荐系统并辅助预防自杀，但现有方法对不连通链和未知数量的处理存在局限。
AI.method: 提出代数准则选择混合链数量L，设计鲁棒重构算法处理不连通链，并结合EM算法提升效果。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据实验中，方法优于GKV-SVD算法，结合EM后重构误差更低。
AI.conclusion: 新方法解决了混合马尔可夫链分离的关键问题，理论分析与实验验证表明其有效性，实际应用中建议结合EM算法。

authors_text: Han Li,Hu Han,S. Kevin Zhou
title: Mixed-order self-paced curriculum learning for universal lesion detection
title_zh: 用于通用病变检测的混合顺序自定进度课程学习
abstract: Self-paced curriculum learning (SCL) has demonstrated its great potential in computer vision, natural language processing, etc. During training, it implements easy-to-hard sampling based on online estimation of data difficulty. Most SCL methods commonly adopt a loss-based strategy of estimating data difficulty and deweighting the `hard' samples in the early training stage. While achieving success in a variety of applications, SCL stills confront two challenges in a medical image analysis task, such as universal lesion detection, featuring insufficient and highly class-imbalanced data: (i) the loss-based difficulty measurer is inaccurate; ii) the hard samples are under-utilized from a deweighting mechanism. To overcome these challenges, in this paper we propose a novel mixed-order self-paced curriculum learning (Mo-SCL) method. We integrate both uncertainty and loss to better estimate difficulty online and mix both hard and easy samples in the same mini-batch to appropriately alleviate the problem of under-utilization of hard samples. We provide a theoretical investigation of our method in the context of stochastic gradient descent optimization and extensive experiments based on the DeepLesion benchmark dataset for universal lesion detection (ULD). When applied to two state-of-the-art ULD methods, the proposed mixed-order SCL method can provide a free boost to lesion detection accuracy without extra special network designs.
summary: Self-paced curriculum learning (SCL) has demonstrated its great potential in computer vision, natural language processing, etc. During training, it implements easy-to-hard sampling based on online estimation of data difficulty. Most SCL methods commonly adopt a loss-based strategy of estimating data difficulty and deweighting the `hard' samples in the early training stage. While achieving success in a variety of applications, SCL stills confront two challenges in a medical image analysis task, such as universal lesion detection, featuring insufficient and highly class-imbalanced data: (i) the loss-based difficulty measurer is inaccurate; ii) the hard samples are under-utilized from a deweighting mechanism. To overcome these challenges, in this paper we propose a novel mixed-order self-paced curriculum learning (Mo-SCL) method. We integrate both uncertainty and loss to better estimate difficulty online and mix both hard and easy samples in the same mini-batch to appropriately alleviate the problem of under-utilization of hard samples. We provide a theoretical investigation of our method in the context of stochastic gradient descent optimization and extensive experiments based on the DeepLesion benchmark dataset for universal lesion detection (ULD). When applied to two state-of-the-art ULD methods, the proposed mixed-order SCL method can provide a free boost to lesion detection accuracy without extra special network designs.
abstract_zh: 自定进度课程学习（SCL）在计算机视觉、自然语言处理等领域展示了其巨大潜力，在训练过程中，基于数据难度的在线估计，实现从易到难的采样。大多数 SCL 方法通常采用基于损失的策略来估计数据难度并在早期训练阶段减轻“困难”样本的权重。虽然在各种应用中取得了成功，但 SCL stills 在医学图像分析任务中面临着两个挑战，例如通用病变检测，其特点是数据不足且类别高度不平衡：（i）基于损失的难度测量器不准确； ii) 减重机制中硬样本的利用不足。为了克服这些挑战，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的混合顺序自定进度课程学习（Mo-SCL）方法。我们整合不确定性和损失来更好地在线估计难度，并将困难样本和简单样本混合在同一个小批量中，以适当缓解困难样本利用不足的问题。我们在随机梯度下降优化的背景下对我们的方法进行了理论研究，并基于用于通用病变检测（ULD）的 DeepLesion 基准数据集进行了广泛的实验。当应用于两种最先进的 ULD 方法时，所提出的混合阶 SCL 方法可以免费提高病变检测精度，而无需额外的特殊网络设计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种混合阶自定步长课程学习方法（Mo-SCL），用于改进医学图像中普遍病变检测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有自定步长课程学习（SCL）方法在医学图像分析任务中面临两个挑战：基于损失的难度估计不准确，以及硬样本因去权重机制未被充分利用。
AI.method: 整合不确定性与损失值以更准确估计样本难度，并在小批量中混合硬样本与易样本，缓解硬样本利用率低的问题。
AI.result: 在DeepLesion基准数据集上实验表明，该方法可为两种先进病变检测模型提供无需额外网络设计的准确率提升。
AI.conclusion: Mo-SCL通过理论分析与实验验证，有效解决了医学图像分析中数据不平衡和难度估计不准确的挑战。

search_text: Mixed-order self-paced curriculum learning for universal lesion detection 用于通用病变检测的混合顺序自定进度课程学习 Self-paced curriculum learning (SCL) has demonstrated its great potential in computer vision, natural language processing, etc. During training, it implements easy-to-hard sampling based on online estimation of data difficulty. Most SCL methods commonly adopt a loss-based strategy of estimating data difficulty and deweighting the `hard' samples in the early training stage. While achieving success in a variety of applications, SCL stills confront two challenges in a medical image analysis task, such as universal lesion detection, featuring insufficient and highly class-imbalanced data: (i) the loss-based difficulty measurer is inaccurate; ii) the hard samples are under-utilized from a deweighting mechanism. To overcome these challenges, in this paper we propose a novel mixed-order self-paced curriculum learning (Mo-SCL) method. We integrate both uncertainty and loss to better estimate difficulty online and mix both hard and easy samples in the same mini-batch to appropriately alleviate the problem of under-utilization of hard samples. We provide a theoretical investigation of our method in the context of stochastic gradient descent optimization and extensive experiments based on the DeepLesion benchmark dataset for universal lesion detection (ULD). When applied to two state-of-the-art ULD methods, the proposed mixed-order SCL method can provide a free boost to lesion detection accuracy without extra special network designs. 自定进度课程学习（SCL）在计算机视觉、自然语言处理等领域展示了其巨大潜力，在训练过程中，基于数据难度的在线估计，实现从易到难的采样。大多数 SCL 方法通常采用基于损失的策略来估计数据难度并在早期训练阶段减轻“困难”样本的权重。虽然在各种应用中取得了成功，但 SCL stills 在医学图像分析任务中面临着两个挑战，例如通用病变检测，其特点是数据不足且类别高度不平衡：（i）基于损失的难度测量器不准确； ii) 减重机制中硬样本的利用不足。为了克服这些挑战，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的混合顺序自定进度课程学习（Mo-SCL）方法。我们整合不确定性和损失来更好地在线估计难度，并将困难样本和简单样本混合在同一个小批量中，以适当缓解困难样本利用不足的问题。我们在随机梯度下降优化的背景下对我们的方法进行了理论研究，并基于用于通用病变检测（ULD）的 DeepLesion 基准数据集进行了广泛的实验。当应用于两种最先进的 ULD 方法时，所提出的混合阶 SCL 方法可以免费提高病变检测精度，而无需额外的特殊网络设计。 本文提出了一种混合阶自定步长课程学习方法（Mo-SCL），用于改进医学图像中普遍病变检测的准确性。 Han Li,Hu Han,S. Kevin Zhou cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Mozhgan Pourkeshavarz,Shahabedin Nabavi,Mohsen Ebrahimi Moghaddam,Mehrnoush Shamsfard
title: Stacked Cross-modal Feature Consolidation Attention Networks for Image Captioning
title_zh: 用于图像描述的堆叠式跨模态特征合并注意网络
comment: ef:Multimedia Tools and Applications, Volume 83, pages 12209-12233, 2024
comments: ef:Multimedia Tools and Applications, Volume 83, pages 12209-12233, 2024
abstract: Recently, the attention-enriched encoder-decoder framework has aroused great interest in image captioning due to its overwhelming progress. Many visual attention models directly leverage meaningful regions to generate image descriptions. However, seeking a direct transition from visual space to text is not enough to generate fine-grained captions. This paper exploits a feature-compounding approach to bring together high-level semantic concepts and visual information regarding the contextual environment fully end-to-end. Thus, we propose a stacked cross-modal feature consolidation (SCFC) attention network for image captioning in which we simultaneously consolidate cross-modal features through a novel compounding function in a multi-step reasoning fashion. Besides, we jointly employ spatial information and context-aware attributes (CAA) as the principal components in our proposed compounding function, where our CAA provides a concise context-sensitive semantic representation. To make better use of consolidated features potential, we further propose an SCFC-LSTM as the caption generator, which can leverage discriminative semantic information through the caption generation process. The experimental results indicate that our proposed SCFC can outperform various state-of-the-art image captioning benchmarks in terms of popular metrics on the MSCOCO and Flickr30K datasets.
summary: Recently, the attention-enriched encoder-decoder framework has aroused great interest in image captioning due to its overwhelming progress. Many visual attention models directly leverage meaningful regions to generate image descriptions. However, seeking a direct transition from visual space to text is not enough to generate fine-grained captions. This paper exploits a feature-compounding approach to bring together high-level semantic concepts and visual information regarding the contextual environment fully end-to-end. Thus, we propose a stacked cross-modal feature consolidation (SCFC) attention network for image captioning in which we simultaneously consolidate cross-modal features through a novel compounding function in a multi-step reasoning fashion. Besides, we jointly employ spatial information and context-aware attributes (CAA) as the principal components in our proposed compounding function, where our CAA provides a concise context-sensitive semantic representation. To make better use of consolidated features potential, we further propose an SCFC-LSTM as the caption generator, which can leverage discriminative semantic information through the caption generation process. The experimental results indicate that our proposed SCFC can outperform various state-of-the-art image captioning benchmarks in terms of popular metrics on the MSCOCO and Flickr30K datasets.
abstract_zh: 最近，备受关注的编码器-解码器框架由于其巨大的进步引起了人们对图像字幕的极大兴趣。许多视觉注意力模型直接利用有意义的区域来生成图像描述。然而，寻求从视觉空间到文本的直接过渡不足以生成细粒度的字幕。本文利用特征复合方法将有关上下文环境的高级语义概念和视觉信息完全端到端地结合在一起。因此，我们提出了一种用于图像字幕的堆叠式跨模态特征合并（SCFC）注意网络，其中我们通过一种新颖的复合函数以多步骤推理方式同时合并跨模态特征。此外，我们共同采用空间信息和上下文感知属性（CAA）作为我们提出的复合函数的主要组成部分，其中我们的 CAA 提供了简洁的上下文敏感语义表示。为了更好地利用合并特征的潜力，我们进一步提出 SCFC-LSTM 作为标题生成器，它可以通过标题生成过程利用判别性语义信息。实验结果表明，我们提出的 SCFC 在 MSCOCO 和 Flickr30K 数据集上的流行指标方面可以超越各种最先进的图像字幕基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种堆叠跨模态特征整合注意力网络（SCFC），通过结合高层语义和视觉信息提升图像描述生成效果。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉注意力模型直接从视觉空间过渡到文本生成描述，难以捕捉细粒度语义信息，需更充分整合上下文语义与视觉特征。
AI.method: 设计SCFC网络，通过多步骤推理整合跨模态特征，结合空间信息与上下文感知属性（CAA）构建语义表示，并提出SCFC-LSTM生成器利用判别性语义信息。
AI.result: 在MSCOCO和Flickr30K数据集上，SCFC在主流指标中优于多种先进图像描述生成方法。
AI.conclusion: SCFC通过跨模态特征整合与上下文感知机制，有效提升了图像描述生成的细粒度语义表达能力。

authors_text: Christian Antić
title: Algebraic characterizations of least model and uniform equivalence of propositional Krom logic programs
title_zh: 命题Krom逻辑程序的最小模型的代数表征和一致等价
abstract: This research note provides algebraic characterizations of the least model, subsumption, and uniform equivalence of propositional Krom logic programs.
summary: This research note provides algebraic characterizations of the least model, subsumption, and uniform equivalence of propositional Krom logic programs.
abstract_zh: 本研究报告提供了命题 Krom 逻辑程序的最小模型、包含和一致等价的代数特征。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究命题Krom逻辑程序的最小模型、子集关系和统一等价的代数刻画方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对命题Krom逻辑程序语义性质的代数结构分析，需建立更抽象的数学表征以促进理论发展与应用。
AI.method: 通过构建代数结构，将逻辑程序的语义性质转化为代数系统中的运算与关系进行分析。
AI.result: 提出了最小模型、子集关系及统一等价的代数特征化刻画，建立了逻辑程序与代数系统间的理论联系。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为命题Krom逻辑程序提供了新的代数分析视角，有助于深化其语义理解并拓展相关应用领域。

authors_text: Tung Phung,José Cambronero,Sumit Gulwani,Tobias Kohn,Rupak Majumdar,Adish Singla,Gustavo Soares
title: Generating High-Precision Feedback for Programming Syntax Errors using Large Language Models
title_zh: 使用大型语言模型为编程语法错误生成高精度反馈
comment: Published in International Conference on Educational Data Mining (EDM) 2023
comments: Published in International Conference on Educational Data Mining (EDM) 2023
abstract: Large language models (LLMs), such as Codex, hold great promise in enhancing programming education by automatically generating feedback for students. We investigate using LLMs to generate feedback for fixing syntax errors in Python programs, a key scenario in introductory programming. More concretely, given a student's buggy program, our goal is to generate feedback comprising a fixed program along with a natural language explanation describing the errors/fixes, inspired by how a human tutor would give feedback. While using LLMs is promising, the critical challenge is to ensure high precision in the generated feedback, which is imperative before deploying such technology in classrooms. The main research question we study is: Can we develop LLMs-based feedback generation techniques with a tunable precision parameter, giving educators quality control over the feedback that students receive? To this end, we introduce PyFiXV, our technique to generate high-precision feedback powered by Codex. The key idea behind PyFiXV is to use a novel run-time validation mechanism to decide whether the generated feedback is suitable for sharing with the student; notably, this validation mechanism also provides a precision knob to educators. We perform an extensive evaluation using two real-world datasets of Python programs with syntax errors and show the efficacy of PyFiXV in generating high-precision feedback.
summary: Large language models (LLMs), such as Codex, hold great promise in enhancing programming education by automatically generating feedback for students. We investigate using LLMs to generate feedback for fixing syntax errors in Python programs, a key scenario in introductory programming. More concretely, given a student's buggy program, our goal is to generate feedback comprising a fixed program along with a natural language explanation describing the errors/fixes, inspired by how a human tutor would give feedback. While using LLMs is promising, the critical challenge is to ensure high precision in the generated feedback, which is imperative before deploying such technology in classrooms. The main research question we study is: Can we develop LLMs-based feedback generation techniques with a tunable precision parameter, giving educators quality control over the feedback that students receive? To this end, we introduce PyFiXV, our technique to generate high-precision feedback powered by Codex. The key idea behind PyFiXV is to use a novel run-time validation mechanism to decide whether the generated feedback is suitable for sharing with the student; notably, this validation mechanism also provides a precision knob to educators. We perform an extensive evaluation using two real-world datasets of Python programs with syntax errors and show the efficacy of PyFiXV in generating high-precision feedback.
abstract_zh: Codex 等大型语言模型 (LLM) 在通过自动为学生生成反馈来增强编程教育方面具有巨大前景。我们研究使用法学硕士来生成反馈以修复 Python 程序中的语法错误，这是入门编程中的一个关键场景。更具体地说，考虑到学生的错误程序，我们的目标是生成包含固定程序的反馈以及描述错误/修复的自然语言解释，其灵感来自于人类导师如何提供反馈。虽然使用法学硕士前景广阔，但关键的挑战是确保生成的反馈具有高精度，这在课堂上部署此类技术之前至关重要。我们研究的主要研究问题是：我们能否开发基于法学硕士的反馈生成技术，其精度参数可调，让教育工作者对学生收到的反馈进行质量控制？为此，我们引入了 PyFiXV，这是我们在 Codex 的支持下生成高精度反馈的技术。 PyFiXV 背后的关键思想是使用一种新颖的运行时验证机制来决定生成的反馈是否适合与学生共享；值得注意的是，这种验证机制还为教育工作者提供了精确的旋钮。我们使用两个存在语法错误的 Python 程序的真实数据集进行了广泛的评估，并展示了 PyFiXV 在生成高精度反馈方面的功效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的高精度编程语法错误反馈生成方法PyFiXV，旨在为初学者提供精准的代码修复建议和自然语言解释。
AI.motivation: 编程教育中需要自动化反馈系统帮助学生修正语法错误，但现有LLM生成的反馈存在精度不足的问题，需提供可调节精度的解决方案以满足教学需求。
AI.method: 设计PyFiXV技术，结合Codex模型生成修复方案，并引入运行时验证机制筛选反馈结果，通过可调节参数控制反馈精度。
AI.result: 在两个真实Python语法错误数据集上验证，PyFiXV能有效生成高精度反馈，验证机制显著提升反馈可靠性。
AI.conclusion: PyFiXV通过动态验证机制实现了可调节精度的反馈生成，为编程教育中的LLM应用提供了质量可控的解决方案。

search_text: Generating High-Precision Feedback for Programming Syntax Errors using Large Language Models 使用大型语言模型为编程语法错误生成高精度反馈 Large language models (LLMs), such as Codex, hold great promise in enhancing programming education by automatically generating feedback for students. We investigate using LLMs to generate feedback for fixing syntax errors in Python programs, a key scenario in introductory programming. More concretely, given a student's buggy program, our goal is to generate feedback comprising a fixed program along with a natural language explanation describing the errors/fixes, inspired by how a human tutor would give feedback. While using LLMs is promising, the critical challenge is to ensure high precision in the generated feedback, which is imperative before deploying such technology in classrooms. The main research question we study is: Can we develop LLMs-based feedback generation techniques with a tunable precision parameter, giving educators quality control over the feedback that students receive? To this end, we introduce PyFiXV, our technique to generate high-precision feedback powered by Codex. The key idea behind PyFiXV is to use a novel run-time validation mechanism to decide whether the generated feedback is suitable for sharing with the student; notably, this validation mechanism also provides a precision knob to educators. We perform an extensive evaluation using two real-world datasets of Python programs with syntax errors and show the efficacy of PyFiXV in generating high-precision feedback.
