authors_text: Jiayuan Gu,Fanbo Xiang,Xuanlin Li,Zhan Ling,Xiqiang Liu,Tongzhou Mu,Yihe Tang,Stone Tao,Xinyue Wei,Yunchao Yao,Xiaodi Yuan,Pengwei Xie,Zhiao Huang,Rui Chen,Hao Su
title: ManiSkill2: A Unified Benchmark for Generalizable Manipulation Skills
title_zh: ManiSkill2：通用操作技能的统一基准
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023. Project website: https://maniskill2.github.io/
comments: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023. Project website: https://maniskill2.github.io/
abstract: Generalizable manipulation skills, which can be composed to tackle long-horizon and complex daily chores, are one of the cornerstones of Embodied AI. However, existing benchmarks, mostly composed of a suite of simulatable environments, are insufficient to push cutting-edge research works because they lack object-level topological and geometric variations, are not based on fully dynamic simulation, or are short of native support for multiple types of manipulation tasks. To this end, we present ManiSkill2, the next generation of the SAPIEN ManiSkill benchmark, to address critical pain points often encountered by researchers when using benchmarks for generalizable manipulation skills. ManiSkill2 includes 20 manipulation task families with 2000+ object models and 4M+ demonstration frames, which cover stationary/mobile-base, single/dual-arm, and rigid/soft-body manipulation tasks with 2D/3D-input data simulated by fully dynamic engines. It defines a unified interface and evaluation protocol to support a wide range of algorithms (e.g., classic sense-plan-act, RL, IL), visual observations (point cloud, RGBD), and controllers (e.g., action type and parameterization). Moreover, it empowers fast visual input learning algorithms so that a CNN-based policy can collect samples at about 2000 FPS with 1 GPU and 16 processes on a regular workstation. It implements a render server infrastructure to allow sharing rendering resources across all environments, thereby significantly reducing memory usage. We open-source all codes of our benchmark (simulator, environments, and baselines) and host an online challenge open to interdisciplinary researchers.
summary: Generalizable manipulation skills, which can be composed to tackle long-horizon and complex daily chores, are one of the cornerstones of Embodied AI. However, existing benchmarks, mostly composed of a suite of simulatable environments, are insufficient to push cutting-edge research works because they lack object-level topological and geometric variations, are not based on fully dynamic simulation, or are short of native support for multiple types of manipulation tasks. To this end, we present ManiSkill2, the next generation of the SAPIEN ManiSkill benchmark, to address critical pain points often encountered by researchers when using benchmarks for generalizable manipulation skills. ManiSkill2 includes 20 manipulation task families with 2000+ object models and 4M+ demonstration frames, which cover stationary/mobile-base, single/dual-arm, and rigid/soft-body manipulation tasks with 2D/3D-input data simulated by fully dynamic engines. It defines a unified interface and evaluation protocol to support a wide range of algorithms (e.g., classic sense-plan-act, RL, IL), visual observations (point cloud, RGBD), and controllers (e.g., action type and parameterization). Moreover, it empowers fast visual input learning algorithms so that a CNN-based policy can collect samples at about 2000 FPS with 1 GPU and 16 processes on a regular workstation. It implements a render server infrastructure to allow sharing rendering resources across all environments, thereby significantly reducing memory usage. We open-source all codes of our benchmark (simulator, environments, and baselines) and host an online challenge open to interdisciplinary researchers.
abstract_zh: 通用的操作技能可以用来解决长期和复杂的日常琐事，是体现人工智能的基石之一。然而，现有的基准大多由一套可模拟环境组成，不足以推动前沿研究工作，因为它们缺乏对象级拓扑和几何变化，不基于完全动态模拟，或者缺乏对多种类型操作任务的本机支持。为此，我们推出了下一代 SAPIEN ManiSkill 基准测试 ManiSkill2，以解决研究人员在使用通用操作技能基准测试时经常遇到的关键痛点。 ManiSkill2 包括 20 个操纵任务系列，拥有 2000 多个对象模型和 4M+ 演示框架，涵盖固定/移动底座、单臂/双臂以及刚性/软体操纵任务，并通过全动态引擎模拟 2D/3D 输入数据。它定义了一个统一的接口和评估协议，以支持各种算法（例如，经典的感知-计划-行动、RL、IL）、视觉观察（点云、RGBD）和控制器（例如，动作类型和参数化）。此外，它还支持快速视觉输入学习算法，以便基于 CNN 的策略可以在常规工作站上使用 1 个 GPU 和 16 个进程以约 2000 FPS 的速度收集样本。它实现了渲染服务器基础设施，允许在所有环境中共享渲染资源，从而显着减少内存使用。我们开源基准测试的所有代码（模拟器、环境和基线），并举办向跨学科研究人员开放的在线挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ManiSkill2基准，旨在解决通用操作技能研究中现有基准的不足，提供更全面的评估框架。
AI.motivation: 现有基准缺乏物体拓扑几何多样性、非动态模拟支持及多类型操作任务覆盖，难以推动前沿研究。
AI.method: 构建包含20类任务、2000+物体模型的统一接口基准，采用全动态引擎模拟2D/3D输入数据，并实现渲染资源共享优化。
AI.result: 支持多种算法与视觉输入方式，CNN策略可实现2000 FPS采样，内存效率提升显著，开源所有代码并举办在线挑战赛。
AI.conclusion: ManiSkill2通过动态模拟、统一评估协议和高效渲染技术，为通用操作技能研究提供更完善的基准平台。

authors_text: Zekai Wang,Tianyu Pang,Chao Du,Min Lin,Weiwei Liu,Shuicheng Yan
title: Better Diffusion Models Further Improve Adversarial Training
title_zh: 更好的扩散模型进一步改善对抗训练
abstract: It has been recognized that the data generated by the denoising diffusion probabilistic model (DDPM) improves adversarial training. After two years of rapid development in diffusion models, a question naturally arises: can better diffusion models further improve adversarial training? This paper gives an affirmative answer by employing the most recent diffusion model which has higher efficiency ($\sim 20$ sampling steps) and image quality (lower FID score) compared with DDPM. Our adversarially trained models achieve state-of-the-art performance on RobustBench using only generated data (no external datasets). Under the $\ell_\infty$-norm threat model with $ε=8/255$, our models achieve $70.69\%$ and $42.67\%$ robust accuracy on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100, respectively, i.e. improving upon previous state-of-the-art models by $+4.58\%$ and $+8.03\%$. Under the $\ell_2$-norm threat model with $ε=128/255$, our models achieve $84.86\%$ on CIFAR-10 ($+4.44\%$). These results also beat previous works that use external data. We also provide compelling results on the SVHN and TinyImageNet datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/wzekai99/DM-Improves-AT.
summary: It has been recognized that the data generated by the denoising diffusion probabilistic model (DDPM) improves adversarial training. After two years of rapid development in diffusion models, a question naturally arises: can better diffusion models further improve adversarial training? This paper gives an affirmative answer by employing the most recent diffusion model which has higher efficiency ($\sim 20$ sampling steps) and image quality (lower FID score) compared with DDPM. Our adversarially trained models achieve state-of-the-art performance on RobustBench using only generated data (no external datasets). Under the $\ell_\infty$-norm threat model with $ε=8/255$, our models achieve $70.69\%$ and $42.67\%$ robust accuracy on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100, respectively, i.e. improving upon previous state-of-the-art models by $+4.58\%$ and $+8.03\%$. Under the $\ell_2$-norm threat model with $ε=128/255$, our models achieve $84.86\%$ on CIFAR-10 ($+4.44\%$). These results also beat previous works that use external data. We also provide compelling results on the SVHN and TinyImageNet datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/wzekai99/DM-Improves-AT.
abstract_zh: 人们已经认识到，去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）生成的数据可以改善对抗训练。经过两年扩散模型的快速发展，一个问题自然而然地出现：更好的扩散模型能否进一步改善对抗训练？本文采用最新的扩散模型给出了肯定的答案，与 DDPM 相比，该模型具有更高的效率（$\sim 20$ 采样步骤）和图像质量（更低的 FID 分数）。我们的对抗训练模型仅使用生成的数据（无外部数据集）在 RobustBench 上实现了最先进的性能。在 $ε=8/255$ 的 $\ell_\infty$-norm 威胁模型下，我们的模型在 CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 上分别实现了 $70.69\%$ 和 $42.67\%$ 的鲁棒精度，即比之前最先进的模型提高了 $+4.58\%$ 和 $+8.03\%$。在 $ε=128/255$ 的 $\ell_2$-norm 威胁模型下，我们的模型在 CIFAR-10 上达到 $84.86\%$ ($+4.44\%$)。这些结果也击败了之前使用外部数据的工作。我们还在 SVHN 和 TinyImageNet 数据集上提供了令人信服的结果。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/wzekai99/DM-Improves-AT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了更先进的扩散模型是否能进一步提升对抗训练效果，并通过实验验证了这一假设。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究证明扩散模型生成的数据可提升对抗训练，但随着扩散模型的快速发展，研究者提出疑问：更高效的扩散模型是否能带来更大的性能提升？
AI.method: 采用最新扩散模型（采样步数减少约20步，FID分数更低）生成数据进行对抗训练，无需外部数据集，在ℓ∞和ℓ2威胁模型下评估模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10（70.69%）和CIFAR-100（42.67%）数据集上，模型在ℓ∞威胁模型下分别超越此前最佳结果4.58%和8.03%；在ℓ2威胁模型下CIFAR-10达到84.86%（+4.44%）。结果优于使用外部数据的方法，并在SVHN和TinyImageNet上验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: 更优质的扩散模型能显著提升对抗训练效果，生成数据即可达到SOTA性能，证明了高质量合成数据在对抗训练中的价值。

search_text: Better Diffusion Models Further Improve Adversarial Training 更好的扩散模型进一步改善对抗训练 It has been recognized that the data generated by the denoising diffusion probabilistic model (DDPM) improves adversarial training. After two years of rapid development in diffusion models, a question naturally arises: can better diffusion models further improve adversarial training? This paper gives an affirmative answer by employing the most recent diffusion model which has higher efficiency ($\sim 20$ sampling steps) and image quality (lower FID score) compared with DDPM. Our adversarially trained models achieve state-of-the-art performance on RobustBench using only generated data (no external datasets). Under the $\ell_\infty$-norm threat model with $ε=8/255$, our models achieve $70.69\%$ and $42.67\%$ robust accuracy on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100, respectively, i.e. improving upon previous state-of-the-art models by $+4.58\%$ and $+8.03\%$. Under the $\ell_2$-norm threat model with $ε=128/255$, our models achieve $84.86\%$ on CIFAR-10 ($+4.44\%$). These results also beat previous works that use external data. We also provide compelling results on the SVHN and TinyImageNet datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/wzekai99/DM-Improves-AT. 人们已经认识到，去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）生成的数据可以改善对抗训练。经过两年扩散模型的快速发展，一个问题自然而然地出现：更好的扩散模型能否进一步改善对抗训练？本文采用最新的扩散模型给出了肯定的答案，与 DDPM 相比，该模型具有更高的效率（$\sim 20$ 采样步骤）和图像质量（更低的 FID 分数）。我们的对抗训练模型仅使用生成的数据（无外部数据集）在 RobustBench 上实现了最先进的性能。在 $ε=8/255$ 的 $\ell_\infty$-norm 威胁模型下，我们的模型在 CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 上分别实现了 $70.69\%$ 和 $42.67\%$ 的鲁棒精度，即比之前最先进的模型提高了 $+4.58\%$ 和 $+8.03\%$。在 $ε=128/255$ 的 $\ell_2$-norm 威胁模型下，我们的模型在 CIFAR-10 上达到 $84.86\%$ ($+4.44\%$)。这些结果也击败了之前使用外部数据的工作。我们还在 SVHN 和 TinyImageNet 数据集上提供了令人信服的结果。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/wzekai99/DM-Improves-AT 获取。 本文探讨了更先进的扩散模型是否能进一步提升对抗训练效果，并通过实验验证了这一假设。 Zekai Wang,Tianyu Pang,Chao Du,Min Lin,Weiwei Liu,Shuicheng Yan cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CR,cs.LG

authors_text: Corina S. Pasareanu,Ravi Mangal,Divya Gopinath,Sinem Getir Yaman,Calum Imrie,Radu Calinescu,Huafeng Yu
title: Closed-loop Analysis of Vision-based Autonomous Systems: A Case Study
title_zh: 基于视觉的自主系统的闭环分析：案例研究
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are increasingly used in safety-critical autonomous systems as perception components processing high-dimensional image data. Formal analysis of these systems is particularly challenging due to the complexity of the perception DNNs, the sensors (cameras), and the environment conditions. We present a case study applying formal probabilistic analysis techniques to an experimental autonomous system that guides airplanes on taxiways using a perception DNN. We address the above challenges by replacing the camera and the network with a compact probabilistic abstraction built from the confusion matrices computed for the DNN on a representative image data set. We also show how to leverage local, DNN-specific analyses as run-time guards to increase the safety of the overall system. Our findings are applicable to other autonomous systems that use complex DNNs for perception.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are increasingly used in safety-critical autonomous systems as perception components processing high-dimensional image data. Formal analysis of these systems is particularly challenging due to the complexity of the perception DNNs, the sensors (cameras), and the environment conditions. We present a case study applying formal probabilistic analysis techniques to an experimental autonomous system that guides airplanes on taxiways using a perception DNN. We address the above challenges by replacing the camera and the network with a compact probabilistic abstraction built from the confusion matrices computed for the DNN on a representative image data set. We also show how to leverage local, DNN-specific analyses as run-time guards to increase the safety of the overall system. Our findings are applicable to other autonomous systems that use complex DNNs for perception.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 越来越多地用于安全关键型自主系统中，作为处理高维图像数据的感知组件。由于感知 DNN、传感器（相机）和环境条件的复杂性，对这些系统的形式分析特别具有挑战性。我们提出了一个案例研究，将形式概率分析技术应用于实验性自主系统，该系统使用感知 DNN 引导飞机在滑行道上行驶。我们通过用一个紧凑的概率抽象替换相机和网络来解决上述挑战，该概率抽象是根据代表性图像数据集上为 DNN 计算的混淆矩阵构建的。我们还展示了如何利用本地 DNN 特定分析作为运行时防护来提高整个系统的安全性。我们的研究结果适用于其他使用复杂 DNN 进行感知的自主系统。

AI.tldr: 本文通过案例研究，应用形式化概率分析技术解决基于视觉的自主系统安全分析难题。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在自主系统感知环节的复杂性与环境不确定性导致传统分析方法难以保障安全性。
AI.method: 构建基于混淆矩阵的紧凑概率抽象模型替代物理传感器与DNN，并结合局部分析作为运行时安全防护机制。
AI.result: 成功验证了该方法在飞机滑行道引导系统的有效性，且框架可迁移至其他复杂DNN感知的自主系统。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法为安全关键型视觉自主系统提供了可扩展的形式化分析解决方案。

authors_text: Kooshan Hashemifard,Pau Climent-Perez,Francisco Florez-Revuelta
title: Weakly Supervised Human Skin Segmentation using Guidance Attention Mechanisms
title_zh: 使用引导注意机制的弱监督人体皮肤分割
abstract: Human skin segmentation is a crucial task in computer vision and biometric systems, yet it poses several challenges such as variability in skin color, pose, and illumination. This paper presents a robust data-driven skin segmentation method for a single image that addresses these challenges through the integration of contextual information and efficient network design. In addition to robustness and accuracy, the integration into real-time systems requires a careful balance between computational power, speed, and performance. The proposed method incorporates two attention modules, Body Attention and Skin Attention, that utilize contextual information to improve segmentation results. These modules draw attention to the desired areas, focusing on the body boundaries and skin pixels, respectively. Additionally, an efficient network architecture is employed in the encoder part to minimize computational power while retaining high performance. To handle the issue of noisy labels in skin datasets, the proposed method uses a weakly supervised training strategy, relying on the Skin Attention module. The results of this study demonstrate that the proposed method is comparable to, or outperforms, state-of-the-art methods on benchmark datasets.
summary: Human skin segmentation is a crucial task in computer vision and biometric systems, yet it poses several challenges such as variability in skin color, pose, and illumination. This paper presents a robust data-driven skin segmentation method for a single image that addresses these challenges through the integration of contextual information and efficient network design. In addition to robustness and accuracy, the integration into real-time systems requires a careful balance between computational power, speed, and performance. The proposed method incorporates two attention modules, Body Attention and Skin Attention, that utilize contextual information to improve segmentation results. These modules draw attention to the desired areas, focusing on the body boundaries and skin pixels, respectively. Additionally, an efficient network architecture is employed in the encoder part to minimize computational power while retaining high performance. To handle the issue of noisy labels in skin datasets, the proposed method uses a weakly supervised training strategy, relying on the Skin Attention module. The results of this study demonstrate that the proposed method is comparable to, or outperforms, state-of-the-art methods on benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 人体皮肤分割是计算机视觉和生物识别系统中的一项关键任务，但它带来了一些挑战，例如肤色、姿势和照明的变化。本文提出了一种针对单个图像的强大的数据驱动皮肤分割方法，该方法通过上下文信息和高效网络设计的集成来解决这些挑战。除了鲁棒性和准确性之外，集成到实时系统中还需要在计算能力、速度和性能之间取得仔细的平衡。所提出的方法结合了两个注意模块：身体注意和皮肤注意，它们利用上下文信息来改善分割结果。这些模块将注意力吸引到所需区域，分别关注身体边界和皮肤像素。此外，编码器部分采用了高效的网络架构，以最大限度地减少计算能力，同时保持高性能。为了处理皮肤数据集中的噪声标签问题，所提出的方法使用弱监督训练策略，依赖于皮肤注意力模块。这项研究的结果表明，所提出的方法与基准数据集上的最先进方法相当或优于。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于弱监督和引导注意力机制的人体皮肤分割方法，通过整合上下文信息和高效网络设计解决皮肤颜色、姿态和光照变化带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有皮肤分割方法在应对复杂光照、多姿态变化及标签噪声时存在准确率不足与计算效率低的问题，需平衡实时系统对速度与性能的需求。
AI.method: 设计Body Attention与Skin Attention双模块，分别聚焦身体边界与皮肤区域；采用高效编码器降低计算量，并通过弱监督策略利用Skin Attention缓解标签噪声影响。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上，该方法性能优于或媲美现有最先进算法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过注意力机制与网络架构优化，本文方法在保持高分割精度的同时提升了计算效率，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

search_text: Weakly Supervised Human Skin Segmentation using Guidance Attention Mechanisms 使用引导注意机制的弱监督人体皮肤分割 Human skin segmentation is a crucial task in computer vision and biometric systems, yet it poses several challenges such as variability in skin color, pose, and illumination. This paper presents a robust data-driven skin segmentation method for a single image that addresses these challenges through the integration of contextual information and efficient network design. In addition to robustness and accuracy, the integration into real-time systems requires a careful balance between computational power, speed, and performance. The proposed method incorporates two attention modules, Body Attention and Skin Attention, that utilize contextual information to improve segmentation results. These modules draw attention to the desired areas, focusing on the body boundaries and skin pixels, respectively. Additionally, an efficient network architecture is employed in the encoder part to minimize computational power while retaining high performance. To handle the issue of noisy labels in skin datasets, the proposed method uses a weakly supervised training strategy, relying on the Skin Attention module. The results of this study demonstrate that the proposed method is comparable to, or outperforms, state-of-the-art methods on benchmark datasets. 人体皮肤分割是计算机视觉和生物识别系统中的一项关键任务，但它带来了一些挑战，例如肤色、姿势和照明的变化。本文提出了一种针对单个图像的强大的数据驱动皮肤分割方法，该方法通过上下文信息和高效网络设计的集成来解决这些挑战。除了鲁棒性和准确性之外，集成到实时系统中还需要在计算能力、速度和性能之间取得仔细的平衡。所提出的方法结合了两个注意模块：身体注意和皮肤注意，它们利用上下文信息来改善分割结果。这些模块将注意力吸引到所需区域，分别关注身体边界和皮肤像素。此外，编码器部分采用了高效的网络架构，以最大限度地减少计算能力，同时保持高性能。为了处理皮肤数据集中的噪声标签问题，所提出的方法使用弱监督训练策略，依赖于皮肤注意力模块。这项研究的结果表明，所提出的方法与基准数据集上的最先进方法相当或优于。 本文提出一种基于弱监督和引导注意力机制的人体皮肤分割方法，通过整合上下文信息和高效网络设计解决皮肤颜色、姿态和光照变化带来的挑战。 Kooshan Hashemifard,Pau Climent-Perez,Francisco Florez-Revuelta cs.CV

authors_text: Yeonsu Chang,O-joung Kwon,Myounghwan Lee
title: A new width parameter of graphs based on edge cuts: $α$-edge-crossing width
title_zh: 一种新的基于边切割的图宽度参数：$α$-edge-crossing width
abstract: We introduce graph width parameters, called $α$-edge-crossing width and edge-crossing width. These are defined in terms of the number of edges crossing a bag of a tree-cut decomposition. They are motivated by edge-cut width, recently introduced by Brand et al. (WG 2022). We show that edge-crossing width is equivalent to the known parameter tree-partition-width. On the other hand, $α$-edge-crossing width is a new parameter; tree-cut width and $α$-edge-crossing width are incomparable, and they both lie between tree-partition-width and edge-cut width. We provide an algorithm that, for a given $n$-vertex graph $G$ and integers $k$ and $α$, in time $2^{O((α+k)\log (α+k))}n^2$ either outputs a tree-cut decomposition certifying that the $α$-edge-crossing width of $G$ is at most $2α^2+5k$ or confirms that the $α$-edge-crossing width of $G$ is more than $k$. As applications, for every fixed $α$, we obtain FPT algorithms for the List Coloring and Precoloring Extension problems parameterized by $α$-edge-crossing width. They were known to be W[1]-hard parameterized by tree-partition-width, and FPT parameterized by edge-cut width, and we close the complexity gap between these two parameters.
summary: We introduce graph width parameters, called $α$-edge-crossing width and edge-crossing width. These are defined in terms of the number of edges crossing a bag of a tree-cut decomposition. They are motivated by edge-cut width, recently introduced by Brand et al. (WG 2022). We show that edge-crossing width is equivalent to the known parameter tree-partition-width. On the other hand, $α$-edge-crossing width is a new parameter; tree-cut width and $α$-edge-crossing width are incomparable, and they both lie between tree-partition-width and edge-cut width. We provide an algorithm that, for a given $n$-vertex graph $G$ and integers $k$ and $α$, in time $2^{O((α+k)\log (α+k))}n^2$ either outputs a tree-cut decomposition certifying that the $α$-edge-crossing width of $G$ is at most $2α^2+5k$ or confirms that the $α$-edge-crossing width of $G$ is more than $k$. As applications, for every fixed $α$, we obtain FPT algorithms for the List Coloring and Precoloring Extension problems parameterized by $α$-edge-crossing width. They were known to be W[1]-hard parameterized by tree-partition-width, and FPT parameterized by edge-cut width, and we close the complexity gap between these two parameters.
abstract_zh: 我们引入图宽度参数，称为$α$-edge-crossing width和edge-crossing width。这些是根据穿过树切割分解袋的边数来定义的。他们的动机是边缘切割宽度，最近由 Brand 等人提出。 （工作组 2022）。我们证明边交叉宽度相当于已知参数树分区宽度。另一方面，$α$-edge-crossing width是一个新参数； tree-cut 宽度和 $α$-edge-crossing 宽度没有可比性，它们都位于 tree-partition-width 和 edge-cut 宽度之间。我们提供了一种算法，对于给定的 $n$-顶点图 $G$ 和整数 $k$ 和 $α$，及时 $2^{O((α+k)\log (α+k))}n^2$ 要么输出树切割分解，证明 $G$ 的 $α$-边交叉宽度最多为 $2α^2+5k$，要么确认 $G$ 的 $α$-边交叉宽度大于$k$。作为应用，对于每个固定的$α$，我们获得由$α$-边缘交叉宽度参数化的列表着色和预着色扩展问题的FPT算法。已知它们是由树分区宽度参数化的 W[1]-hard，以及由边缘切割宽度参数化的 FPT，并且我们缩小了这两个参数之间的复杂性差距。

AI.tldr: 本文引入了基于边割的图宽度参数α-边交叉宽度，并研究其与现有参数的关系及算法应用。
AI.motivation: 为填补树划分宽度与边割宽度之间的复杂性差距，提出新的图宽度参数以改进相关问题的算法效率。
AI.method: 通过定义树割分解中边交叉数量的参数，结合参数化算法设计，提供计算α-边交叉宽度的指数时间算法。
AI.result: 证明边交叉宽度等价于树划分宽度，α-边交叉宽度介于树划分宽度与边割宽度之间，并为列表着色问题提供FPT算法。
AI.conclusion: 新参数有效弥合了树划分宽度与边割宽度的复杂性差距，为相关问题提供了更优的参数化算法框架。

authors_text: Shengchao Liu,Yanjing Li,Zhuoxinran Li,Anthony Gitter,Yutao Zhu,Jiarui Lu,Zhao Xu,Weili Nie,Arvind Ramanathan,Chaowei Xiao,Jian Tang,Hongyu Guo,Anima Anandkumar
title: A Text-guided Protein Design Framework
title_zh: 文本引导的蛋白质设计框架
abstract: Current AI-assisted protein design mainly utilizes protein sequential and structural information. Meanwhile, there exists tremendous knowledge curated by humans in the text format describing proteins' high-level functionalities. Yet, whether the incorporation of such text data can help protein design tasks has not been explored. To bridge this gap, we propose ProteinDT, a multi-modal framework that leverages textual descriptions for protein design. ProteinDT consists of three subsequent steps: ProteinCLAP which aligns the representation of two modalities, a facilitator that generates the protein representation from the text modality, and a decoder that creates the protein sequences from the representation. To train ProteinDT, we construct a large dataset, SwissProtCLAP, with 441K text and protein pairs. We quantitatively verify the effectiveness of ProteinDT on three challenging tasks: (1) over 90% accuracy for text-guided protein generation; (2) best hit ratio on 12 zero-shot text-guided protein editing tasks; (3) superior performance on four out of six protein property prediction benchmarks.
summary: Current AI-assisted protein design mainly utilizes protein sequential and structural information. Meanwhile, there exists tremendous knowledge curated by humans in the text format describing proteins' high-level functionalities. Yet, whether the incorporation of such text data can help protein design tasks has not been explored. To bridge this gap, we propose ProteinDT, a multi-modal framework that leverages textual descriptions for protein design. ProteinDT consists of three subsequent steps: ProteinCLAP which aligns the representation of two modalities, a facilitator that generates the protein representation from the text modality, and a decoder that creates the protein sequences from the representation. To train ProteinDT, we construct a large dataset, SwissProtCLAP, with 441K text and protein pairs. We quantitatively verify the effectiveness of ProteinDT on three challenging tasks: (1) over 90% accuracy for text-guided protein generation; (2) best hit ratio on 12 zero-shot text-guided protein editing tasks; (3) superior performance on four out of six protein property prediction benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 目前人工智能辅助蛋白质设计主要利用蛋白质序列和结构信息。与此同时，人类以文本格式积累了大量知识，描述了蛋白质的高级功能。然而，尚未探讨合并此类文本数据是否有助于蛋白质设计任务。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了 ProteinDT，这是一种利用文本描述进行蛋白质设计的多模式框架。 ProteinDT 包含三个后续步骤：ProteinCLAP（对齐两种模态的表示）、从文本模态生成蛋白质表示的促进器，以及从表示创建蛋白质序列的解码器。为了训练 ProteinDT，我们构建了一个大型数据集 SwissProtCLAP，其中包含 441K 文本和蛋白质对。我们定量验证了 ProteinDT 在三个具有挑战性的任务上的有效性：(1) 文本引导的蛋白质生成准确率超过 90%； (2) 12 个零样本文本引导蛋白质编辑任务的最佳命中率； (3) 在六个蛋白质特性预测基准中的四个上表现优异。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于文本引导的蛋白质设计框架ProteinDT，通过整合文本信息提升蛋白质设计效果。
AI.motivation: 现有AI辅助蛋白质设计主要依赖序列和结构信息，而人类积累的文本描述中蕴含的蛋白质功能知识尚未被有效利用。
AI.method: 构建三阶段框架：ProteinCLAP跨模态对齐模块、文本到蛋白质表示生成器及序列解码器，并创建包含441K文本-蛋白质对的SwissProtCLAP数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 在文本引导生成任务中达到90%+准确率，在12个零样本编辑任务中取得最佳命中率，4/6蛋白质属性预测基准测试表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 文本信息的引入显著提升了蛋白质设计效果，验证了多模态融合在该领域的有效性与应用潜力。

ProteinDT consists of three subsequent steps: ProteinCLAP which aligns the representation of two modalities, a facilitator that generates the protein representation from the text modality, and a decoder that creates the protein sequences from the representation. We quantitatively verify the effectiveness of ProteinDT on three challenging tasks: (1) over 90% accuracy for text-guided protein generation; (2) best hit ratio on 12 zero-shot text-guided protein editing tasks; (3) superior performance on four out of six protein property prediction benchmarks. 目前人工智能辅助蛋白质设计主要利用蛋白质序列和结构信息。与此同时，人类以文本格式积累了大量知识，描述了蛋白质的高级功能。然而，尚未探讨合并此类文本数据是否有助于蛋白质设计任务。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了 ProteinDT，这是一种利用文本描述进行蛋白质设计的多模式框架。 ProteinDT 包含三个后续步骤：ProteinCLAP（对齐两种模态的表示）、从文本模态生成蛋白质表示的促进器，以及从表示创建蛋白质序列的解码器。为了训练 ProteinDT，我们构建了一个大型数据集 SwissProtCLAP，其中包含 441K 文本和蛋白质对。我们定量验证了 ProteinDT 在三个具有挑战性的任务上的有效性：(1) 文本引导的蛋白质生成准确率超过 90%； (2) 12 个零样本文本引导蛋白质编辑任务的最佳命中率； (3) 在六个蛋白质特性预测基准中的四个上表现优异。 本文提出一种基于文本引导的蛋白质设计框架ProteinDT，通过整合文本信息提升蛋白质设计效果。 Shengchao Liu,Yanjing Li,Zhuoxinran Li,Anthony Gitter,Yutao Zhu,Jiarui Lu,Zhao Xu,Weili Nie,Arvind Ramanathan,Chaowei Xiao,Jian Tang,Hongyu Guo,Anima Anandkumar cs.LG,cs.AI,q-bio.QM,stat.ML

authors_text: Jiabei Wang,Yanwei Pang,Jiale Cao,Hanqing Sun,Zhuang Shao,Xuelong Li
title: Deep Intra-Image Contrastive Learning for Weakly Supervised One-Step Person Search
title_zh: 用于弱监督一步式人物搜索的深度图像内对比学习
abstract: Weakly supervised person search aims to perform joint pedestrian detection and re-identification (re-id) with only person bounding-box annotations. Recently, the idea of contrastive learning is initially applied to weakly supervised person search, where two common contrast strategies are memory-based contrast and intra-image contrast. We argue that current intra-image contrast is shallow, which suffers from spatial-level and occlusion-level variance. In this paper, we present a novel deep intra-image contrastive learning using a Siamese network. Two key modules are spatial-invariant contrast (SIC) and occlusion-invariant contrast (OIC). SIC performs many-to-one contrasts between two branches of Siamese network and dense prediction contrasts in one branch of Siamese network. With these many-to-one and dense contrasts, SIC tends to learn discriminative scale-invariant and location-invariant features to solve spatial-level variance. OIC enhances feature consistency with the masking strategy to learn occlusion-invariant features. Extensive experiments are performed on two person search datasets CUHK-SYSU and PRW, respectively. Our method achieves a state-of-the-art performance among weakly supervised one-step person search approaches. We hope that our simple intra-image contrastive learning can provide more paradigms on weakly supervised person search. The source code is available at \url{https://github.com/jiabeiwangTJU/DICL}.
summary: Weakly supervised person search aims to perform joint pedestrian detection and re-identification (re-id) with only person bounding-box annotations. Recently, the idea of contrastive learning is initially applied to weakly supervised person search, where two common contrast strategies are memory-based contrast and intra-image contrast. We argue that current intra-image contrast is shallow, which suffers from spatial-level and occlusion-level variance. In this paper, we present a novel deep intra-image contrastive learning using a Siamese network. Two key modules are spatial-invariant contrast (SIC) and occlusion-invariant contrast (OIC). SIC performs many-to-one contrasts between two branches of Siamese network and dense prediction contrasts in one branch of Siamese network. With these many-to-one and dense contrasts, SIC tends to learn discriminative scale-invariant and location-invariant features to solve spatial-level variance. OIC enhances feature consistency with the masking strategy to learn occlusion-invariant features. Extensive experiments are performed on two person search datasets CUHK-SYSU and PRW, respectively. Our method achieves a state-of-the-art performance among weakly supervised one-step person search approaches. We hope that our simple intra-image contrastive learning can provide more paradigms on weakly supervised person search. The source code is available at \url{https://github.com/jiabeiwangTJU/DICL}.
abstract_zh: 弱监督人员搜索旨在仅使用人员边界框注释来执行联合行人检测和重新识别（re-id）。最近，对比学习的思想最初应用于弱监督人物搜索，其中两种常见的对比策略是基于记忆的对比和图像内对比。我们认为当前的图像内对比度很浅，这受到空间级别和遮挡级别方差的影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用暹罗网络的新型深度图像内对比学习。两个关键模块是空间不变对比度（SIC）和遮挡不变对比度（OIC）。 SIC 在 Siamese 网络的两个分支之间进行多对一对比，并在 Siamese 网络的一个分支中进行密集预测对比。通过这些多对一和密集的对比，SIC 倾向于学习判别性的尺度不变和位置不变特征来解决空间级别的方差。 OIC 通过掩蔽策略增强特征一致性，以学习遮挡不变特征。分别在两个人物搜索数据集 CUHK-SYSU 和 PRW 上进行了广泛的实验。我们的方法在弱监督的一步式人物搜索方法中实现了最先进的性能。我们希望我们简单的图像内对比学习能够为弱监督人员搜索提供更多范例。源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/jiabeiwangTJU/DICL} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种深度图像内对比学习方法，用于弱监督的一站式行人搜索任务，通过结合行人检测与重识别（re-id）实现目标。
AI.motivation: 现有图像内对比学习方法在处理空间差异和遮挡问题时表现不足，缺乏对尺度不变性和位置不变性特征的有效学习。
AI.method: 设计包含空间不变对比（SIC）和遮挡不变对比（OIC）的双模块Siamese网络。SIC通过多对一和密集对比学习尺度/位置不变特征，OIC通过掩码策略增强遮挡鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在CUHK-SYSU和PRW数据集上达到弱监督一站式行人搜索的最先进性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 提出的深度图像内对比学习方法为弱监督行人搜索提供了新的技术范式和实现思路。

authors_text: Kars Alfrink,Ianus Keller,Neelke Doorn,Gerd Kortuem
title: Contestable Camera Cars: A Speculative Design Exploration of Public AI That Is Open and Responsive to Dispute
title_zh: 有争议的摄像头汽车：开放且响应争议的公共人工智能的投机设计探索
abstract: Local governments increasingly use artificial intelligence (AI) for automated decision-making. Contestability, making systems responsive to dispute, is a way to ensure they respect human rights to autonomy and dignity. We investigate the design of public urban AI systems for contestability through the example of camera cars: human-driven vehicles equipped with image sensors. Applying a provisional framework for contestable AI, we use speculative design to create a concept video of a contestable camera car. Using this concept video, we then conduct semi-structured interviews with 17 civil servants who work with AI employed by a large northwestern European city. The resulting data is analyzed using reflexive thematic analysis to identify the main challenges facing the implementation of contestability in public AI. We describe how civic participation faces issues of representation, public AI systems should integrate with existing democratic practices, and cities must expand capacities for responsible AI development and operation.
summary: Local governments increasingly use artificial intelligence (AI) for automated decision-making. Contestability, making systems responsive to dispute, is a way to ensure they respect human rights to autonomy and dignity. We investigate the design of public urban AI systems for contestability through the example of camera cars: human-driven vehicles equipped with image sensors. Applying a provisional framework for contestable AI, we use speculative design to create a concept video of a contestable camera car. Using this concept video, we then conduct semi-structured interviews with 17 civil servants who work with AI employed by a large northwestern European city. The resulting data is analyzed using reflexive thematic analysis to identify the main challenges facing the implementation of contestability in public AI. We describe how civic participation faces issues of representation, public AI systems should integrate with existing democratic practices, and cities must expand capacities for responsible AI development and operation.
abstract_zh: 地方政府越来越多地使用人工智能（AI）进行自动化决策。可竞争性，使系统对争议做出反应，是确保它们尊重人权、自主权和尊严的一种方式。我们以摄像车（配备图像传感器的人类驾驶车辆）为例，研究了公共城市人工智能系统的可竞争性设计。应用可竞争人工智能的临时框架，我们使用推测性设计来创建可竞争摄像车的概念视频。然后，我们利用这个概念视频对 17 名在欧洲西北部大城市使用人工智能的公务员进行了半结构化采访。使用反思性主题分析对所得数据进行分析，以确定公共人工智能中实施可竞争性所面临的主要挑战。我们描述了公民参与如何面临代表性问题，公共人工智能系统应与现有的民主实践相结合，以及城市必须扩大负责任的人工智能开发和运营的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文通过设计可争议的摄像头汽车概念，探讨公共AI系统如何实现对争议的响应，并分析其在实际应用中的挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着地方政府越来越多地采用AI进行决策，如何确保系统尊重人权并允许公众争议成为关键问题，需探索公共AI的可争议性设计。
AI.method: 采用推测性设计制作概念视频，并对17名公务员进行半结构化访谈，结合反射主题分析法提取数据中的核心挑战。
AI.result: 发现公民参与面临代表性不足问题，公共AI需整合现有民主实践，且城市需提升负责任AI开发与运营的能力。
AI.conclusion: 实现公共AI的可争议性需结合民主机制、增强多方参与，并系统性提升城市治理中的AI责任能力。

authors_text: Philipp Rosenthal,Niels Demke,Frank Mantwill,Oliver Niggemann
title: Plan-Based Derivation of General Functional Structures in Product Design
title_zh: 产品设计中通用功能结构的基于计划的推导
abstract: In product design, a decomposition of the overall product function into a set of smaller, interacting functions is usually considered a crucial first step for any computer-supported design tool. Here, we propose a new approach for the decomposition of functions especially suited for later solutions based on Artificial Intelligence. The presented approach defines the decomposition problem in terms of a planning problem--a well established field in Artificial Intelligence. For the planning problem, logic-based solvers can be used to find solutions that compute a useful function structure for the design process. Well-known function libraries from engineering are used as atomic planning steps. The algorithms are evaluated using two different application examples to ensure the transferability of a general function decomposition.
summary: In product design, a decomposition of the overall product function into a set of smaller, interacting functions is usually considered a crucial first step for any computer-supported design tool. Here, we propose a new approach for the decomposition of functions especially suited for later solutions based on Artificial Intelligence. The presented approach defines the decomposition problem in terms of a planning problem--a well established field in Artificial Intelligence. For the planning problem, logic-based solvers can be used to find solutions that compute a useful function structure for the design process. Well-known function libraries from engineering are used as atomic planning steps. The algorithms are evaluated using two different application examples to ensure the transferability of a general function decomposition.
abstract_zh: 在产品设计中，将整个产品功能分解为一组较小的交互功能通常被认为是任何计算机支持的设计工具的关键第一步。在这里，我们提出了一种新的功能分解方法，特别适合后续基于人工智能的解决方案。所提出的方法根据规划问题（人工智能中一个成熟的领域）定义了分解问题。对于规划问题，基于逻辑的求解器可用于寻找计算设计过程有用的函数结构的解决方案。工程中众所周知的函数库被用作原子规划步骤。使用两个不同的应用示例来评估算法，以确保一般函数分解的可转移性。

AI.result: 通过两个应用实例验证了该方法在通用功能分解中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了功能分解，为人工智能在产品设计中的应用提供了可行方案。

search_text: Plan-Based Derivation of General Functional Structures in Product Design 产品设计中通用功能结构的基于计划的推导 In product design, a decomposition of the overall product function into a set of smaller, interacting functions is usually considered a crucial first step for any computer-supported design tool. Here, we propose a new approach for the decomposition of functions especially suited for later solutions based on Artificial Intelligence. The presented approach defines the decomposition problem in terms of a planning problem--a well established field in Artificial Intelligence. For the planning problem, logic-based solvers can be used to find solutions that compute a useful function structure for the design process. Well-known function libraries from engineering are used as atomic planning steps. The algorithms are evaluated using two different application examples to ensure the transferability of a general function decomposition. 在产品设计中，将整个产品功能分解为一组较小的交互功能通常被认为是任何计算机支持的设计工具的关键第一步。在这里，我们提出了一种新的功能分解方法，特别适合后续基于人工智能的解决方案。所提出的方法根据规划问题（人工智能中一个成熟的领域）定义了分解问题。对于规划问题，基于逻辑的求解器可用于寻找计算设计过程有用的函数结构的解决方案。工程中众所周知的函数库被用作原子规划步骤。使用两个不同的应用示例来评估算法，以确保一般函数分解的可转移性。 提出一种基于规划的方法，用于产品设计中通用功能结构的分解，以支持后续人工智能解决方案。 Philipp Rosenthal,Niels Demke,Frank Mantwill,Oliver Niggemann cs.AI

authors_text: Jonathan Feldstein,Dominic Phillips,Efthymia Tsamoura
title: Principled and Efficient Motif Finding for Structure Learning of Lifted Graphical Models
title_zh: 用于提升图模型结构学习的有原则且有效的基序查找
comment: Submitted to AAAI23. 9 pages. Appendix included
comments: Submitted to AAAI23. 9 pages. Appendix included
abstract: Structure learning is a core problem in AI central to the fields of neuro-symbolic AI and statistical relational learning. It consists in automatically learning a logical theory from data. The basis for structure learning is mining repeating patterns in the data, known as structural motifs. Finding these patterns reduces the exponential search space and therefore guides the learning of formulas. Despite the importance of motif learning, it is still not well understood. We present the first principled approach for mining structural motifs in lifted graphical models, languages that blend first-order logic with probabilistic models, which uses a stochastic process to measure the similarity of entities in the data. Our first contribution is an algorithm, which depends on two intuitive hyperparameters: one controlling the uncertainty in the entity similarity measure, and one controlling the softness of the resulting rules. Our second contribution is a preprocessing step where we perform hierarchical clustering on the data to reduce the search space to the most relevant data. Our third contribution is to introduce an O(n ln n) (in the size of the entities in the data) algorithm for clustering structurally-related data. We evaluate our approach using standard benchmarks and show that we outperform state-of-the-art structure learning approaches by up to 6% in terms of accuracy and up to 80% in terms of runtime.
summary: Structure learning is a core problem in AI central to the fields of neuro-symbolic AI and statistical relational learning. It consists in automatically learning a logical theory from data. The basis for structure learning is mining repeating patterns in the data, known as structural motifs. Finding these patterns reduces the exponential search space and therefore guides the learning of formulas. Despite the importance of motif learning, it is still not well understood. We present the first principled approach for mining structural motifs in lifted graphical models, languages that blend first-order logic with probabilistic models, which uses a stochastic process to measure the similarity of entities in the data. Our first contribution is an algorithm, which depends on two intuitive hyperparameters: one controlling the uncertainty in the entity similarity measure, and one controlling the softness of the resulting rules. Our second contribution is a preprocessing step where we perform hierarchical clustering on the data to reduce the search space to the most relevant data. Our third contribution is to introduce an O(n ln n) (in the size of the entities in the data) algorithm for clustering structurally-related data. We evaluate our approach using standard benchmarks and show that we outperform state-of-the-art structure learning approaches by up to 6% in terms of accuracy and up to 80% in terms of runtime.
abstract_zh: 结构学习是人工智能的核心问题，是神经符号人工智能和统计关系学习领域的核心。它包括从数据中自动学习逻辑理论。结构学习的基础是挖掘数据中的重复模式，称为结构主题。找到这些模式可以减少指数搜索空间，从而指导公式的学习。尽管主题学习很重要，但它仍然没有得到很好的理解。我们提出了第一个在提升的图形模型中挖掘结构主题的原则性方法，这种语言将一阶逻辑与概率模型相结合，它使用随机过程来测量数据中实体的相似性。我们的第一个贡献是一种算法，它依赖于两个直观的超参数：一个控制实体相似性度量的不确定性，一个控制结果规则的柔软度。我们的第二个贡献是预处理步骤，我们对数据执行层次聚类，以将搜索空间缩小到最相关的数据。我们的第三个贡献是引入 O(n ln n)（数据中实体的大小）算法来对结构相关的数据进行聚类。我们使用标准基准评估我们的方法，结果表明，我们的准确性比最先进的结构学习方法高出 6%，运行时间高出 80%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效且有原则的方法，用于提升图模型结构学习中的结构模体挖掘。
AI.motivation: 结构学习是AI核心问题，但现有模体学习方法效率低且不明确，需减少搜索空间以提高准确率和效率。
AI.method: 基于随机过程的算法，包含两个超参数控制相似性不确定性和规则软度，结合层次聚类预处理与O(n ln n)聚类算法。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中，准确率提升最高6%，运行时间减少最高80%，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升结构学习的效率和准确性，为神经符号AI和统计关系学习提供新方向。

authors_text: Yuhe Ding,Jian Liang,Bo Jiang,Aihua Zheng,Ran He
title: MAPS: A Noise-Robust Progressive Learning Approach for Source-Free Domain Adaptive Keypoint Detection
title_zh: MAPS：一种用于无源域自适应关键点检测的抗噪声渐进式学习方法
abstract: Existing cross-domain keypoint detection methods always require accessing the source data during adaptation, which may violate the data privacy law and pose serious security concerns. Instead, this paper considers a realistic problem setting called source-free domain adaptive keypoint detection, where only the well-trained source model is provided to the target domain. For the challenging problem, we first construct a teacher-student learning baseline by stabilizing the predictions under data augmentation and network ensembles. Built on this, we further propose a unified approach, Mixup Augmentation and Progressive Selection (MAPS), to fully exploit the noisy pseudo labels of unlabeled target data during training. On the one hand, MAPS regularizes the model to favor simple linear behavior in-between the target samples via self-mixup augmentation, preventing the model from over-fitting to noisy predictions. On the other hand, MAPS employs the self-paced learning paradigm and progressively selects pseudo-labeled samples from `easy' to `hard' into the training process to reduce noise accumulation. Results on four keypoint detection datasets show that MAPS outperforms the baseline and achieves comparable or even better results in comparison to previous non-source-free counterparts.
summary: Existing cross-domain keypoint detection methods always require accessing the source data during adaptation, which may violate the data privacy law and pose serious security concerns. Instead, this paper considers a realistic problem setting called source-free domain adaptive keypoint detection, where only the well-trained source model is provided to the target domain. For the challenging problem, we first construct a teacher-student learning baseline by stabilizing the predictions under data augmentation and network ensembles. Built on this, we further propose a unified approach, Mixup Augmentation and Progressive Selection (MAPS), to fully exploit the noisy pseudo labels of unlabeled target data during training. On the one hand, MAPS regularizes the model to favor simple linear behavior in-between the target samples via self-mixup augmentation, preventing the model from over-fitting to noisy predictions. On the other hand, MAPS employs the self-paced learning paradigm and progressively selects pseudo-labeled samples from `easy' to `hard' into the training process to reduce noise accumulation. Results on four keypoint detection datasets show that MAPS outperforms the baseline and achieves comparable or even better results in comparison to previous non-source-free counterparts.
abstract_zh: 现有的跨域关键点检测方法在适应过程中总是需要访问源数据，这可能违反数据隐私法并带来严重的安全问题。相反，本文考虑了一种称为无源域自适应关键点检测的现实问题设置，其中仅向目标域提供经过良好训练的源模型。对于具有挑战性的问题，我们首先通过稳定数据增强和网络集成下的预测来构建师生学习基线。在此基础上，我们进一步提出了一种统一的方法，即混合增强和渐进选择（MAPS），以在训练期间充分利用未标记目标数据的噪声伪标签。一方面，MAPS 通过自混合增强对模型进行正则化，以支持目标样本之间的简单线性行为，从而防止模型过度拟合噪声预测。另一方面，MAPS采用自定进度学习范式，并从“容易”到“困难”逐步选择伪标记样本进入训练过程，以减少噪声积累。四个关键点检测数据集的结果表明，MAPS 的性能优于基线，与之前的非无源同行相比，取得了可比甚至更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MAPS的噪声鲁棒渐进学习方法，用于源自由域自适应关键点检测。
AI.motivation: 现有的跨域关键点检测方法需要访问源数据，这可能违反数据隐私法规并带来安全隐患。因此，本文研究了一种更现实的源自由域自适应关键点检测问题。
AI.method: 本文首先构建了一个基于教师-学生学习的基线，通过数据增强和网络集成稳定预测。在此基础上，提出了MAPS方法，通过自混合增强和渐进选择策略充分利用未标记目标数据的噪声伪标签。
AI.result: 在四个关键点检测数据集上的实验结果表明，MAPS优于基线，并且与之前的非源自由方法相比，取得了相当甚至更好的结果。
AI.conclusion: MAPS方法在源自由域自适应关键点检测任务中表现出色，能够有效处理噪声伪标签并提高模型性能。

On the one hand, MAPS regularizes the model to favor simple linear behavior in-between the target samples via self-mixup augmentation, preventing the model from over-fitting to noisy predictions. On the other hand, MAPS employs the self-paced learning paradigm and progressively selects pseudo-labeled samples from `easy' to `hard' into the training process to reduce noise accumulation. Results on four keypoint detection datasets show that MAPS outperforms the baseline and achieves comparable or even better results in comparison to previous non-source-free counterparts. 现有的跨域关键点检测方法在适应过程中总是需要访问源数据，这可能违反数据隐私法并带来严重的安全问题。相反，本文考虑了一种称为无源域自适应关键点检测的现实问题设置，其中仅向目标域提供经过良好训练的源模型。对于具有挑战性的问题，我们首先通过稳定数据增强和网络集成下的预测来构建师生学习基线。在此基础上，我们进一步提出了一种统一的方法，即混合增强和渐进选择（MAPS），以在训练期间充分利用未标记目标数据的噪声伪标签。一方面，MAPS 通过自混合增强对模型进行正则化，以支持目标样本之间的简单线性行为，从而防止模型过度拟合噪声预测。另一方面，MAPS采用自定进度学习范式，并从“容易”到“困难”逐步选择伪标记样本进入训练过程，以减少噪声积累。四个关键点检测数据集的结果表明，MAPS 的性能优于基线，与之前的非无源同行相比，取得了可比甚至更好的结果。 本文提出了一种名为MAPS的噪声鲁棒渐进学习方法，用于源自由域自适应关键点检测。 Yuhe Ding,Jian Liang,Bo Jiang,Aihua Zheng,Ran He cs.CV

authors_text: Soumick Chatterjee,Hana Haseljić,Robert Frysch,Vojtěch Kulvait,Vladimir Semshchikov,Bennet Hensen,Frank Wacker,Inga Brüschx,Thomas Werncke,Oliver Speck,Andreas Nürnberger,Georg Rose
title: Liver Segmentation in Time-resolved C-arm CT Volumes Reconstructed from Dynamic Perfusion Scans using Time Separation Technique
title_zh: 使用时间分离技术从动态灌注扫描重建的时间分辨 C 形臂 CT 体积中的肝脏分割
comment: ef:2022 IEEE 5th International Conference on Image Processing Applications and Systems (IPAS)
comments: ef:2022 IEEE 5th International Conference on Image Processing Applications and Systems (IPAS)
abstract: Perfusion imaging is a valuable tool for diagnosing and treatment planning for liver tumours. The time separation technique (TST) has been successfully used for modelling C-arm cone-beam computed tomography (CBCT) perfusion data. The reconstruction can be accompanied by the segmentation of the liver - for better visualisation and for generating comprehensive perfusion maps. Recently introduced Turbolift learning has been seen to perform well while working with TST reconstructions, but has not been explored for the time-resolved volumes (TRV) estimated out of TST reconstructions. The segmentation of the TRVs can be useful for tracking the movement of the liver over time. This research explores this possibility by training the multi-scale attention UNet of Turbolift learning at its third stage on the TRVs and shows the robustness of Turbolift learning since it can even work efficiently with the TRVs, resulting in a Dice score of 0.864$\pm$0.004.
summary: Perfusion imaging is a valuable tool for diagnosing and treatment planning for liver tumours. The time separation technique (TST) has been successfully used for modelling C-arm cone-beam computed tomography (CBCT) perfusion data. The reconstruction can be accompanied by the segmentation of the liver - for better visualisation and for generating comprehensive perfusion maps. Recently introduced Turbolift learning has been seen to perform well while working with TST reconstructions, but has not been explored for the time-resolved volumes (TRV) estimated out of TST reconstructions. The segmentation of the TRVs can be useful for tracking the movement of the liver over time. This research explores this possibility by training the multi-scale attention UNet of Turbolift learning at its third stage on the TRVs and shows the robustness of Turbolift learning since it can even work efficiently with the TRVs, resulting in a Dice score of 0.864$\pm$0.004.
abstract_zh: 灌注成像是肝脏肿瘤诊断和治疗计划的重要工具。时间分离技术 (TST) 已成功用于对 C 形臂锥形束计算机断层扫描 (CBCT) 灌注数据进行建模。重建可以伴随肝脏的分割——以获得更好的可视化并生成全面的灌注图。最近引入的 Turbolift 学习在处理 TST 重建时表现良好，但尚未针对 TST 重建估计的时间分辨体积 (TRV) 进行探索。 TRV 的分割可用于跟踪肝脏随时间的运动。本研究通过在 TRV 上训练 Turbolift 学习第三阶段的多尺度注意力 UNet 来探索这种可能性，并展示了 Turbolift 学习的鲁棒性，因为它甚至可以与 TRV 有效地协同工作，导致 Dice 得分为 0.864$\pm$0.004。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了使用时间分离技术（TST）重建的动态灌注扫描时间分辨体积（TRV）中的肝脏分割方法。
AI.motivation: 灌注成像对肝肿瘤的诊断和治疗计划具有重要意义，而时间分离技术（TST）已被成功用于建模C臂锥束CT（CBCT）灌注数据。然而，TST重建的TRV中尚未探索肝脏分割的可能性。
AI.method: 该研究通过在Turbolift学习的第三阶段训练多尺度注意力UNet模型，对TRV进行肝脏分割。
AI.result: 该方法在TRV上实现了Dice分数为0.864±0.004的分割结果，展示了Turbolift学习方法的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: Turbolift学习方法能够有效处理TRV，并在肝脏分割任务中表现出良好的性能。

authors_text: Soumick Chatterjee,Pavan Tummala,Oliver Speck,Andreas Nürnberger
title: Complex Network for Complex Problems: A comparative study of CNN and Complex-valued CNN
title_zh: 解决复杂问题的复杂网络：CNN 和复值 CNN 的比较研究
comment: ef:2022 IEEE 5th International Conference on Image Processing Applications and Systems (IPAS)
comments: ef:2022 IEEE 5th International Conference on Image Processing Applications and Systems (IPAS)
abstract: Neural networks, especially convolutional neural networks (CNN), are one of the most common tools these days used in computer vision. Most of these networks work with real-valued data using real-valued features. Complex-valued convolutional neural networks (CV-CNN) can preserve the algebraic structure of complex-valued input data and have the potential to learn more complex relationships between the input and the ground-truth. Although some comparisons of CNNs and CV-CNNs for different tasks have been performed in the past, a large-scale investigation comparing different models operating on different tasks has not been conducted. Furthermore, because complex features contain both real and imaginary components, CV-CNNs have double the number of trainable parameters as real-valued CNNs in terms of the actual number of trainable parameters. Whether or not the improvements in performance with CV-CNN observed in the past have been because of the complex features or just because of having double the number of trainable parameters has not yet been explored. This paper presents a comparative study of CNN, CNNx2 (CNN with double the number of trainable parameters as the CNN), and CV-CNN. The experiments were performed using seven models for two different tasks - brain tumour classification and segmentation in brain MRIs. The results have revealed that the CV-CNN models outperformed the CNN and CNNx2 models.
summary: Neural networks, especially convolutional neural networks (CNN), are one of the most common tools these days used in computer vision. Most of these networks work with real-valued data using real-valued features. Complex-valued convolutional neural networks (CV-CNN) can preserve the algebraic structure of complex-valued input data and have the potential to learn more complex relationships between the input and the ground-truth. Although some comparisons of CNNs and CV-CNNs for different tasks have been performed in the past, a large-scale investigation comparing different models operating on different tasks has not been conducted. Furthermore, because complex features contain both real and imaginary components, CV-CNNs have double the number of trainable parameters as real-valued CNNs in terms of the actual number of trainable parameters. Whether or not the improvements in performance with CV-CNN observed in the past have been because of the complex features or just because of having double the number of trainable parameters has not yet been explored. This paper presents a comparative study of CNN, CNNx2 (CNN with double the number of trainable parameters as the CNN), and CV-CNN. The experiments were performed using seven models for two different tasks - brain tumour classification and segmentation in brain MRIs. The results have revealed that the CV-CNN models outperformed the CNN and CNNx2 models.
abstract_zh: 神经网络，尤其是卷积神经网络（CNN），是当今计算机视觉中最常用的工具之一。这些网络中的大多数都使用实值特征来处理实值数据。复值卷积神经网络（CV-CNN）可以保留复值输入数据的代数结构，并且有可能学习输入和真实值之间更复杂的关系。尽管过去已经针对不同任务对 CNN 和 CV-CNN 进行了一些比较，但尚未进行比较不同任务上不同模型的大规模研究。此外，由于复杂特征同时包含实部和虚部，因此 CV-CNN 的可训练参数数量是实值 CNN 的实际可训练参数数量的两倍。过去观察到的 CV-CNN 性能提升是因为复杂的特征，还是仅仅因为可训练参数的数量增加了一倍，目前尚未被探索。本文对 CNN、CNNx2（可训练参数数量是 CNN 的两倍的 CNN）和 CV-CNN 进行了比较研究。实验使用七个模型进行两项不同的任务——脑肿瘤分类和脑 MRI 分割。结果表明，CV-CNN 模型优于 CNN 和 CNNx2 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文对比研究了卷积神经网络（CNN）、参数量翻倍的CNN（CNNx2）和复值卷积神经网络（CV-CNN）在脑部MRI肿瘤分类与分割任务中的性能差异。
AI.motivation: 尽管复值卷积神经网络（CV-CNN）在复杂数据建模中展现潜力，但其性能优势源于复数特征本身还是参数量翻倍尚无明确结论，需系统性对比验证。
AI.method: 基于七种模型架构，在脑部MRI的肿瘤分类和分割两个任务中，对比测试CNN、CNNx2（参数量为CNN两倍）和CV-CNN的性能表现。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，CV-CNN在分类和分割任务中均显著优于CNN和CNNx2模型。
AI.conclusion: 复值特征而非单纯参数量增加是CV-CNN性能优势的主要来源，复数神经网络在处理复杂数据关系时更具潜力。

authors_text: Xin Huang,Erel Segal-Halevi
title: A Reduction from Chores Allocation to Job Scheduling
title_zh: 从家务分配减少到工作安排
comment: Full version of paper accepted to EC 2023. Made minor corrections to images and notation
comments: Full version of paper accepted to EC 2023. Made minor corrections to images and notation
abstract: We consider allocating indivisible chores among agents with different cost functions, such that all agents receive a cost of at most a constant factor times their maximin share. The state-of-the-art was presented in In EC 2021 by Huang and Lu. They presented a non-polynomial-time algorithm, called HFFD, that attains an 11/9 approximation, and a polynomial-time algorithm that attains a 5/4 approximation. In this paper, we show that HFFD can be reduced to an algorithm called MultiFit, developed by Coffman, Garey and Johnson in 1978 for makespan minimization in job scheduling. Using this reduction, we prove that the approximation ratio of HFFD is in fact equal to that of MultiFit, which is known to be 13/11 in general, 20/17 for n at most 7, and 15/13 for n=3. Moreover, we develop an algorithm for (13/11+epsilon)-maximin-share allocation for any epsilon>0, with run-time polynomial in the problem size and 1/epsilon. For n=3, we can improve the algorithm to find a 15/13-maximin-share allocation with run-time polynomial in the problem size. Thus, we have practical algorithms that attain the best known approximation to maximin-share chore allocation.
summary: We consider allocating indivisible chores among agents with different cost functions, such that all agents receive a cost of at most a constant factor times their maximin share. The state-of-the-art was presented in In EC 2021 by Huang and Lu. They presented a non-polynomial-time algorithm, called HFFD, that attains an 11/9 approximation, and a polynomial-time algorithm that attains a 5/4 approximation. In this paper, we show that HFFD can be reduced to an algorithm called MultiFit, developed by Coffman, Garey and Johnson in 1978 for makespan minimization in job scheduling. Using this reduction, we prove that the approximation ratio of HFFD is in fact equal to that of MultiFit, which is known to be 13/11 in general, 20/17 for n at most 7, and 15/13 for n=3. Moreover, we develop an algorithm for (13/11+epsilon)-maximin-share allocation for any epsilon>0, with run-time polynomial in the problem size and 1/epsilon. For n=3, we can improve the algorithm to find a 15/13-maximin-share allocation with run-time polynomial in the problem size. Thus, we have practical algorithms that attain the best known approximation to maximin-share chore allocation.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑在具有不同成本函数的代理之间分配不可分割的杂务，这样所有代理所获得的成本最多为常数因子乘以其最大份额。 Huang 和 Lu 在 EC 2021 上展示了最先进的技术。他们提出了一种称为 HFFD 的非多项式时间算法，可达到 11/9 的近似值，以及一种可达到 5/4 近似值的多项式时间算法。在本文中，我们展示了 HFFD 可以简化为一种称为 MultiFit 的算法，该算法由 Coffman、Garey 和 Johnson 于 1978 年开发，用于作业调度中的完工时间最小化。使用这种减少，我们证明了 HFFD 的近似比实际上等于 MultiFit 的近似比，已知一般情况下为 13/11，对于 n 至多 7 为 20/17，对于 n=3 为 15/13。此外，我们开发了一种针对任何 epsilon>0 的 (13/11+epsilon)-maximin-share 分配的算法，其中运行时多项式为问题大小和 1/epsilon。对于 n=3，我们可以改进算法，以在问题大小中找到具有运行时多项式的 15/13 最大最小份额分配。因此，我们拥有实用的算法，可以实现最大最小份额杂务分配的最著名近似值。

AI.motivation: 现有家务分配算法存在近似比高或非多项式时间复杂度的问题，需寻找更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 将HFFD算法归约到作业调度中的MultiFit算法，利用其已知近似比并改进算法设计。
AI.result: 证明HFFD近似比等同于MultiFit的13/11，并提出针对n=3时15/13近似比的多项式时间算法。
AI.conclusion: 通过算法归约实现了当前最优的家务分配近似比，为实际应用提供了高效方案。

search_text: A Reduction from Chores Allocation to Job Scheduling 从家务分配减少到工作安排 We consider allocating indivisible chores among agents with different cost functions, such that all agents receive a cost of at most a constant factor times their maximin share. The state-of-the-art was presented in In EC 2021 by Huang and Lu. They presented a non-polynomial-time algorithm, called HFFD, that attains an 11/9 approximation, and a polynomial-time algorithm that attains a 5/4 approximation. In this paper, we show that HFFD can be reduced to an algorithm called MultiFit, developed by Coffman, Garey and Johnson in 1978 for makespan minimization in job scheduling. Using this reduction, we prove that the approximation ratio of HFFD is in fact equal to that of MultiFit, which is known to be 13/11 in general, 20/17 for n at most 7, and 15/13 for n=3. Moreover, we develop an algorithm for (13/11+epsilon)-maximin-share allocation for any epsilon>0, with run-time polynomial in the problem size and 1/epsilon. For n=3, we can improve the algorithm to find a 15/13-maximin-share allocation with run-time polynomial in the problem size. Thus, we have practical algorithms that attain the best known approximation to maximin-share chore allocation. 我们考虑在具有不同成本函数的代理之间分配不可分割的杂务，这样所有代理所获得的成本最多为常数因子乘以其最大份额。 Huang 和 Lu 在 EC 2021 上展示了最先进的技术。他们提出了一种称为 HFFD 的非多项式时间算法，可达到 11/9 的近似值，以及一种可达到 5/4 近似值的多项式时间算法。在本文中，我们展示了 HFFD 可以简化为一种称为 MultiFit 的算法，该算法由 Coffman、Garey 和 Johnson 于 1978 年开发，用于作业调度中的完工时间最小化。使用这种减少，我们证明了 HFFD 的近似比实际上等于 MultiFit 的近似比，已知一般情况下为 13/11，对于 n 至多 7 为 20/17，对于 n=3 为 15/13。此外，我们开发了一种针对任何 epsilon>0 的 (13/11+epsilon)-maximin-share 分配的算法，其中运行时多项式为问题大小和 1/epsilon。对于 n=3，我们可以改进算法，以在问题大小中找到具有运行时多项式的 15/13 最大最小份额分配。因此，我们拥有实用的算法，可以实现最大最小份额杂务分配的最著名近似值。 本文将不可分割的家务分配问题转化为作业调度问题，通过算法转换提升近似比。 Xin Huang,Erel Segal-Halevi cs.GT,cs.DS

authors_text: Shuaiqi Liu,Jiannong Cao,Ruosong Yang,Zhiyuan Wen
title: Generating a Structured Summary of Numerous Academic Papers: Dataset and Method
title_zh: 生成大量学术论文的结构化摘要：数据集和方法
abstract: Writing a survey paper on one research topic usually needs to cover the salient content from numerous related papers, which can be modeled as a multi-document summarization (MDS) task. Existing MDS datasets usually focus on producing the structureless summary covering a few input documents. Meanwhile, previous structured summary generation works focus on summarizing a single document into a multi-section summary. These existing datasets and methods cannot meet the requirements of summarizing numerous academic papers into a structured summary. To deal with the scarcity of available data, we propose BigSurvey, the first large-scale dataset for generating comprehensive summaries of numerous academic papers on each topic. We collect target summaries from more than seven thousand survey papers and utilize their 430 thousand reference papers' abstracts as input documents. To organize the diverse content from dozens of input documents and ensure the efficiency of processing long text sequences, we propose a summarization method named category-based alignment and sparse transformer (CAST). The experimental results show that our CAST method outperforms various advanced summarization methods.
summary: Writing a survey paper on one research topic usually needs to cover the salient content from numerous related papers, which can be modeled as a multi-document summarization (MDS) task. Existing MDS datasets usually focus on producing the structureless summary covering a few input documents. Meanwhile, previous structured summary generation works focus on summarizing a single document into a multi-section summary. These existing datasets and methods cannot meet the requirements of summarizing numerous academic papers into a structured summary. To deal with the scarcity of available data, we propose BigSurvey, the first large-scale dataset for generating comprehensive summaries of numerous academic papers on each topic. We collect target summaries from more than seven thousand survey papers and utilize their 430 thousand reference papers' abstracts as input documents. To organize the diverse content from dozens of input documents and ensure the efficiency of processing long text sequences, we propose a summarization method named category-based alignment and sparse transformer (CAST). The experimental results show that our CAST method outperforms various advanced summarization methods.
abstract_zh: 撰写关于一个研究主题的调查论文通常需要涵盖大量相关论文的显着内容，这可以建模为多文档摘要（MDS）任务。现有的 MDS 数据集通常专注于生成涵盖一些输入文档的无结构摘要。同时，以前的结构化摘要生成工作侧重于将单个文档摘要为多部分摘要。这些现有的数据集和方法无法满足将大量学术论文归纳为结构化摘要的要求。为了解决可用数据的稀缺问题，我们提出了 BigSurvey，这是第一个大型数据集，用于生成每个主题的大量学术论文的综合摘要。我们从 7000 多篇调查论文中收集目标摘要，并利用 43 万篇参考论文的摘要作为输入文档。为了组织来自数十个输入文档的不同内容并确保处理长文本序列的效率，我们提出了一种称为基于类别的对齐和稀疏变换器（CAST）的摘要方法。实验结果表明，我们的 CAST 方法优于各种先进的摘要方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BigSurvey数据集和CAST方法，用于生成大量学术论文的结构化摘要。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集和方法无法满足多篇论文生成结构化摘要的需求，缺乏大规模数据和有效处理长文本的模型。
AI.method: 构建包含7000篇综述论文及其43万参考文献摘要的BigSurvey数据集，并设计基于类别对齐与稀疏Transformer的CAST方法。
AI.result: CAST方法在实验中优于多种先进摘要生成模型，能高效处理长文本并组织多文档内容。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的BigSurvey和CAST方法为多文档结构化摘要任务提供了新数据和新范式，具有学术价值。

authors_text: Chumeng Liang,Xiaoyu Wu,Yang Hua,Jiaru Zhang,Yiming Xue,Tao Song,Zhengui Xue,Ruhui Ma,Haibing Guan
title: Adversarial Example Does Good: Preventing Painting Imitation from Diffusion Models via Adversarial Examples
title_zh: 对抗性例子有好处：通过对抗性例子防止扩散模型中的绘画模仿
abstract: Recently, Diffusion Models (DMs) boost a wave in AI for Art yet raise new copyright concerns, where infringers benefit from using unauthorized paintings to train DMs to generate novel paintings in a similar style. To address these emerging copyright violations, in this paper, we are the first to explore and propose to utilize adversarial examples for DMs to protect human-created artworks. Specifically, we first build a theoretical framework to define and evaluate the adversarial examples for DMs. Then, based on this framework, we design a novel algorithm, named AdvDM, which exploits a Monte-Carlo estimation of adversarial examples for DMs by optimizing upon different latent variables sampled from the reverse process of DMs. Extensive experiments show that the generated adversarial examples can effectively hinder DMs from extracting their features. Therefore, our method can be a powerful tool for human artists to protect their copyright against infringers equipped with DM-based AI-for-Art applications. The code of our method is available on GitHub: https://github.com/mist-project/mist.git.
summary: Recently, Diffusion Models (DMs) boost a wave in AI for Art yet raise new copyright concerns, where infringers benefit from using unauthorized paintings to train DMs to generate novel paintings in a similar style. To address these emerging copyright violations, in this paper, we are the first to explore and propose to utilize adversarial examples for DMs to protect human-created artworks. Specifically, we first build a theoretical framework to define and evaluate the adversarial examples for DMs. Then, based on this framework, we design a novel algorithm, named AdvDM, which exploits a Monte-Carlo estimation of adversarial examples for DMs by optimizing upon different latent variables sampled from the reverse process of DMs. Extensive experiments show that the generated adversarial examples can effectively hinder DMs from extracting their features. Therefore, our method can be a powerful tool for human artists to protect their copyright against infringers equipped with DM-based AI-for-Art applications. The code of our method is available on GitHub: https://github.com/mist-project/mist.git.
abstract_zh: 最近，扩散模型 (DM) 掀起了艺术人工智能浪潮，但也引发了新的版权问题，侵权者通过使用未经授权的绘画来训练 DM 生成类似风格的新颖绘画而受益。为了解决这些新出现的版权侵权问题，在本文中，我们首次探索并提出利用 DM 的对抗性示例来保护人类创作的艺术品。具体来说，我们首先构建一个理论框架来定义和评估 DM 的对抗性示例。然后，基于这个框架，我们设计了一种名为 AdvDM 的新颖算法，该算法通过优化从 DM 逆过程中采样的不同潜在变量来利用 DM 对抗性示例的蒙特卡洛估计。大量实验表明，生成的对抗性示例可以有效阻止 DM 提取其特征。因此，我们的方法可以成为人类艺术家保护其版权免受配备基于 DM 的 AI-for Art 应用程序的侵权者的强大工具。我们方法的代码可以在 GitHub 上找到：https://github.com/mist-project/mist.git。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用对抗样本防止扩散模型（DMs）模仿绘画，以保护人类艺术家的版权。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在AI艺术领域广泛应用，但侵权者可能利用未经授权的画作训练模型生成相似作品，导致版权风险。
AI.method: 构建对抗样本理论框架，设计AdvDM算法，通过蒙特卡洛估计优化扩散模型反向过程中的潜在变量生成对抗样本。
AI.result: 实验表明生成的对抗样本能有效阻碍扩散模型提取特征，显著降低侵权模仿效果。
AI.conclusion: AdvDM方法为艺术家提供了对抗基于扩散模型的AI侵权行为的有效工具。

Specifically, we first build a theoretical framework to define and evaluate the adversarial examples for DMs. Then, based on this framework, we design a novel algorithm, named AdvDM, which exploits a Monte-Carlo estimation of adversarial examples for DMs by optimizing upon different latent variables sampled from the reverse process of DMs. Extensive experiments show that the generated adversarial examples can effectively hinder DMs from extracting their features. Therefore, our method can be a powerful tool for human artists to protect their copyright against infringers equipped with DM-based AI-for-Art applications. The code of our method is available on GitHub: https://github.com/mist-project/mist.git. 最近，扩散模型 (DM) 掀起了艺术人工智能浪潮，但也引发了新的版权问题，侵权者通过使用未经授权的绘画来训练 DM 生成类似风格的新颖绘画而受益。为了解决这些新出现的版权侵权问题，在本文中，我们首次探索并提出利用 DM 的对抗性示例来保护人类创作的艺术品。具体来说，我们首先构建一个理论框架来定义和评估 DM 的对抗性示例。然后，基于这个框架，我们设计了一种名为 AdvDM 的新颖算法，该算法通过优化从 DM 逆过程中采样的不同潜在变量来利用 DM 对抗性示例的蒙特卡洛估计。大量实验表明，生成的对抗性示例可以有效阻止 DM 提取其特征。因此，我们的方法可以成为人类艺术家保护其版权免受配备基于 DM 的 AI-for Art 应用程序的侵权者的强大工具。我们方法的代码可以在 GitHub 上找到：https://github.com/mist-project/mist.git。 本文提出利用对抗样本防止扩散模型（DMs）模仿绘画，以保护人类艺术家的版权。 Chumeng Liang,Xiaoyu Wu,Yang Hua,Jiaru Zhang,Yiming Xue,Tao Song,Zhengui Xue,Ruhui Ma,Haibing Guan cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CR,cs.LG

authors_text: Shivangi Ranjan,Vishal Srivastava
title: Incorporating Total Variation Regularization in the design of an intelligent Query by Humming system
title_zh: 将全变分正则化纳入智能查询系统的设计中
abstract: A Query-By-Humming (QBH) system constitutes a particular case of music information retrieval where the input is a user-hummed melody and the output is the original song which contains that melody. A typical QBH system consists of melody extraction and candidate melody retrieval. For melody extraction, accurate note transcription is the key enabling technology. However, current transcription methods are unable to definitively capture the melody and address inaccuracies in user-hummed queries. In this paper, we incorporate Total Variation Regularization (TVR) to denoise queries. This approach accounts for user error in humming without loss of meaningful data and reliably captures the underlying melody. For candidate melody retrieval, we employ a deep learning approach to time series classification using a Fully Convolutional Neural Network. The trained network classifies the incoming query as belonging to one of the target songs. For our experiments, we use Roger Jang's MIR-QBSH dataset which is the standard MIREX dataset. We demonstrate that inclusion of TVR denoised queries in the training set enhances the overall accuracy of the system to 93% which is higher than other state-of-the-art QBH systems.
summary: A Query-By-Humming (QBH) system constitutes a particular case of music information retrieval where the input is a user-hummed melody and the output is the original song which contains that melody. A typical QBH system consists of melody extraction and candidate melody retrieval. For melody extraction, accurate note transcription is the key enabling technology. However, current transcription methods are unable to definitively capture the melody and address inaccuracies in user-hummed queries. In this paper, we incorporate Total Variation Regularization (TVR) to denoise queries. This approach accounts for user error in humming without loss of meaningful data and reliably captures the underlying melody. For candidate melody retrieval, we employ a deep learning approach to time series classification using a Fully Convolutional Neural Network. The trained network classifies the incoming query as belonging to one of the target songs. For our experiments, we use Roger Jang's MIR-QBSH dataset which is the standard MIREX dataset. We demonstrate that inclusion of TVR denoised queries in the training set enhances the overall accuracy of the system to 93% which is higher than other state-of-the-art QBH systems.
abstract_zh: 哼唱查询（QBH）系统构成了音乐信息检索的特殊情况，其中输入是用户哼唱的旋律，输出是包含该旋律的原始歌曲。典型的QBH系统由旋律提取和候选旋律检索组成。对于旋律提取，准确的音符转录是关键的支持技术。然而，当前的转录方法无法明确捕捉旋律并解决用户哼唱查询中的不准确问题。在本文中，我们结合全变分正则化（TVR）来对查询进行降噪。这种方法可以解决用户哼唱时的错误，而不会丢失有意义的数据，并可靠地捕获潜在的旋律。对于候选旋律检索，我们采用深度学习方法，使用全卷积神经网络进行时间序列分类。经过训练的网络将传入的查询分类为属于目标歌曲之一。在我们的实验中，我们使用 Roger Jang 的 MIR-QBSH 数据集，它是标准的 MIREX 数据集。我们证明，在训练集中包含 TVR 去噪查询可将系统的整体准确率提高到 93%，这高于其他最先进的 QBH 系统。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种结合总变分正则化的智能查询哼唱系统，通过去噪和深度学习提升旋律检索准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有查询哼唱系统难以准确捕捉用户哼唱的旋律并处理噪声，影响检索效果。
AI.method: 引入总变分正则化（TVR）去噪用户哼唱查询，并采用全卷积神经网络进行旋律分类。
AI.result: 在MIR-QBSH数据集上实现93%的检索准确率，优于现有先进系统。
AI.conclusion: TVR与深度学习结合有效提升系统鲁棒性，未来可探索更优的去噪与分类模型融合方案。

authors_text: Christian Hänig,Markus Schlösser,Serhii Hamotskyi,Gent Zambaku,Janek Blankenburg
title: NLP-based Decision Support System for Examination of Eligibility Criteria from Securities Prospectuses at the German Central Bank
title_zh: 基于 NLP 的德国央行证券招股说明书资格标准审查决策支持系统
comment: Accepted for AAAI23 B8: AI for Financial Institutions
comments: Accepted for AAAI23 B8: AI for Financial Institutions
abstract: As part of its digitization initiative, the German Central Bank (Deutsche Bundesbank) wants to examine the extent to which natural Language Processing (NLP) can be used to make independent decisions upon the eligibility criteria of securities prospectuses. Every month, the Directorate General Markets at the German Central Bank receives hundreds of scanned prospectuses in PDF format, which must be manually processed to decide upon their eligibility. We found that this tedious and time-consuming process can be (semi-)automated by employing modern NLP model architectures, which learn the linguistic feature representation in text to identify the present eligible and ineligible criteria. The proposed Decision Support System provides decisions of document-level eligibility criteria accompanied by human-understandable explanations of the decisions. The aim of this project is to model the described use case and to evaluate the extent to which current research results from the field of NLP can be applied to this problem. After creating a heterogeneous domain-specific dataset containing annotations of eligible and non-eligible mentions of relevant criteria, we were able to successfully build, train and deploy a semi-automatic decider model. This model is based on transformer-based language models and decision trees, which integrate the established rule-based parts of the decision processes. Results suggest that it is possible to efficiently model the problem and automate decision making to more than 90% for many of the considered eligibility criteria.
summary: As part of its digitization initiative, the German Central Bank (Deutsche Bundesbank) wants to examine the extent to which natural Language Processing (NLP) can be used to make independent decisions upon the eligibility criteria of securities prospectuses. Every month, the Directorate General Markets at the German Central Bank receives hundreds of scanned prospectuses in PDF format, which must be manually processed to decide upon their eligibility. We found that this tedious and time-consuming process can be (semi-)automated by employing modern NLP model architectures, which learn the linguistic feature representation in text to identify the present eligible and ineligible criteria. The proposed Decision Support System provides decisions of document-level eligibility criteria accompanied by human-understandable explanations of the decisions. The aim of this project is to model the described use case and to evaluate the extent to which current research results from the field of NLP can be applied to this problem. After creating a heterogeneous domain-specific dataset containing annotations of eligible and non-eligible mentions of relevant criteria, we were able to successfully build, train and deploy a semi-automatic decider model. This model is based on transformer-based language models and decision trees, which integrate the established rule-based parts of the decision processes. Results suggest that it is possible to efficiently model the problem and automate decision making to more than 90% for many of the considered eligibility criteria.
abstract_zh: 作为数字化计划的一部分，德国中央银行 (Deutsche Bundesbank) 希望研究自然语言处理 (NLP) 在多大程度上可用于根据证券招股说明书的资格标准做出独立决策。德国中央银行市场总局每个月都会收到数百份 PDF 格式的招股说明书扫描件，这些招股说明书必须经过手动处理才能确定其资格。我们发现，这个繁琐且耗时的过程可以通过采用现代 NLP 模型架构实现（半）自动化，该模型架构学习文本中的语言特征表示，以识别当前合格和不合格的标准。拟议的决策支持系统提供文档级资格标准的决策，并附有人类可理解的决策解释。该项目的目的是对所描述的用例进行建模，并评估 NLP 领域当前的研究成果可以在多大程度上应用于该问题。创建包含相关标准的合格和不合格提及注释的异构特定领域数据集后，我们能够成功构建、训练和部署半自动决策模型。该模型基于基于变压器的语言模型和决策树，集成了决策过程中已建立的基于规则的部分。结果表明，对于许多考虑的资格标准，可以有效地对问题进行建模并将决策自动化到 90% 以上。

AI.tldr: 开发基于自然语言处理（NLP）的决策支持系统，用于自动化审查德国央行接收的证券要约书是否符合资格标准。
AI.motivation: 德国央行每月需手动处理大量证券要约书的资格审查，该流程耗时且效率低下，亟需通过NLP技术实现半自动化以提高处理效率。
AI.method: 构建基于Transformer语言模型与决策树的混合模型，结合领域特定数据集进行训练，并集成规则驱动的决策逻辑。
AI.result: 系统在多个资格标准上的自动化决策准确率超过90%，成功实现半自动化的资格审查流程。
AI.conclusion: 现代NLP技术可有效应用于证券要约书资格审查场景，显著提升德国央行相关工作的自动化水平与决策效率。

authors_text: Minqi Jiang,Chaochuan Hou,Ao Zheng,Xiyang Hu,Songqiao Han,Hailiang Huang,Xiangnan He,Philip S. Yu,Yue Zhao
title: Weakly Supervised Anomaly Detection: A Survey
title_zh: 弱监督异常检测：一项调查
abstract: Anomaly detection (AD) is a crucial task in machine learning with various applications, such as detecting emerging diseases, identifying financial frauds, and detecting fake news. However, obtaining complete, accurate, and precise labels for AD tasks can be expensive and challenging due to the cost and difficulties in data annotation. To address this issue, researchers have developed AD methods that can work with incomplete, inexact, and inaccurate supervision, collectively summarized as weakly supervised anomaly detection (WSAD) methods. In this study, we present the first comprehensive survey of WSAD methods by categorizing them into the above three weak supervision settings across four data modalities (i.e., tabular, graph, time-series, and image/video data). For each setting, we provide formal definitions, key algorithms, and potential future directions. To support future research, we conduct experiments on a selected setting and release the source code, along with a collection of WSAD methods and data.
summary: Anomaly detection (AD) is a crucial task in machine learning with various applications, such as detecting emerging diseases, identifying financial frauds, and detecting fake news. However, obtaining complete, accurate, and precise labels for AD tasks can be expensive and challenging due to the cost and difficulties in data annotation. To address this issue, researchers have developed AD methods that can work with incomplete, inexact, and inaccurate supervision, collectively summarized as weakly supervised anomaly detection (WSAD) methods. In this study, we present the first comprehensive survey of WSAD methods by categorizing them into the above three weak supervision settings across four data modalities (i.e., tabular, graph, time-series, and image/video data). For each setting, we provide formal definitions, key algorithms, and potential future directions. To support future research, we conduct experiments on a selected setting and release the source code, along with a collection of WSAD methods and data.
abstract_zh: 异常检测（AD）是机器学习中的一项重要任务，具有多种应用，例如检测新出现的疾病、识别金融欺诈和检测虚假新闻。然而，由于数据注释的成本和困难，为 AD 任务获得完整、准确和精确的标签可能是昂贵且具有挑战性的。为了解决这个问题，研究人员开发了可以处理不完整、不精确和不准确监督的AD方法，统称为弱监督异常检测（WSAD）方法。在本研究中，我们通过四种数据模式（即表格、图表、时间序列和图像/视频数据）将 WSAD 方法分类为上述三种弱监督设置，首次对 WSAD 方法进行了全面调查。对于每个设置，我们提供正式定义、关键算法和潜在的未来方向。为了支持未来的研究，我们在选定的设置上进行实验并发布源代码以及 WSAD 方法和数据的集合。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了弱监督异常检测（WSAD）方法，按三种弱监督设置和四种数据模态分类，总结算法并提供实验验证。
AI.motivation: 传统异常检测依赖精确标注数据，但实际中标签获取成本高且困难，需发展弱监督方法以应对不完整、不精确或不准确的监督信息。
AI.method: 将WSAD方法按弱监督类型（不完整/不精确/不准确）和数据模态（表格/图/时序/图像视频）分类，总结关键算法、定义及未来方向，并在选定设置上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 完成WSAD方法的系统性分类与总结，提出未来研究方向，通过实验验证部分方法，并开源代码及方法集合。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为WSAD研究提供全面参考，指出跨模态与多弱监督设置的结合是未来重点，实验资源有助于推动领域发展。
