search_text: Weakly Supervised Anomaly Detection: A Survey 弱监督异常检测：一项调查 Anomaly detection (AD) is a crucial task in machine learning with various applications, such as detecting emerging diseases, identifying financial frauds, and detecting fake news. However, obtaining complete, accurate, and precise labels for AD tasks can be expensive and challenging due to the cost and difficulties in data annotation. To address this issue, researchers have developed AD methods that can work with incomplete, inexact, and inaccurate supervision, collectively summarized as weakly supervised anomaly detection (WSAD) methods. In this study, we present the first comprehensive survey of WSAD methods by categorizing them into the above three weak supervision settings across four data modalities (i.e., tabular, graph, time-series, and image/video data). For each setting, we provide formal definitions, key algorithms, and potential future directions. To support future research, we conduct experiments on a selected setting and release the source code, along with a collection of WSAD methods and data. 异常检测（AD）是机器学习中的一项重要任务，具有多种应用，例如检测新出现的疾病、识别金融欺诈和检测虚假新闻。然而，由于数据注释的成本和困难，为 AD 任务获得完整、准确和精确的标签可能是昂贵且具有挑战性的。为了解决这个问题，研究人员开发了可以处理不完整、不精确和不准确监督的AD方法，统称为弱监督异常检测（WSAD）方法。在本研究中，我们通过四种数据模式（即表格、图表、时间序列和图像/视频数据）将 WSAD 方法分类为上述三种弱监督设置，首次对 WSAD 方法进行了全面调查。对于每个设置，我们提供正式定义、关键算法和潜在的未来方向。为了支持未来的研究，我们在选定的设置上进行实验并发布源代码以及 WSAD 方法和数据的集合。 本文系统综述了弱监督异常检测（WSAD）方法，按三种弱监督设置和四种数据模态分类，总结算法并提供实验验证。 Minqi Jiang,Chaochuan Hou,Ao Zheng,Xiyang Hu,Songqiao Han,Hailiang Huang,Xiangnan He,Philip S. Yu,Yue Zhao cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Qi Chen,Chao Li,Jia Ning,Stephen Lin,Kun He
title: GMConv: Modulating Effective Receptive Fields for Convolutional Kernels
title_zh: GMConv：调节卷积核的有效感受野
abstract: In convolutional neural networks, the convolutions are conventionally performed using a square kernel with a fixed N $\times$ N receptive field (RF). However, what matters most to the network is the effective receptive field (ERF) that indicates the extent with which input pixels contribute to an output pixel. Inspired by the property that ERFs typically exhibit a Gaussian distribution, we propose a Gaussian Mask convolutional kernel (GMConv) in this work. Specifically, GMConv utilizes the Gaussian function to generate a concentric symmetry mask that is placed over the kernel to refine the RF. Our GMConv can directly replace the standard convolutions in existing CNNs and can be easily trained end-to-end by standard back-propagation. We evaluate our approach through extensive experiments on image classification and object detection tasks. Over several tasks and standard base models, our approach compares favorably against the standard convolution. For instance, using GMConv for AlexNet and ResNet-50, the top-1 accuracy on ImageNet classification is boosted by 0.98% and 0.85%, respectively.
summary: In convolutional neural networks, the convolutions are conventionally performed using a square kernel with a fixed N $\times$ N receptive field (RF). However, what matters most to the network is the effective receptive field (ERF) that indicates the extent with which input pixels contribute to an output pixel. Inspired by the property that ERFs typically exhibit a Gaussian distribution, we propose a Gaussian Mask convolutional kernel (GMConv) in this work. Specifically, GMConv utilizes the Gaussian function to generate a concentric symmetry mask that is placed over the kernel to refine the RF. Our GMConv can directly replace the standard convolutions in existing CNNs and can be easily trained end-to-end by standard back-propagation. We evaluate our approach through extensive experiments on image classification and object detection tasks. Over several tasks and standard base models, our approach compares favorably against the standard convolution. For instance, using GMConv for AlexNet and ResNet-50, the top-1 accuracy on ImageNet classification is boosted by 0.98% and 0.85%, respectively.
abstract_zh: 在卷积神经网络中，卷积通常使用具有固定 N $\times$ N 感受野 (RF) 的方核来执行。然而，对网络来说最重要的是有效感受野（ERF），它指示输入像素对输出像素的贡献程度。受 ERF 通常呈现高斯分布这一特性的启发，我们在这项工作中提出了高斯掩模卷积核（GMConv）。具体来说，GMConv 利用高斯函数生成同心对称掩模，将其放置在内核上以细化 RF。我们的 GMConv 可以直接替换现有 CNN 中的标准卷积，并且可以通过标准反向传播轻松地进行端到端训练。我们通过图像分类和目标检测任务的广泛实验来评估我们的方法。在几个任务和标准基础模型中，我们的方法与标准卷积相比具有优势。例如，将 GMConv 用于 AlexNet 和 ResNet-50，ImageNet 分类的 top-1 准确率分别提高了 0.98% 和 0.85%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的卷积核GMConv，旨在通过调整有效感受野来改进卷积神经网络的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积核使用固定大小的方形感受野，而实际中有效感受野（ERF）通常呈高斯分布，因此需要一种方法来更好地模拟这种分布以提高网络性能。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于高斯函数的高斯掩码卷积核（GMConv），通过在卷积核上放置一个具有同心对称性的高斯掩码来优化感受野。
AI.result: 在ImageNet分类任务中，使用GMConv的AlexNet和ResNet-50的top-1准确率分别提高了0.98%和0.85%。
AI.conclusion: GMConv能够直接替代传统卷积，并且可以通过端到端训练进行优化，实验表明其在多个任务中优于标准卷积。

However, what matters most to the network is the effective receptive field (ERF) that indicates the extent with which input pixels contribute to an output pixel. Inspired by the property that ERFs typically exhibit a Gaussian distribution, we propose a Gaussian Mask convolutional kernel (GMConv) in this work. Specifically, GMConv utilizes the Gaussian function to generate a concentric symmetry mask that is placed over the kernel to refine the RF. Our GMConv can directly replace the standard convolutions in existing CNNs and can be easily trained end-to-end by standard back-propagation. We evaluate our approach through extensive experiments on image classification and object detection tasks. Over several tasks and standard base models, our approach compares favorably against the standard convolution. For instance, using GMConv for AlexNet and ResNet-50, the top-1 accuracy on ImageNet classification is boosted by 0.98% and 0.85%, respectively. 在卷积神经网络中，卷积通常使用具有固定 N $\times$ N 感受野 (RF) 的方核来执行。然而，对网络来说最重要的是有效感受野（ERF），它指示输入像素对输出像素的贡献程度。受 ERF 通常呈现高斯分布这一特性的启发，我们在这项工作中提出了高斯掩模卷积核（GMConv）。具体来说，GMConv 利用高斯函数生成同心对称掩模，将其放置在内核上以细化 RF。我们的 GMConv 可以直接替换现有 CNN 中的标准卷积，并且可以通过标准反向传播轻松地进行端到端训练。我们通过图像分类和目标检测任务的广泛实验来评估我们的方法。在几个任务和标准基础模型中，我们的方法与标准卷积相比具有优势。例如，将 GMConv 用于 AlexNet 和 ResNet-50，ImageNet 分类的 top-1 准确率分别提高了 0.98% 和 0.85%。 本文提出了一种新的卷积核GMConv，旨在通过调整有效感受野来改进卷积神经网络的性能。 Qi Chen,Chao Li,Jia Ning,Stephen Lin,Kun He cs.CV

authors_text: Lin Zheng,Jianbo Yuan,Chong Wang,Lingpeng Kong
title: Efficient Attention via Control Variates
title_zh: 通过控制变量进行有效注意力
abstract: Random-feature-based attention (RFA) is an efficient approximation of softmax attention with linear runtime and space complexity. However, the approximation gap between RFA and conventional softmax attention is not well studied. Built upon previous progress of RFA, we characterize this gap through the lens of control variates and show that RFA can be decomposed into a sum of multiple control variate estimators for each element in the sequence. This new framework reveals that exact softmax attention can be recovered from RFA by manipulating each control variate. Besides, it allows us to develop a more flexible form of control variates, resulting in a novel attention mechanism that significantly reduces the approximation gap while maintaining linear complexity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model outperforms state-of-the-art efficient attention mechanisms on both vision and language tasks.
summary: Random-feature-based attention (RFA) is an efficient approximation of softmax attention with linear runtime and space complexity. However, the approximation gap between RFA and conventional softmax attention is not well studied. Built upon previous progress of RFA, we characterize this gap through the lens of control variates and show that RFA can be decomposed into a sum of multiple control variate estimators for each element in the sequence. This new framework reveals that exact softmax attention can be recovered from RFA by manipulating each control variate. Besides, it allows us to develop a more flexible form of control variates, resulting in a novel attention mechanism that significantly reduces the approximation gap while maintaining linear complexity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model outperforms state-of-the-art efficient attention mechanisms on both vision and language tasks.
abstract_zh: 基于随机特征的注意力（RFA）是具有线性运行时间和空间复杂度的 softmax 注意力的有效近似。然而，RFA 和传统的 softmax 注意力之间的近似差距还没有得到很好的研究。基于 RFA 的先前进展，我们通过控制变量的角度来描述这种差距，并表明 RFA 可以分解为序列中每个元素的多个控制变量估计量的总和。这个新框架表明，通过操纵每个控制变量，可以从 RFA 中恢复精确的 softmax 注意力。此外，它使我们能够开发一种更灵活的控制变量形式，从而产生一种新颖的注意力机制，可以在保持线性复杂性的同时显着减少近似差距。大量的实验表明，我们的模型在视觉和语言任务上都优于最先进的高效注意力机制。

AI.tldr: 本文通过控制变量框架改进随机特征注意力（RFA），在保持线性复杂度的同时显著缩小与标准softmax注意力的近似误差。
AI.motivation: 现有RFA方法虽具线性复杂度，但其与标准softmax注意力的近似误差缺乏系统性研究，限制了性能上限。
AI.method: 将RFA分解为控制变量估计器之和，通过动态调整控制变量恢复精确注意力，并设计新型控制变量形式降低近似误差。
AI.result: 新方法在视觉与语言任务中超越现有高效注意力机制，验证了理论分析的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 控制变量框架为高效注意力机制提供了理论支撑与改进方向，实现了精度与效率的平衡。

This new framework reveals that exact softmax attention can be recovered from RFA by manipulating each control variate. Besides, it allows us to develop a more flexible form of control variates, resulting in a novel attention mechanism that significantly reduces the approximation gap while maintaining linear complexity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model outperforms state-of-the-art efficient attention mechanisms on both vision and language tasks. 基于随机特征的注意力（RFA）是具有线性运行时间和空间复杂度的 softmax 注意力的有效近似。然而，RFA 和传统的 softmax 注意力之间的近似差距还没有得到很好的研究。基于 RFA 的先前进展，我们通过控制变量的角度来描述这种差距，并表明 RFA 可以分解为序列中每个元素的多个控制变量估计量的总和。这个新框架表明，通过操纵每个控制变量，可以从 RFA 中恢复精确的 softmax 注意力。此外，它使我们能够开发一种更灵活的控制变量形式，从而产生一种新颖的注意力机制，可以在保持线性复杂性的同时显着减少近似差距。大量的实验表明，我们的模型在视觉和语言任务上都优于最先进的高效注意力机制。 本文通过控制变量框架改进随机特征注意力（RFA），在保持线性复杂度的同时显著缩小与标准softmax注意力的近似误差。 Lin Zheng,Jianbo Yuan,Chong Wang,Lingpeng Kong cs.LG,cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: Zeljana Basic,Ana Banovac,Ivana Kruzic,Ivan Jerkovic
title: Better by you, better than me, chatgpt3 as writing assistance in students essays
title_zh: 你比我更好，chatgpt3 作为学生论文的写作帮助
comment: ef:Basic, Z., Banovac, A., Kruzic, I. & Jerkovic, I. ChatGPT-3.5 as writing assistance in students' essays. Humanit Soc Sci Commun 10, 750 (2023)
comments: ef:Basic, Z., Banovac, A., Kruzic, I. & Jerkovic, I. ChatGPT-3.5 as writing assistance in students' essays. Humanit Soc Sci Commun 10, 750 (2023)
abstract: Aim: To compare students' essay writing performance with or without employing ChatGPT-3 as a writing assistant tool. Materials and methods: Eighteen students participated in the study (nine in control and nine in the experimental group that used ChatGPT-3). We scored essay elements with grades (A-D) and corresponding numerical values (4-1). We compared essay scores to students' GPTs, writing time, authenticity, and content similarity. Results: Average grade was C for both groups; for control (2.39, SD=0.71) and for experimental (2.00, SD=0.73). None of the predictors affected essay scores: group (P=0.184), writing duration (P=0.669), module (P=0.388), and GPA (P=0.532). The text unauthenticity was slightly higher in the experimental group (11.87%, SD=13.45 to 9.96%, SD=9.81%), but the similarity among essays was generally low in the overall sample (the Jaccard similarity index ranging from 0 to 0.054). In the experimental group, AI classifier recognized more potential AI-generated texts. Conclusions: This study found no evidence that using GPT as a writing tool improves essay quality since the control group outperformed the experimental group in most parameters.

The text unauthenticity was slightly higher in the experimental group (11.87%, SD=13.45 to 9.96%, SD=9.81%), but the similarity among essays was generally low in the overall sample (the Jaccard similarity index ranging from 0 to 0.054). In the experimental group, AI classifier recognized more potential AI-generated texts. Conclusions: This study found no evidence that using GPT as a writing tool improves essay quality since the control group outperformed the experimental group in most parameters.
abstract_zh: 目的：比较使用或不使用 ChatGPT-3 作为写作辅助工具的学生的论文写作表现。材料和方法：18 名学生参与了这项研究（9 名学生为对照组，9 名学生为使用 ChatGPT-3 的实验组）。我们用等级（A-D）和相应的数值（4-1）对论文元素进行评分。我们将论文分数与学生的 GPT、写作时间、真实性和内容相似性进行了比较。结果：两组平均成绩均为C；对照（2.39，SD=0.71）和实验（2.00，SD=0.73）。没有一个预测因素影响论文分数：小组（P = 0.184），写作持续时间（P = 0.669），模块（P = 0.388）和GPA（P = 0.532）。实验组文本真实性略高（11.87%，SD=13.45~9.96%，SD=9.81%），但整体样本中文章之间的相似度普遍较低（Jaccard相似度指数为0~0.054）。在实验组中，人工智能分类器识别出更多潜在的人工智能生成文本。结论：本研究没有发现任何证据表明使用 GPT 作为写作工具可以提高论文质量，因为对照组在大多数参数上都优于实验组。

AI.tldr: 比较学生使用ChatGPT-3作为写作辅助工具与不使用时的论文写作表现差异。
AI.motivation: 探讨AI写作辅助工具对学术写作质量的影响，并评估其可能引发的原创性争议。
AI.method: 将18名学生分为对照组（不使用AI）和实验组（使用ChatGPT-3），通过评分、写作时长、文本原创性及内容相似度进行对比分析。
AI.result: 两组平均成绩均为C（对照组2.39±0.71，实验组2.00±0.73），无显著差异；实验组文本不真实率略高（11.87% vs 9.96%），但整体内容相似度低（Jaccard指数0-0.054）。
AI.conclusion: 未发现使用ChatGPT-3能提升论文质量的证据，对照组在多数指标上表现更优，AI辅助写作可能增加文本不真实性风险。

authors_text: Anna Belardinelli
title: Gaze-based intention estimation: principles, methodologies, and applications in HRI
title_zh: 基于凝视的意图估计：HRI 中的原理、方法和应用
comment: submitted to ACM Transactions on Human-Robot Interaction
comments: submitted to ACM Transactions on Human-Robot Interaction
abstract: Intention prediction has become a relevant field of research in Human-Machine and Human-Robot Interaction. Indeed, any artificial system (co)-operating with and along humans, designed to assist and coordinate its actions with a human partner, would benefit from first inferring the human's current intention. To spare the user the cognitive burden of explicitly uttering their goals, this inference relies mostly on behavioral cues deemed indicative of the current action. It has been long known that eye movements are highly anticipatory of the single steps unfolding during a task, hence they can serve as a very early and reliable behavioural cue for intention recognition. This review aims to draw a line between insights in the psychological literature on visuomotor control and relevant applications of gaze-based intention recognition in technical domains, with a focus on teleoperated and assistive robotic systems. Starting from the cognitive principles underlying the relationship between intentions, eye movements, and action, the use of eye tracking and gaze-based models for intent recognition in Human-Robot Interaction is considered, with prevalent methodologies and their diverse applications. Finally, special consideration is given to relevant human factors issues and current limitations to be factored in when designing such systems.
summary: Intention prediction has become a relevant field of research in Human-Machine and Human-Robot Interaction. Indeed, any artificial system (co)-operating with and along humans, designed to assist and coordinate its actions with a human partner, would benefit from first inferring the human's current intention. To spare the user the cognitive burden of explicitly uttering their goals, this inference relies mostly on behavioral cues deemed indicative of the current action. It has been long known that eye movements are highly anticipatory of the single steps unfolding during a task, hence they can serve as a very early and reliable behavioural cue for intention recognition. This review aims to draw a line between insights in the psychological literature on visuomotor control and relevant applications of gaze-based intention recognition in technical domains, with a focus on teleoperated and assistive robotic systems. Starting from the cognitive principles underlying the relationship between intentions, eye movements, and action, the use of eye tracking and gaze-based models for intent recognition in Human-Robot Interaction is considered, with prevalent methodologies and their diverse applications. Finally, special consideration is given to relevant human factors issues and current limitations to be factored in when designing such systems.
abstract_zh: 意图预测已成为人机和人机交互的相关研究领域。事实上，任何与人类合作并与人类合作、旨在协助和协调其与人类伙伴的行动的人工系统都将受益于首先推断人类当前的意图。为了减轻用户明确说出其目标的认知负担，这种推断主要依赖于被认为表明当前行动的行为线索。众所周知，眼球运动对任务过程中展开的单个步骤具有高度预期性，因此它们可以作为意图识别的非常早期且可靠的行为线索。本综述旨在在视觉运动控制心理学文献中的见解与基于凝视的意图识别在技术领域的相关应用之间划清界限，重点关注远程操作和辅助机器人系统。从意图、眼球运动和动作之间关系的认知原理出发，考虑在人机交互中使用眼球追踪和基于凝视的模型进行意图识别，并采用流行的方法及其多样化的应用。最后，在设计此类系统时要特别考虑相关的人为因素问题和当前的限制。

AI.tldr: 综述基于注视的意图估计的原理、方法及其在人机交互中的应用
AI.motivation: 为减少用户认知负担，通过眼动等行为线索实现意图识别，提升人机协作效率
AI.method: 结合心理学理论与眼动追踪技术，分析意图识别的方法及在机器人系统中的应用
AI.result: 总结了注视意图识别的关键方法、应用案例及当前技术局限
AI.conclusion: 强调人因因素的重要性，指出技术局限并为未来研究提供方向

authors_text: Chen Peng,Zhengqi Dai,Guangping Xia,Yajie Niu,Yihui Lei
title: Explaining with Greater Support: Weighted Column Sampling Optimization for q-Consistent Summary-Explanations
title_zh: 提供更大支持的解释：q 一致摘要解释的加权列采样优化
abstract: Machine learning systems have been extensively used as auxiliary tools in domains that require critical decision-making, such as healthcare and criminal justice. The explainability of decisions is crucial for users to develop trust on these systems. In recent years, the globally-consistent rule-based summary-explanation and its max-support (MS) problem have been proposed, which can provide explanations for particular decisions along with useful statistics of the dataset. However, globally-consistent summary-explanations with limited complexity typically have small supports, if there are any. In this paper, we propose a relaxed version of summary-explanation, i.e., the $q$-consistent summary-explanation, which aims to achieve greater support at the cost of slightly lower consistency. The challenge is that the max-support problem of $q$-consistent summary-explanation (MSqC) is much more complex than the original MS problem, resulting in over-extended solution time using standard branch-and-bound solvers. To improve the solution time efficiency, this paper proposes the weighted column sampling~(WCS) method based on solving smaller problems by sampling variables according to their simplified increase support (SIS) values. Experiments verify that solving MSqC with the proposed SIS-based WCS method is not only more scalable in efficiency, but also yields solutions with greater support and better global extrapolation effectiveness.
summary: Machine learning systems have been extensively used as auxiliary tools in domains that require critical decision-making, such as healthcare and criminal justice. The explainability of decisions is crucial for users to develop trust on these systems. In recent years, the globally-consistent rule-based summary-explanation and its max-support (MS) problem have been proposed, which can provide explanations for particular decisions along with useful statistics of the dataset. However, globally-consistent summary-explanations with limited complexity typically have small supports, if there are any. In this paper, we propose a relaxed version of summary-explanation, i.e., the $q$-consistent summary-explanation, which aims to achieve greater support at the cost of slightly lower consistency. The challenge is that the max-support problem of $q$-consistent summary-explanation (MSqC) is much more complex than the original MS problem, resulting in over-extended solution time using standard branch-and-bound solvers. To improve the solution time efficiency, this paper proposes the weighted column sampling~(WCS) method based on solving smaller problems by sampling variables according to their simplified increase support (SIS) values. Experiments verify that solving MSqC with the proposed SIS-based WCS method is not only more scalable in efficiency, but also yields solutions with greater support and better global extrapolation effectiveness.
abstract_zh: 机器学习系统已广泛用作需要关键决策的领域的辅助工具，例如医疗保健和刑事司法。决策的可解释性对于用户建立对这些系统的信任至关重要。近年来，提出了全局一致的基于规则的摘要解释及其最大支持（MS）问题，它可以为特定决策提供解释以及数据集的有用统计数据。然而，复杂性有限的全局一致的摘要解释通常只有很小的支持（如果有的话）。在本文中，我们提出了一个宽松版本的摘要解释，即$q$一致的摘要解释，其目的是以稍低的一致性为代价来获得更大的支持。挑战在于 $q$ 一致摘要解释 (MSqC) 的最大支持问题比原始 MS 问题复杂得多，导致使用标准分支定界求解器的求解时间过长。为了提高求解时间效率，本文提出了加权列采样（WCS）方法，该方法通过根据变量的简化增量支持（SIS）值进行采样来解决较小的问题。实验证明，使用所提出的基于 SIS 的 WCS 方法求解 MSqC 不仅在效率上更具可扩展性，而且产生具有更大支持和更好的全局外推有效性的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于加权列采样的优化方法，用于生成具有更高支持度的q-一致摘要解释，以改进机器学习系统的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有全局一致的摘要解释方法在复杂度受限时支持度较低，难以满足实际应用中对高支持度解释的需求，需在一致性与支持度间寻求平衡。
AI.method: 提出q-一致摘要解释的松弛版本，并设计基于简化支持度（SIS）值的加权列采样（WCS）方法，通过采样变量解决子问题以提升计算效率。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法在解决MSqC问题时效率更高，生成的解释支持度更大且全局外推效果更优。
AI.conclusion: WCS方法有效平衡了解释的一致性与支持度，为复杂场景下的机器学习决策提供了更高效且实用的可解释性解决方案。

search_text: Explaining with Greater Support: Weighted Column Sampling Optimization for q-Consistent Summary-Explanations 提供更大支持的解释：q 一致摘要解释的加权列采样优化 Machine learning systems have been extensively used as auxiliary tools in domains that require critical decision-making, such as healthcare and criminal justice. The explainability of decisions is crucial for users to develop trust on these systems. In recent years, the globally-consistent rule-based summary-explanation and its max-support (MS) problem have been proposed, which can provide explanations for particular decisions along with useful statistics of the dataset. However, globally-consistent summary-explanations with limited complexity typically have small supports, if there are any. In this paper, we propose a relaxed version of summary-explanation, i.e., the $q$-consistent summary-explanation, which aims to achieve greater support at the cost of slightly lower consistency. The challenge is that the max-support problem of $q$-consistent summary-explanation (MSqC) is much more complex than the original MS problem, resulting in over-extended solution time using standard branch-and-bound solvers. To improve the solution time efficiency, this paper proposes the weighted column sampling~(WCS) method based on solving smaller problems by sampling variables according to their simplified increase support (SIS) values. Experiments verify that solving MSqC with the proposed SIS-based WCS method is not only more scalable in efficiency, but also yields solutions with greater support and better global extrapolation effectiveness. 机器学习系统已广泛用作需要关键决策的领域的辅助工具，例如医疗保健和刑事司法。决策的可解释性对于用户建立对这些系统的信任至关重要。近年来，提出了全局一致的基于规则的摘要解释及其最大支持（MS）问题，它可以为特定决策提供解释以及数据集的有用统计数据。然而，复杂性有限的全局一致的摘要解释通常只有很小的支持（如果有的话）。在本文中，我们提出了一个宽松版本的摘要解释，即$q$一致的摘要解释，其目的是以稍低的一致性为代价来获得更大的支持。挑战在于 $q$ 一致摘要解释 (MSqC) 的最大支持问题比原始 MS 问题复杂得多，导致使用标准分支定界求解器的求解时间过长。为了提高求解时间效率，本文提出了加权列采样（WCS）方法，该方法通过根据变量的简化增量支持（SIS）值进行采样来解决较小的问题。实验证明，使用所提出的基于 SIS 的 WCS 方法求解 MSqC 不仅在效率上更具可扩展性，而且产生具有更大支持和更好的全局外推有效性的解决方案。 本文提出了一种基于加权列采样的优化方法，用于生成具有更高支持度的q-一致摘要解释，以改进机器学习系统的可解释性。 Chen Peng,Zhengqi Dai,Guangping Xia,Yajie Niu,Yihui Lei cs.AI

authors_text: Dichao Liu,Toshihiko Yamasaki,Yu Wang,Kenji Mase,Jien Kato
title: Toward Extremely Lightweight Distracted Driver Recognition With Distillation-Based Neural Architecture Search and Knowledge Transfer
title_zh: 通过基于蒸馏的神经架构搜索和知识转移实现极轻量级分心驾驶员识别
comment: ef:IEEE TRANSACTIONS ON INTELLIGENT TRANSPORTATION SYSTEMS, VOL. 24, NO. 1, JANUARY 2023
comments: ef:IEEE TRANSACTIONS ON INTELLIGENT TRANSPORTATION SYSTEMS, VOL. 24, NO. 1, JANUARY 2023
abstract: The number of traffic accidents has been continuously increasing in recent years worldwide. Many accidents are caused by distracted drivers, who take their attention away from driving. Motivated by the success of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) in computer vision, many researchers developed CNN-based algorithms to recognize distracted driving from a dashcam and warn the driver against unsafe behaviors. However, current models have too many parameters, which is unfeasible for vehicle-mounted computing. This work proposes a novel knowledge-distillation-based framework to solve this problem. The proposed framework first constructs a high-performance teacher network by progressively strengthening the robustness to illumination changes from shallow to deep layers of a CNN. Then, the teacher network is used to guide the architecture searching process of a student network through knowledge distillation. After that, we use the teacher network again to transfer knowledge to the student network by knowledge distillation. Experimental results on the Statefarm Distracted Driver Detection Dataset and AUC Distracted Driver Dataset show that the proposed approach is highly effective for recognizing distracted driving behaviors from photos: (1) the teacher network's accuracy surpasses the previous best accuracy; (2) the student network achieves very high accuracy with only 0.42M parameters (around 55% of the previous most lightweight model). Furthermore, the student network architecture can be extended to a spatial-temporal 3D CNN for recognizing distracted driving from video clips. The 3D student network largely surpasses the previous best accuracy with only 2.03M parameters on the Drive&Act Dataset. The source code is available at https://github.com/Dichao-Liu/Lightweight_Distracted_Driver_Recognition_with_Distillation-Based_NAS_and_Knowledge_Transfer.
summary: The number of traffic accidents has been continuously increasing in recent years worldwide. Many accidents are caused by distracted drivers, who take their attention away from driving. Motivated by the success of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) in computer vision, many researchers developed CNN-based algorithms to recognize distracted driving from a dashcam and warn the driver against unsafe behaviors. However, current models have too many parameters, which is unfeasible for vehicle-mounted computing. This work proposes a novel knowledge-distillation-based framework to solve this problem. The proposed framework first constructs a high-performance teacher network by progressively strengthening the robustness to illumination changes from shallow to deep layers of a CNN. Then, the teacher network is used to guide the architecture searching process of a student network through knowledge distillation. After that, we use the teacher network again to transfer knowledge to the student network by knowledge distillation. Experimental results on the Statefarm Distracted Driver Detection Dataset and AUC Distracted Driver Dataset show that the proposed approach is highly effective for recognizing distracted driving behaviors from photos: (1) the teacher network's accuracy surpasses the previous best accuracy; (2) the student network achieves very high accuracy with only 0.42M parameters (around 55% of the previous most lightweight model). Furthermore, the student network architecture can be extended to a spatial-temporal 3D CNN for recognizing distracted driving from video clips. The 3D student network largely surpasses the previous best accuracy with only 2.03M parameters on the Drive&Act Dataset. The source code is available at https://github.com/Dichao-Liu/Lightweight_Distracted_Driver_Recognition_with_Distillation-Based_NAS_and_Knowledge_Transfer.
abstract_zh: 近年来，全球范围内的交通事故数量不断增加。许多事故都是由于驾驶员分心造成的，他们将注意力从驾驶上移开。受卷积神经网络 (CNN) 在计算机视觉领域成功的推动，许多研究人员开发了基于 CNN 的算法，通过行车记录仪识别分心驾驶，并警告驾驶员注意不安全行为。但目前的模型参数过多，不适合车载计算。这项工作提出了一种新颖的基于知识蒸馏的框架来解决这个问题。所提出的框架首先通过逐步增强 CNN 从浅层到深层对光照变化的鲁棒性来构建高性能教师网络。然后，教师网络通过知识蒸馏来指导学生网络的架构搜索过程。之后，我们再次使用教师网络通过知识蒸馏将知识转移到学生网络。 Statefarm分心驾驶检测数据集和AUC分心驾驶数据集上的实验结果表明，该方法对于从照片中识别分心驾驶行为非常有效：（1）教师网络的准确率超越了之前的最佳准确率； (2) 学生网络仅用 0.42M 个参数就实现了非常高的准确率（大约是之前最轻量级模型的 55%）。此外，学生网络架构可以扩展到时空 3D CNN，用于识别视频片段中的分心驾驶。 3D 学生网络在 Drive&Act 数据集上仅包含 203 万个参数，大大超过了之前的最佳精度。源代码可在 https://github.com/Dichao-Liu/Lightweight_Distracted_Driver_Recognition_with_Distillation-Based_NAS_and_Knowledge_Transfer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于知识蒸馏和神经架构搜索的轻量级分心驾驶识别框架，通过教师网络与学生网络的知识迁移实现高效模型压缩。
AI.motivation: 现有分心驾驶识别模型参数过多，难以部署在车载计算设备上，需在保证识别精度的前提下实现模型轻量化。
AI.method: 构建光照鲁棒性渐进增强的教师网络，通过知识蒸馏指导学生网络架构搜索，并二次进行知识迁移优化学生网络。
AI.result: 教师网络准确率超越现有最佳，学生网络参数量仅0.42M（为前最佳模型的55%）且保持高精度；扩展的3D学生网络在视频数据集上参数量2.03M时精度显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了模型精度与轻量化需求，适用于车载场景，并可扩展至视频分析任务。

authors_text: Falaah Arif Khan,Denys Herasymuk,Nazar Protsiv,Julia Stoyanovich
title: An Epistemic and Aleatoric Decomposition of Arbitrariness to Constrain the Set of Good Models
title_zh: 任意性的认知任意分解来约束好模型集
abstract: Recent research reveals that machine learning (ML) models are highly sensitive to minor changes in their training procedure, such as the inclusion or exclusion of a single data point, leading to conflicting predictions on individual data points; a property termed as arbitrariness or instability in ML pipelines in prior work. Drawing from the uncertainty literature, we show that stability decomposes into epistemic and aleatoric components, capturing the consistency and confidence in prediction, respectively. We use this decomposition to provide two main contributions. Our first contribution is an extensive empirical evaluation. We find that (i) epistemic instability can be reduced with more training data whereas aleatoric instability cannot; (ii) state-of-the-art ML models have aleatoric instability as high as 79% and aleatoric instability disparities among demographic groups as high as 29% in popular fairness benchmarks; and (iii) fairness pre-processing interventions generally increase aleatoric instability more than in-processing interventions, and both epistemic and aleatoric instability are highly sensitive to data-processing interventions and model architecture. Our second contribution is a practical solution to the problem of systematic arbitrariness. We propose a model selection procedure that includes epistemic and aleatoric criteria alongside existing accuracy and fairness criteria, and show that it successfully narrows down a large set of good models (50-100 on our datasets) to a handful of stable, fair and accurate ones. We built and publicly released a python library to measure epistemic and aleatoric multiplicity in any ML pipeline alongside existing confusion-matrix-based metrics, providing practitioners with a rich suite of evaluation metrics to use to define a more precise criterion during model selection.
summary: Recent research reveals that machine learning (ML) models are highly sensitive to minor changes in their training procedure, such as the inclusion or exclusion of a single data point, leading to conflicting predictions on individual data points; a property termed as arbitrariness or instability in ML pipelines in prior work. Drawing from the uncertainty literature, we show that stability decomposes into epistemic and aleatoric components, capturing the consistency and confidence in prediction, respectively. We use this decomposition to provide two main contributions. Our first contribution is an extensive empirical evaluation. We find that (i) epistemic instability can be reduced with more training data whereas aleatoric instability cannot; (ii) state-of-the-art ML models have aleatoric instability as high as 79% and aleatoric instability disparities among demographic groups as high as 29% in popular fairness benchmarks; and (iii) fairness pre-processing interventions generally increase aleatoric instability more than in-processing interventions, and both epistemic and aleatoric instability are highly sensitive to data-processing interventions and model architecture. Our second contribution is a practical solution to the problem of systematic arbitrariness. We propose a model selection procedure that includes epistemic and aleatoric criteria alongside existing accuracy and fairness criteria, and show that it successfully narrows down a large set of good models (50-100 on our datasets) to a handful of stable, fair and accurate ones. We built and publicly released a python library to measure epistemic and aleatoric multiplicity in any ML pipeline alongside existing confusion-matrix-based metrics, providing practitioners with a rich suite of evaluation metrics to use to define a more precise criterion during model selection.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，机器学习 (ML) 模型对其训练过程中的微小变化高度敏感，例如包含或排除单个数据点，从而导致对各个数据点的预测相互矛盾；在之前的工作中，ML 管道中被称为任意性或不稳定性的属性。根据不确定性文献，我们表明稳定性分解为认知和任意成分，分别捕获预测的一致性和置信度。我们使用这种分解来提供两个主要贡献。我们的第一个贡献是广泛的实证评估。我们发现（i）认知不稳定性可以通过更多的训练数据来减少，而任意不稳定性则不能； (ii) 在流行的公平基准中，最先进的 ML 模型的任意不稳定性高达 79%，人口群体之间的任意不稳定性差异高达 29%； (iii) 公平性预处理干预通常比处理中干预更能增加任意不稳定性，并且认知不稳定和任意不稳定性都对数据处理干预和模型架构高度敏感。我们的第二个贡献是对系统任意性问题的实际解决方案。我们提出了一种模型选择程序，其中包括认知和任意标准以及现有的准确性和公平性标准，并表明它成功地将大量良好模型（我们的数据集上的 50-100 个）缩小为少数稳定、公平和准确的模型。我们构建并公开发布了一个 python 库，用于测量任何 ML 管道中的认知和任意多重性以及现有的基于混淆矩阵的指标，为从业者提供了一套丰富的评估指标，用于在模型选择过程中定义更精确的标准。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过将机器学习模型的任意性分解为认识不确定性和偶然不确定性，提出了一种约束优质模型集合的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习模型对训练过程的微小变化高度敏感，导致预测不一致，需通过分解任意性来改进模型稳定性评估与选择。
AI.method: 借鉴不确定性理论，将稳定性分解为认识不确定性和偶然不确定性，并通过大量实验验证不同干预措施的影响，提出结合稳定性指标的模型选择框架。
AI.result: 发现增加训练数据可降低认识不确定性但无法减少偶然不确定性；主流公平性基准中偶然不确定性高达79%，群体差异达29%；提出的方法可将数百个模型筛选为少量稳定、公平且准确的模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入新的不确定性分解指标，论文为模型选择提供了更精确的评估体系，有助于提升模型的稳定性与公平性。

authors_text: Xiaoibin Wang,Shuang Gao,Yuntao Zou,Jianlan Guo,Chu Wang
title: IH-ViT: Vision Transformer-based Integrated Circuit Appear-ance Defect Detection
title_zh: IH-ViT：基于视觉变压器的集成电路外观缺陷检测
abstract: For the problems of low recognition rate and slow recognition speed of traditional detection methods in IC appearance defect detection, we propose an IC appearance defect detection algo-rithm IH-ViT. Our proposed model takes advantage of the respective strengths of CNN and ViT to acquire image features from both local and global aspects, and finally fuses the two features for decision making to determine the class of defects, thus obtaining better accuracy of IC defect recognition. To address the problem that IC appearance defects are mainly reflected in the dif-ferences in details, which are difficult to identify by traditional algorithms, we improved the tra-ditional ViT by performing an additional convolution operation inside the batch. For the problem of information imbalance of samples due to diverse sources of data sets, we adopt a dual-channel image segmentation technique to further improve the accuracy of IC appearance defects. Finally, after testing, our proposed hybrid IH-ViT model achieved 72.51% accuracy, which is 2.8% and 6.06% higher than ResNet50 and ViT models alone. The proposed algorithm can quickly and accurately detect the defect status of IC appearance and effectively improve the productivity of IC packaging and testing companies.
summary: For the problems of low recognition rate and slow recognition speed of traditional detection methods in IC appearance defect detection, we propose an IC appearance defect detection algo-rithm IH-ViT. Our proposed model takes advantage of the respective strengths of CNN and ViT to acquire image features from both local and global aspects, and finally fuses the two features for decision making to determine the class of defects, thus obtaining better accuracy of IC defect recognition. To address the problem that IC appearance defects are mainly reflected in the dif-ferences in details, which are difficult to identify by traditional algorithms, we improved the tra-ditional ViT by performing an additional convolution operation inside the batch. For the problem of information imbalance of samples due to diverse sources of data sets, we adopt a dual-channel image segmentation technique to further improve the accuracy of IC appearance defects. Finally, after testing, our proposed hybrid IH-ViT model achieved 72.51% accuracy, which is 2.8% and 6.06% higher than ResNet50 and ViT models alone. The proposed algorithm can quickly and accurately detect the defect status of IC appearance and effectively improve the productivity of IC packaging and testing companies.
abstract_zh: 针对传统检测方法在IC外观缺陷检测中识别率低、识别速度慢的问题，提出一种IC外观缺陷检测算法IH-ViT。我们提出的模型利用CNN和ViT各自的优势，从局部和全局方面获取图像特征，最后融合这两个特征进行决策以确定缺陷的类别，从而获得更好的IC缺陷识别精度。针对IC外观缺陷主要体现在细节差异，传统算法难以识别的问题，我们通过在batch内执行额外的卷积操作来改进传统的ViT。针对数据集来源不同导致样本信息不平衡的问题，我们采用双通道图像分割技术，进一步提高IC外观缺陷的准确率。最后，经过测试，我们提出的混合 IH-ViT 模型达到了 72.51% 的准确率，比单独的 ResNet50 和 ViT 模型高了 2.8% 和 6.06%。所提出的算法能够快速、准确地检测出IC外观缺陷状态，有效提高IC封测企业的生产力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于视觉Transformer的集成电路外观缺陷检测算法IH-ViT，通过融合CNN与ViT优势提升检测精度与效率。
AI.motivation: 传统检测方法存在识别率低、速度慢的问题，难以应对IC外观缺陷细节差异大及数据来源多样导致的样本不平衡挑战。
AI.method: 融合CNN局部特征提取能力与ViT全局建模优势，改进ViT结构增加内部卷积操作，并采用双通道图像分割技术解决样本信息不平衡问题。
AI.result: 测试显示IH-ViT模型准确率达72.51%，较ResNet50和ViT分别提升2.8%和6.06%，显著提高缺陷识别性能。
AI.conclusion: 该算法有效提升IC外观缺陷检测的准确性与效率，可助力集成电路封装测试企业提高生产效能。

authors_text: Luca Giacomoni,Basil Benny,George Parisis
title: RayNet: A Simulation Platform for Developing Reinforcement Learning-Driven Network Protocols
title_zh: RayNet：用于开发强化学习驱动的网络协议的仿真平台
abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has gained significant momentum in the development of network protocols. However, RL-based protocols are still in their infancy, and substantial research is required to build deployable solutions. Developing a protocol based on RL is a complex and challenging process that involves several model design decisions and requires significant training and evaluation in real and simulated network topologies. Network simulators offer an efficient training environment for RL-based protocols, because they are deterministic and can run in parallel. In this paper, we introduce \textit{RayNet}, a scalable and adaptable simulation platform for the development of RL-based network protocols. RayNet integrates OMNeT++, a fully programmable network simulator, with Ray/RLlib, a scalable training platform for distributed RL. RayNet facilitates the methodical development of RL-based network protocols so that researchers can focus on the problem at hand and not on implementation details of the learning aspect of their research. We developed a simple RL-based congestion control approach as a proof of concept showcasing that RayNet can be a valuable platform for RL-based research in computer networks, enabling scalable training and evaluation. We compared RayNet with \textit{ns3-gym}, a platform with similar objectives to RayNet, and showed that RayNet performs better in terms of how fast agents can collect experience in RL environments.
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has gained significant momentum in the development of network protocols. However, RL-based protocols are still in their infancy, and substantial research is required to build deployable solutions. Developing a protocol based on RL is a complex and challenging process that involves several model design decisions and requires significant training and evaluation in real and simulated network topologies. Network simulators offer an efficient training environment for RL-based protocols, because they are deterministic and can run in parallel. In this paper, we introduce \textit{RayNet}, a scalable and adaptable simulation platform for the development of RL-based network protocols. RayNet integrates OMNeT++, a fully programmable network simulator, with Ray/RLlib, a scalable training platform for distributed RL. RayNet facilitates the methodical development of RL-based network protocols so that researchers can focus on the problem at hand and not on implementation details of the learning aspect of their research. We developed a simple RL-based congestion control approach as a proof of concept showcasing that RayNet can be a valuable platform for RL-based research in computer networks, enabling scalable training and evaluation. We compared RayNet with \textit{ns3-gym}, a platform with similar objectives to RayNet, and showed that RayNet performs better in terms of how fast agents can collect experience in RL environments.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）在网络协议的开发中获得了巨大的动力。然而，基于强化学习的协议仍处于起步阶段，需要大量研究来构建可部署的解决方案。开发基于 RL 的协议是一个复杂且具有挑战性的过程，涉及多个模型设计决策，并且需要在真实和模拟网络拓扑中进行大量训练和评估。网络模拟器为基于强化学习的协议提供了高效的训练环境，因为它们是确定性的并且可以并行运行。在本文中，我们介绍了 \textit{RayNet}，这是一个可扩展且适应性强的模拟平台，用于开发基于 RL 的网络协议。 RayNet 将完全可编程的网络模拟器 OMNeT++ 与分布式强化学习的可扩展训练平台 Ray/RLlib 集成在一起。 RayNet 促进了基于 RL 的网络协议的系统开发，以便研究人员可以专注于手头的问题，而不是关注其研究的学习方面的实现细节。我们开发了一种简单的基于强化学习的拥塞控制方法作为概念证明，表明 RayNet 可以成为计算机网络中基于强化学习的研究的一个有价值的平台，从而实现可扩展的训练和评估。我们将 RayNet 与 \textit{ns3-gym}（一个与 RayNet 目标相似的平台）进行了比较，并表明 RayNet 在智能体在 RL 环境中收集经验的速度方面表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RayNet，一个用于开发基于强化学习（RL）网络协议的可扩展仿真平台。
AI.motivation: 基于RL的网络协议开发复杂且需大量训练，现有仿真工具效率不足，需更高效的平台支持研究。
AI.method: 整合OMNeT++网络仿真器与Ray/RLlib分布式训练框架，构建支持RL协议开发的仿真环境。
AI.result: 通过实现简单RL拥塞控制算法验证平台有效性，并证明RayNet在经验收集速度上优于ns3-gym。
AI.conclusion: RayNet为RL驱动的网络协议研究提供了高效、可扩展的仿真工具，有助于推动该领域的发展。

search_text: RayNet: A Simulation Platform for Developing Reinforcement Learning-Driven Network Protocols RayNet：用于开发强化学习驱动的网络协议的仿真平台 Reinforcement Learning (RL) has gained significant momentum in the development of network protocols. However, RL-based protocols are still in their infancy, and substantial research is required to build deployable solutions. Developing a protocol based on RL is a complex and challenging process that involves several model design decisions and requires significant training and evaluation in real and simulated network topologies. Network simulators offer an efficient training environment for RL-based protocols, because they are deterministic and can run in parallel. In this paper, we introduce \textit{RayNet}, a scalable and adaptable simulation platform for the development of RL-based network protocols. RayNet integrates OMNeT++, a fully programmable network simulator, with Ray/RLlib, a scalable training platform for distributed RL. RayNet facilitates the methodical development of RL-based network protocols so that researchers can focus on the problem at hand and not on implementation details of the learning aspect of their research. We developed a simple RL-based congestion control approach as a proof of concept showcasing that RayNet can be a valuable platform for RL-based research in computer networks, enabling scalable training and evaluation. We compared RayNet with \textit{ns3-gym}, a platform with similar objectives to RayNet, and showed that RayNet performs better in terms of how fast agents can collect experience in RL environments. 强化学习（RL）在网络协议的开发中获得了巨大的动力。然而，基于强化学习的协议仍处于起步阶段，需要大量研究来构建可部署的解决方案。开发基于 RL 的协议是一个复杂且具有挑战性的过程，涉及多个模型设计决策，并且需要在真实和模拟网络拓扑中进行大量训练和评估。网络模拟器为基于强化学习的协议提供了高效的训练环境，因为它们是确定性的并且可以并行运行。在本文中，我们介绍了 \textit{RayNet}，这是一个可扩展且适应性强的模拟平台，用于开发基于 RL 的网络协议。 RayNet 将完全可编程的网络模拟器 OMNeT++ 与分布式强化学习的可扩展训练平台 Ray/RLlib 集成在一起。 RayNet 促进了基于 RL 的网络协议的系统开发，以便研究人员可以专注于手头的问题，而不是关注其研究的学习方面的实现细节。我们开发了一种简单的基于强化学习的拥塞控制方法作为概念证明，表明 RayNet 可以成为计算机网络中基于强化学习的研究的一个有价值的平台，从而实现可扩展的训练和评估。我们将 RayNet 与 \textit{ns3-gym}（一个与 RayNet 目标相似的平台）进行了比较，并表明 RayNet 在智能体在 RL 环境中收集经验的速度方面表现更好。 本文提出RayNet，一个用于开发基于强化学习（RL）网络协议的可扩展仿真平台。 Luca Giacomoni,Basil Benny,George Parisis cs.NI,cs.AI,cs.DC

authors_text: Igor Carrara,Théodore Papadopoulo
title: Classification of BCI-EEG based on augmented covariance matrix
title_zh: 基于增广协方差矩阵的BCI-EEG分类
abstract: Objective: Electroencephalography signals are recorded as a multidimensional dataset. We propose a new framework based on the augmented covariance extracted from an autoregressive model to improve motor imagery classification. Methods: From the autoregressive model can be derived the Yule-Walker equations, which show the emergence of a symmetric positive definite matrix: the augmented covariance matrix. The state-of the art for classifying covariance matrices is based on Riemannian Geometry. A fairly natural idea is therefore to extend the standard approach using these augmented covariance matrices. The methodology for creating the augmented covariance matrix shows a natural connection with the delay embedding theorem proposed by Takens for dynamical systems. Such an embedding method is based on the knowledge of two parameters: the delay and the embedding dimension, respectively related to the lag and the order of the autoregressive model. This approach provides new methods to compute the hyper-parameters in addition to standard grid search. Results: The augmented covariance matrix performed noticeably better than any state-of-the-art methods. We will test our approach on several datasets and several subjects using the MOABB framework, using both within-session and cross-session evaluation. Conclusion: The improvement in results is due to the fact that the augmented covariance matrix incorporates not only spatial but also temporal information, incorporating nonlinear components of the signal through an embedding procedure, which allows the leveraging of dynamical systems algorithms. Significance: These results extend the concepts and the results of the Riemannian distance based classification algorithm.
summary: Objective: Electroencephalography signals are recorded as a multidimensional dataset. We propose a new framework based on the augmented covariance extracted from an autoregressive model to improve motor imagery classification. Methods: From the autoregressive model can be derived the Yule-Walker equations, which show the emergence of a symmetric positive definite matrix: the augmented covariance matrix. The state-of the art for classifying covariance matrices is based on Riemannian Geometry. A fairly natural idea is therefore to extend the standard approach using these augmented covariance matrices. The methodology for creating the augmented covariance matrix shows a natural connection with the delay embedding theorem proposed by Takens for dynamical systems. Such an embedding method is based on the knowledge of two parameters: the delay and the embedding dimension, respectively related to the lag and the order of the autoregressive model. This approach provides new methods to compute the hyper-parameters in addition to standard grid search. Results: The augmented covariance matrix performed noticeably better than any state-of-the-art methods. We will test our approach on several datasets and several subjects using the MOABB framework, using both within-session and cross-session evaluation. Conclusion: The improvement in results is due to the fact that the augmented covariance matrix incorporates not only spatial but also temporal information, incorporating nonlinear components of the signal through an embedding procedure, which allows the leveraging of dynamical systems algorithms. Significance: These results extend the concepts and the results of the Riemannian distance based classification algorithm.
abstract_zh: 目的：脑电图信号被记录为多维数据集。我们提出了一种基于从自回归模型中提取的增强协方差的新框架，以改进运动想象分类。方法：从自回归模型可以推导出Yule-Walker方程，它表明出现了一个对称正定矩阵：增广协方差矩阵。协方差矩阵分类的最新技术基于黎曼几何。因此，一个相当自然的想法是使用这些增强协方差矩阵来扩展标准方法。创建增强协方差矩阵的方法显示了与 Takens 为动力系统提出的延迟嵌入定理的自然联系。这种嵌入方法基于两个参数的知识：延迟和嵌入维数，分别与自回归模型的滞后和阶数相关。除了标准网格搜索之外，这种方法还提供了计算超参数的新方法。结果：增强协方差矩阵的性能明显优于任何最先进的方法。我们将使用 MOABB 框架在多个数据集和多个主题上测试我们的方法，同时使用会话内和跨会话评估。结论：结果的改进是由于增强协方差矩阵不仅包含空间信息，还包含时间信息，通过嵌入过程合并信号的非线性分量，从而允许利用动态系统算法。意义：这些结果扩展了基于黎曼距离的分类算法的概念和结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于增强协方差矩阵的BCI-EEG分类方法，以提高运动想象任务的分类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统的BCI-EEG分类方法主要依赖于协方差矩阵，但缺乏对信号时间信息的充分考虑。本文希望通过引入增强协方差矩阵，结合时间与空间信息，从而提升分类效果。
AI.method: 从自回归模型推导出Yule-Walker方程，得到对称正定矩阵——增强协方差矩阵。该方法与Takens的延迟嵌入定理相结合，利用延迟和嵌入维数参数，扩展了基于黎曼几何的分类方法。
AI.result: 增强协方差矩阵在多个数据集和多个受试者上均表现出优于现有方法的分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 增强协方差矩阵通过结合空间和时间信息，特别是通过嵌入过程引入非线性成分，从而提升了分类效果，扩展了基于黎曼距离的分类算法的应用范围。

authors_text: Zhe Li,Zhongwen Rao,Lujia Pan,Zenglin Xu
title: MTS-Mixers: Multivariate Time Series Forecasting via Factorized Temporal and Channel Mixing
title_zh: MTS-Mixers：通过分解时间和通道混合进行多元时间序列预测
abstract: Multivariate time series forecasting has been widely used in various practical scenarios. Recently, Transformer-based models have shown significant potential in forecasting tasks due to the capture of long-range dependencies. However, recent studies in the vision and NLP fields show that the role of attention modules is not clear, which can be replaced by other token aggregation operations. This paper investigates the contributions and deficiencies of attention mechanisms on the performance of time series forecasting. Specifically, we find that (1) attention is not necessary for capturing temporal dependencies, (2) the entanglement and redundancy in the capture of temporal and channel interaction affect the forecasting performance, and (3) it is important to model the mapping between the input and the prediction sequence. To this end, we propose MTS-Mixers, which use two factorized modules to capture temporal and channel dependencies. Experimental results on several real-world datasets show that MTS-Mixers outperform existing Transformer-based models with higher efficiency.
summary: Multivariate time series forecasting has been widely used in various practical scenarios. Recently, Transformer-based models have shown significant potential in forecasting tasks due to the capture of long-range dependencies. However, recent studies in the vision and NLP fields show that the role of attention modules is not clear, which can be replaced by other token aggregation operations. This paper investigates the contributions and deficiencies of attention mechanisms on the performance of time series forecasting. Specifically, we find that (1) attention is not necessary for capturing temporal dependencies, (2) the entanglement and redundancy in the capture of temporal and channel interaction affect the forecasting performance, and (3) it is important to model the mapping between the input and the prediction sequence. To this end, we propose MTS-Mixers, which use two factorized modules to capture temporal and channel dependencies. Experimental results on several real-world datasets show that MTS-Mixers outperform existing Transformer-based models with higher efficiency.
abstract_zh: 多元时间序列预测已广泛应用于各种实际场景。最近，由于捕获了远程依赖关系，基于 Transformer 的模型在预测任务中显示出了巨大的潜力。然而，最近在视觉和NLP领域的研究表明，注意力模块的作用并不明确，可以用其他token聚合操作来替代。本文研究了注意力机制对时间序列预测性能的贡献和不足。具体来说，我们发现（1）注意力对于捕获时间依赖性不是必需的，（2）捕获时间和通道交互中的纠缠和冗余会影响预测性能，（3）对输入和预测序列之间的映射进行建模很重要。为此，我们提出了 MTS-Mixers，它使用两个分解模块来捕获时间和通道依赖性。在多个真实数据集上的实验结果表明，MTS-Mixers 的性能优于现有的基于 Transformer 的模型，效率更高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MTS-Mixers模型，通过解耦时间与通道混合机制，改进多变量时间序列预测任务。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer在时间序列预测中表现出色，但研究发现其注意力机制存在冗余，且时间与通道交互的耦合影响预测性能。
AI.method: 设计两个解耦模块分别建模时间依赖性和通道依赖性，替代传统注意力机制以提升效率。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上，MTS-Mixers在保持预测精度的同时显著优于现有Transformer模型。
AI.conclusion: 解耦的时间-通道混合架构能有效提升多变量时间序列预测的效率与性能，无需依赖注意力机制。

search_text: MTS-Mixers: Multivariate Time Series Forecasting via Factorized Temporal and Channel Mixing MTS-Mixers：通过分解时间和通道混合进行多元时间序列预测 Multivariate time series forecasting has been widely used in various practical scenarios. Recently, Transformer-based models have shown significant potential in forecasting tasks due to the capture of long-range dependencies. However, recent studies in the vision and NLP fields show that the role of attention modules is not clear, which can be replaced by other token aggregation operations. This paper investigates the contributions and deficiencies of attention mechanisms on the performance of time series forecasting. Specifically, we find that (1) attention is not necessary for capturing temporal dependencies, (2) the entanglement and redundancy in the capture of temporal and channel interaction affect the forecasting performance, and (3) it is important to model the mapping between the input and the prediction sequence. To this end, we propose MTS-Mixers, which use two factorized modules to capture temporal and channel dependencies. Experimental results on several real-world datasets show that MTS-Mixers outperform existing Transformer-based models with higher efficiency. 多元时间序列预测已广泛应用于各种实际场景。最近，由于捕获了远程依赖关系，基于 Transformer 的模型在预测任务中显示出了巨大的潜力。然而，最近在视觉和NLP领域的研究表明，注意力模块的作用并不明确，可以用其他token聚合操作来替代。本文研究了注意力机制对时间序列预测性能的贡献和不足。具体来说，我们发现（1）注意力对于捕获时间依赖性不是必需的，（2）捕获时间和通道交互中的纠缠和冗余会影响预测性能，（3）对输入和预测序列之间的映射进行建模很重要。为此，我们提出了 MTS-Mixers，它使用两个分解模块来捕获时间和通道依赖性。在多个真实数据集上的实验结果表明，MTS-Mixers 的性能优于现有的基于 Transformer 的模型，效率更高。 本文提出MTS-Mixers模型，通过解耦时间与通道混合机制，改进多变量时间序列预测任务。 Zhe Li,Zhongwen Rao,Lujia Pan,Zenglin Xu cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Hexiang Pan,Quang-Trung Ta,Meihui Zhang,Yeow Meng Chee,Gang Chen,Beng Chin Ooi
title: FLAC: A Robust Failure-Aware Atomic Commit Protocol for Distributed Transactions
title_zh: FLAC：用于分布式事务的鲁棒故障感知原子提交协议
abstract: In distributed transaction processing, atomic commit protocol (ACP) is used to ensure database consistency. With the use of commodity compute nodes and networks, failures such as system crashes and network partitioning are common. It is therefore important for ACP to dynamically adapt to the operating condition for efficiency while ensuring the consistency of the database. Existing ACPs often assume stable operating conditions, hence, they are either non-generalizable to different environments or slow in practice. In this paper, we propose a novel and practical ACP, called Failure-Aware Atomic Commit (FLAC). In essence, FLAC includes three protocols, which are specifically designed for three different environments: (i) no failure occurs, (ii) participant nodes might crash but there is no delayed connection, or (iii) both crashed nodes and delayed connection can occur. It models these environments as the failure-free, crash-failure, and network-failure robustness levels. During its operation, FLAC can monitor if any failure occurs and dynamically switch to operate the most suitable protocol, using a robustness level state machine, whose parameters are fine-tuned by reinforcement learning. Consequently, it improves both the response time and throughput, and effectively handles nodes distributed across the Internet where crash and network failures might occur. We implement FLAC in a distributed transactional key-value storage system based on Google Percolator and evaluate its performance with both a micro benchmark and a macro benchmark of real workload. The results show that FLAC achieves up to 2.22x throughput improvement and 2.82x latency speedup, compared to existing ACPs for high-contention workloads.
summary: In distributed transaction processing, atomic commit protocol (ACP) is used to ensure database consistency. With the use of commodity compute nodes and networks, failures such as system crashes and network partitioning are common. It is therefore important for ACP to dynamically adapt to the operating condition for efficiency while ensuring the consistency of the database. Existing ACPs often assume stable operating conditions, hence, they are either non-generalizable to different environments or slow in practice. In this paper, we propose a novel and practical ACP, called Failure-Aware Atomic Commit (FLAC). In essence, FLAC includes three protocols, which are specifically designed for three different environments: (i) no failure occurs, (ii) participant nodes might crash but there is no delayed connection, or (iii) both crashed nodes and delayed connection can occur. It models these environments as the failure-free, crash-failure, and network-failure robustness levels. During its operation, FLAC can monitor if any failure occurs and dynamically switch to operate the most suitable protocol, using a robustness level state machine, whose parameters are fine-tuned by reinforcement learning. Consequently, it improves both the response time and throughput, and effectively handles nodes distributed across the Internet where crash and network failures might occur. We implement FLAC in a distributed transactional key-value storage system based on Google Percolator and evaluate its performance with both a micro benchmark and a macro benchmark of real workload. The results show that FLAC achieves up to 2.22x throughput improvement and 2.82x latency speedup, compared to existing ACPs for high-contention workloads.
abstract_zh: 在分布式事务处理中，使用原子提交协议（ACP）来保证数据库的一致性。随着商品计算节点和网络的使用，系统崩溃和网络分区等故障很常见。因此，ACP 必须动态适应运行条件以提高效率，同时确保数据库的一致性。现有的 ACP 通常假设稳定的运行条件，因此它们要么无法推广到不同的环境，要么在实践中速度很慢。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖且实用的 ACP，称为故障感知原子提交（FLAC）。本质上，FLAC 包括三种协议，专门针对三种不同的环境而设计：(i) 不发生故障，(ii) 参与节点可能崩溃但不存在延迟连接，或 (iii) 节点崩溃和连接延迟都可能发生。它将这些环境建模为无故障、崩溃故障和网络故障稳健性级别。在运行过程中，FLAC 可以监控是否发生任何故障，并使用鲁棒性级别状态机动态切换以运行最合适的协议，其参数通过强化学习进行微调。因此，它提高了响应时间和吞吐量，并有效地处理分布在 Internet 上可能发生崩溃和网络故障的节点。我们在基于 Google Percolator 的分布式事务键值存储系统中实现 FLAC，并通过实际工作负载的微观基准和宏观基准来评估其性能。结果表明，与适用于高争用工作负载的现有 ACP 相比，FLAC 实现了高达 2.22 倍的吞吐量提升和 2.82 倍的延迟加速。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FLAC的新型原子提交协议，用于在分布式事务中动态适应不同故障环境以提高效率和一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有原子提交协议（ACP）假设稳定环境，难以适应实际中常见的节点崩溃和网络分区故障，导致性能不足或泛化能力差。
AI.method: FLAC包含三种针对不同故障场景的协议（无故障、节点崩溃、网络延迟），通过强化学习调参的状态机动态切换协议，实现自适应操作。
AI.result: 在基于Google Percolator的系统中，FLAC在高竞争工作负载下相比现有ACP实现吞吐量提升2.22倍、延迟降低2.82倍。
AI.conclusion: FLAC通过动态故障感知和协议切换，有效提升了分布式事务处理的性能与鲁棒性，适用于跨互联网节点的实际场景。

authors_text: Danilo Numeroso,Davide Bacciu,Petar Veličković
title: Dual Algorithmic Reasoning
title_zh: 对偶算法推理
comment: To appear at ICLR 2023. 16 pages, 9 figures
comments: To appear at ICLR 2023. 16 pages, 9 figures
abstract: Neural Algorithmic Reasoning is an emerging area of machine learning which seeks to infuse algorithmic computation in neural networks, typically by training neural models to approximate steps of classical algorithms. In this context, much of the current work has focused on learning reachability and shortest path graph algorithms, showing that joint learning on similar algorithms is beneficial for generalisation. However, when targeting more complex problems, such similar algorithms become more difficult to find. Here, we propose to learn algorithms by exploiting duality of the underlying algorithmic problem. Many algorithms solve optimisation problems. We demonstrate that simultaneously learning the dual definition of these optimisation problems in algorithmic learning allows for better learning and qualitatively better solutions. Specifically, we exploit the max-flow min-cut theorem to simultaneously learn these two algorithms over synthetically generated graphs, demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed approach. We then validate the real-world utility of our dual algorithmic reasoner by deploying it on a challenging brain vessel classification task, which likely depends on the vessels' flow properties. We demonstrate a clear performance gain when using our model within such a context, and empirically show that learning the max-flow and min-cut algorithms together is critical for achieving such a result.
summary: Neural Algorithmic Reasoning is an emerging area of machine learning which seeks to infuse algorithmic computation in neural networks, typically by training neural models to approximate steps of classical algorithms. In this context, much of the current work has focused on learning reachability and shortest path graph algorithms, showing that joint learning on similar algorithms is beneficial for generalisation. However, when targeting more complex problems, such similar algorithms become more difficult to find. Here, we propose to learn algorithms by exploiting duality of the underlying algorithmic problem. Many algorithms solve optimisation problems. We demonstrate that simultaneously learning the dual definition of these optimisation problems in algorithmic learning allows for better learning and qualitatively better solutions. Specifically, we exploit the max-flow min-cut theorem to simultaneously learn these two algorithms over synthetically generated graphs, demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed approach. We then validate the real-world utility of our dual algorithmic reasoner by deploying it on a challenging brain vessel classification task, which likely depends on the vessels' flow properties. We demonstrate a clear performance gain when using our model within such a context, and empirically show that learning the max-flow and min-cut algorithms together is critical for achieving such a result.
abstract_zh: 神经算法推理是机器学习的一个新兴领域，旨在将算法计算融入神经网络中，通常通过训练神经模型来近似经典算法的步骤。在这种背景下，当前的大部分工作都集中在学习可达性和最短路径图算法上，这表明对类似算法的联合学习有利于泛化。然而，当针对更复杂的问题时，这种类似的算法变得更难找到。在这里，我们建议通过利用底层算法问题的对偶性来学习算法。许多算法解决优化问题。我们证明，在算法学习中同时学习这些优化问题的双重定义可以实现更好的学习和质量更好的解决方案。具体来说，我们利用最大流最小割定理在综合生成的图上同时学习这两种算法，证明了所提出方法的有效性。然后，我们通过将双算法推理机部署在具有挑战性的脑血管分类任务上来验证其在现实世界中的实用性，这可能取决于血管的流动特性。在这样的背景下使用我们的模型时，我们展示了明显的性能增益，并且根据经验表明，一起学习最大流和最小割算法对于实现这样的结果至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过同时学习优化问题的对偶算法（如最大流和最小割）来提升神经网络在复杂问题上的表现的方法，并在合成图和脑血管分类任务中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有算法学习方法在处理复杂问题时难以找到相似算法进行泛化，而利用优化问题的对偶性可能提供更优解决方案。
AI.method: 基于最大流-最小割定理，设计双算法学习框架，同时训练神经网络学习对偶算法，并应用于合成图生成和脑血管分类任务。
AI.result: 在脑血管分类任务中实现性能提升，实验证明联合学习最大流和最小割算法是取得该结果的关键。
AI.conclusion: 对偶算法学习能有效提升模型性能，尤其在需要同时处理互为对偶的优化问题时表现显著。

tldr: 本文提出了一种通过同时学习优化问题的对偶算法（如最大流和最小割）来提升神经网络在复杂问题上的表现的方法，并在合成图和脑血管分类任务中验证了其有效性。
motivation: 现有算法学习方法在处理复杂问题时难以找到相似算法进行泛化，而利用优化问题的对偶性可能提供更优解决方案。
method: 基于最大流-最小割定理，设计双算法学习框架，同时训练神经网络学习对偶算法，并应用于合成图生成和脑血管分类任务。
result: 在脑血管分类任务中实现性能提升，实验证明联合学习最大流和最小割算法是取得该结果的关键。
conclusion: 对偶算法学习能有效提升模型性能，尤其在需要同时处理互为对偶的优化问题时表现显著。
search_text: Dual Algorithmic Reasoning 对偶算法推理 Neural Algorithmic Reasoning is an emerging area of machine learning which seeks to infuse algorithmic computation in neural networks, typically by training neural models to approximate steps of classical algorithms. In this context, much of the current work has focused on learning reachability and shortest path graph algorithms, showing that joint learning on similar algorithms is beneficial for generalisation. However, when targeting more complex problems, such similar algorithms become more difficult to find. Here, we propose to learn algorithms by exploiting duality of the underlying algorithmic problem. Many algorithms solve optimisation problems. We demonstrate that simultaneously learning the dual definition of these optimisation problems in algorithmic learning allows for better learning and qualitatively better solutions. Specifically, we exploit the max-flow min-cut theorem to simultaneously learn these two algorithms over synthetically generated graphs, demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed approach. We then validate the real-world utility of our dual algorithmic reasoner by deploying it on a challenging brain vessel classification task, which likely depends on the vessels' flow properties. We demonstrate a clear performance gain when using our model within such a context, and empirically show that learning the max-flow and min-cut algorithms together is critical for achieving such a result. 神经算法推理是机器学习的一个新兴领域，旨在将算法计算融入神经网络中，通常通过训练神经模型来近似经典算法的步骤。在这种背景下，当前的大部分工作都集中在学习可达性和最短路径图算法上，这表明对类似算法的联合学习有利于泛化。然而，当针对更复杂的问题时，这种类似的算法变得更难找到。在这里，我们建议通过利用底层算法问题的对偶性来学习算法。许多算法解决优化问题。我们证明，在算法学习中同时学习这些优化问题的双重定义可以实现更好的学习和质量更好的解决方案。具体来说，我们利用最大流最小割定理在综合生成的图上同时学习这两种算法，证明了所提出方法的有效性。然后，我们通过将双算法推理机部署在具有挑战性的脑血管分类任务上来验证其在现实世界中的实用性，这可能取决于血管的流动特性。在这样的背景下使用我们的模型时，我们展示了明显的性能增益，并且根据经验表明，一起学习最大流和最小割算法对于实现这样的结果至关重要。 本文提出了一种通过同时学习优化问题的对偶算法（如最大流和最小割）来提升神经网络在复杂问题上的表现的方法，并在合成图和脑血管分类任务中验证了其有效性。 Danilo Numeroso,Davide Bacciu,Petar Veličković cs.LG,cs.DS

authors_text: San Jiang,Yaxin Li,Duojie Weng,Kan You,Wu Chen
title: 3D reconstruction from spherical images: A review of techniques, applications, and prospects
title_zh: 球形图像的 3D 重建：技术、应用和前景回顾
abstract: 3D reconstruction plays an increasingly important role in modern photogrammetric systems. Conventional satellite or aerial-based remote sensing (RS) platforms can provide the necessary data sources for the 3D reconstruction of large-scale landforms and cities. Even with low-altitude UAVs (Unmanned Aerial Vehicles), 3D reconstruction in complicated situations, such as urban canyons and indoor scenes, is challenging due to frequent tracking failures between camera frames and high data collection costs. Recently, spherical images have been extensively used due to the capability of recording surrounding environments from one camera exposure. In contrast to perspective images with limited FOV (Field of View), spherical images can cover the whole scene with full horizontal and vertical FOV and facilitate camera tracking and data acquisition in these complex scenes. With the rapid evolution and extensive use of professional and consumer-grade spherical cameras, spherical images show great potential for the 3D modeling of urban and indoor scenes. Classical 3D reconstruction pipelines, however, cannot be directly used for spherical images. Besides, there exist few software packages that are designed for the 3D reconstruction of spherical images. As a result, this research provides a thorough survey of the state-of-the-art for 3D reconstruction of spherical images in terms of data acquisition, feature detection and matching, image orientation, and dense matching as well as presenting promising applications and discussing potential prospects. We anticipate that this study offers insightful clues to direct future research.
summary: 3D reconstruction plays an increasingly important role in modern photogrammetric systems. Conventional satellite or aerial-based remote sensing (RS) platforms can provide the necessary data sources for the 3D reconstruction of large-scale landforms and cities. Even with low-altitude UAVs (Unmanned Aerial Vehicles), 3D reconstruction in complicated situations, such as urban canyons and indoor scenes, is challenging due to frequent tracking failures between camera frames and high data collection costs. In contrast to perspective images with limited FOV (Field of View), spherical images can cover the whole scene with full horizontal and vertical FOV and facilitate camera tracking and data acquisition in these complex scenes. With the rapid evolution and extensive use of professional and consumer-grade spherical cameras, spherical images show great potential for the 3D modeling of urban and indoor scenes. Classical 3D reconstruction pipelines, however, cannot be directly used for spherical images. Besides, there exist few software packages that are designed for the 3D reconstruction of spherical images. As a result, this research provides a thorough survey of the state-of-the-art for 3D reconstruction of spherical images in terms of data acquisition, feature detection and matching, image orientation, and dense matching as well as presenting promising applications and discussing potential prospects. We anticipate that this study offers insightful clues to direct future research.
abstract_zh: 3D 重建在现代摄影测量系统中发挥着越来越重要的作用。传统的卫星或空基遥感（RS）平台可以为大规模地貌和城市的3D重建提供必要的数据源。即使使用低空无人机，由于相机帧之间频繁的跟踪失败以及高昂的数据收集成本，复杂情况（例如城市峡谷和室内场景）的 3D 重建也具有挑战性。最近，由于能够通过一台相机曝光记录周围环境，球形图像已被广泛使用。与有限FOV（视场）的透视图像相比，球面图像可以以完整的水平和垂直FOV覆盖整个场景，并有助于在这些复杂场景中进行相机跟踪和数据采集。随着专业级和消费级球形相机的快速发展和广泛使用，球形图像在城市和室内场景的 3D 建模中显示出巨大的潜力。然而，经典的 3D 重建管道不能直接用于球形图像。此外，专为球面图像 3D 重建而设计的软件包也很少。因此，本研究对球面图像 3D 重建在数据采集、特征检测和匹配、图像定向和密集匹配方面的最新技术进行了全面调查，并提出了有希望的应用并讨论了潜在的前景。我们预计这项研究将为指导未来的研究提供富有洞察力的线索。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于球面图像的3D重建技术、应用及前景，分析了现有方法的不足并探讨未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 传统3D重建方法在复杂场景（如城市峡谷、室内）中面临跟踪失败和高成本问题，而球面图像因全景视野优势成为新方向，但缺乏针对性的重建方法和软件。
AI.method: 通过系统调研数据采集、特征检测与匹配、图像定向、密集匹配等关键技术，总结现有方法并分析其适用性与局限性。
AI.result: 梳理了球面图像3D重建的技术路线与应用案例，指出现有软件工具不足，并提出未来研究需关注算法优化与跨学科融合。
AI.conclusion: 本文为球面图像3D重建领域提供了技术路线图，强调需开发专用工具链以推动城市与室内场景的高效建模。

authors_text: Chen Feng,Haojia Li,Fei Gao,Boyu Zhou,Shaojie Shen
title: PredRecon: A Prediction-boosted Planning Framework for Fast and High-quality Autonomous Aerial Reconstruction
title_zh: PredRecon：用于快速、高质量自主空中重建的预测增强规划框架
abstract: Autonomous UAV path planning for 3D reconstruction has been actively studied in various applications for high-quality 3D models. However, most existing works have adopted explore-then-exploit, prior-based or exploration-based strategies, demonstrating inefficiency with repeated flight and low autonomy. In this paper, we propose PredRecon, a prediction-boosted planning framework that can autonomously generate paths for high 3D reconstruction quality. We obtain inspiration from humans can roughly infer the complete construction structure from partial observation. Hence, we devise a surface prediction module (SPM) to predict the coarse complete surfaces of the target from the current partial reconstruction. Then, the uncovered surfaces are produced by online volumetric mapping waiting for observation by UAV. Lastly, a hierarchical planner plans motions for 3D reconstruction, which sequentially finds efficient global coverage paths, plans local paths for maximizing the performance of Multi-View Stereo (MVS), and generates smooth trajectories for image-pose pairs acquisition. We conduct benchmarks in the realistic simulator, which validates the performance of PredRecon compared with the classical and state-of-the-art methods. The open-source code is released at https://github.com/HKUST-Aerial-Robotics/PredRecon.
summary: Autonomous UAV path planning for 3D reconstruction has been actively studied in various applications for high-quality 3D models. However, most existing works have adopted explore-then-exploit, prior-based or exploration-based strategies, demonstrating inefficiency with repeated flight and low autonomy. In this paper, we propose PredRecon, a prediction-boosted planning framework that can autonomously generate paths for high 3D reconstruction quality. We obtain inspiration from humans can roughly infer the complete construction structure from partial observation. Hence, we devise a surface prediction module (SPM) to predict the coarse complete surfaces of the target from the current partial reconstruction. Then, the uncovered surfaces are produced by online volumetric mapping waiting for observation by UAV. Lastly, a hierarchical planner plans motions for 3D reconstruction, which sequentially finds efficient global coverage paths, plans local paths for maximizing the performance of Multi-View Stereo (MVS), and generates smooth trajectories for image-pose pairs acquisition. We conduct benchmarks in the realistic simulator, which validates the performance of PredRecon compared with the classical and state-of-the-art methods. The open-source code is released at https://github.com/HKUST-Aerial-Robotics/PredRecon.
abstract_zh: 用于 3D 重建的自主无人机路径规划已在高质量 3D 模型的各种应用中得到积极研究。然而，大多数现有作品都采用探索然后利用、基于先验或基于探索的策略，表现出重复飞行和低自主性的低效率。在本文中，我们提出了 PredRecon，这是一种预测增强的规划框架，可以自动生成高 3D 重建质量的路径。我们从人类身上获得灵感，可以从局部观察中大致推断出完整的建筑结构。因此，我们设计了一个表面预测模块（SPM）来从当前的部分重建中预测目标的粗糙完整表面。然后，通过在线体积测绘生成未覆盖的表面，等待无人机观察。最后，分层规划器规划 3D 重建的运动，依次找到有效的全局覆盖路径、规划局部路径以最大化多视图立体 (MVS) 的性能，并生成用于图像姿势对采集的平滑轨迹。我们在现实模拟器中进行基准测试，验证了 PredRecon 与经典和最先进方法相比的性能。开源代码发布于 https://github.com/HKUST-Aerial-Robotics/PredRecon。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PredRecon框架，通过预测增强规划方法实现快速高质量的自主空中重建。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机路径规划方法存在重复飞行效率低、自主性不足的问题，受人类通过部分观测推断整体结构的启发，提出基于预测的自主规划框架。
AI.method: 设计表面预测模块（SPM）从部分重建中预测目标粗略表面，结合在线体素映射生成待观测区域，通过分层规划器依次规划全局覆盖路径、局部MVS优化路径及平滑轨迹。
AI.result: 在真实模拟器基准测试中，PredRecon相较经典方法和最新技术展现出更优性能。
AI.conclusion: PredRecon通过预测增强的规划方法有效提升了自主空中重建的质量与效率，为高精度三维建模提供了新思路。

Lastly, a hierarchical planner plans motions for 3D reconstruction, which sequentially finds efficient global coverage paths, plans local paths for maximizing the performance of Multi-View Stereo (MVS), and generates smooth trajectories for image-pose pairs acquisition. We conduct benchmarks in the realistic simulator, which validates the performance of PredRecon compared with the classical and state-of-the-art methods. The open-source code is released at https://github.com/HKUST-Aerial-Robotics/PredRecon. 用于 3D 重建的自主无人机路径规划已在高质量 3D 模型的各种应用中得到积极研究。然而，大多数现有作品都采用探索然后利用、基于先验或基于探索的策略，表现出重复飞行和低自主性的低效率。在本文中，我们提出了 PredRecon，这是一种预测增强的规划框架，可以自动生成高 3D 重建质量的路径。我们从人类身上获得灵感，可以从局部观察中大致推断出完整的建筑结构。因此，我们设计了一个表面预测模块（SPM）来从当前的部分重建中预测目标的粗糙完整表面。然后，通过在线体积测绘生成未覆盖的表面，等待无人机观察。最后，分层规划器规划 3D 重建的运动，依次找到有效的全局覆盖路径、规划局部路径以最大化多视图立体 (MVS) 的性能，并生成用于图像姿势对采集的平滑轨迹。我们在现实模拟器中进行基准测试，验证了 PredRecon 与经典和最先进方法相比的性能。开源代码发布于 https://github.com/HKUST-Aerial-Robotics/PredRecon。 本文提出PredRecon框架，通过预测增强规划方法实现快速高质量的自主空中重建。 Chen Feng,Haojia Li,Fei Gao,Boyu Zhou,Shaojie Shen cs.RO

authors_text: Can Pu,Chuanyu Yang,Jinnian Pu,Robert B. Fisher
title: A General Mobile Manipulator Automation Framework for Flexible Manufacturing in Hostile Industrial Environments
title_zh: 用于恶劣工业环境中灵活制造的通用移动机械手自动化框架
abstract: To enable a mobile manipulator to perform human tasks from a single teaching demonstration is vital to flexible manufacturing. We call our proposed method MMPA (Mobile Manipulator Process Automation with One-shot Teaching). Currently, there is no effective and robust MMPA framework which is not influenced by harsh industrial environments and the mobile base's parking precision. The proposed MMPA framework consists of two stages: collecting data (mobile base's location, environment information, end-effector's path) in the teaching stage for robot learning; letting the end-effector repeat the nearly same path as the reference path in the world frame to reproduce the work in the automation stage. More specifically, in the automation stage, the robot navigates to the specified location without the need of a precise parking. Then, based on colored point cloud registration, the proposed IPE (Iterative Pose Estimation by Eye & Hand) algorithm could estimate the accurate 6D relative parking pose of the robot arm base without the need of any marker. Finally, the robot could learn the error compensation from the parking pose's bias to modify the end-effector's path to make it repeat a nearly same path in the world coordinate system as recorded in the teaching stage. Hundreds of trials have been conducted with a real mobile manipulator to show the superior robustness of the system and the accuracy of the process automation regardless of the harsh industrial conditions and parking precision. For the released code, please contact marketing@amigaga.com

We call our proposed method MMPA (Mobile Manipulator Process Automation with One-shot Teaching). For the released code, please contact marketing@amigaga.com
abstract_zh: 让移动机械手通过一次教学演示即可执行人工任务对于柔性制造至关重要。我们将我们提出的方法称为 MMPA（一次性教学移动机械手过程自动化）。目前还没有有效、稳健、不受恶劣工业环境和移动基地停车精度影响的MMPA框架。所提出的MMPA框架由两个阶段组成：在机器人学习的教学阶段收集数据（移动基地的位置、环境信息、末端执行器的路径）；让末端执行器重复与世界框架中的参考路径几乎相同的路径，以重现自动化阶段的工作。更具体地说，在自动化阶段，机器人导航到指定位置，无需精确停车。然后，基于彩色点云配准，所提出的IPE（眼手迭代姿态估计）算法可以在不需要任何标记的情况下估计机器人手臂底座的准确6D相对停车姿态。最后，机器人可以从停车姿势的偏差中学习误差补偿，以修改末端执行器的路径，使其在世界坐标系中重复与教学阶段记录的几乎相同的路径。使用真实的移动机械手进行了数百次试验，以展示系统卓越的鲁棒性和过程自动化的准确性，无论恶劣的工业条件和停车精度如何。如需获取已发布的代码，请联系 marketing@amigaga.com

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MMPA的移动机械臂自动化框架，旨在通过单次教学演示使机械臂在恶劣工业环境中完成灵活制造任务。
AI.motivation: 现有移动机械臂自动化框架受工业环境恶劣条件和移动底座停车精度影响，缺乏有效且鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 框架分两阶段：教学阶段采集位置、环境信息和末端执行器路径数据；自动化阶段通过彩色点云配准和无标记的IPE算法估计机械臂底座位姿，并补偿停车偏差以修正末端路径。
AI.result: 在真实移动机械臂上进行了数百次试验，验证了系统在恶劣环境和停车精度不足情况下的鲁棒性与路径重复精度。
AI.conclusion: MMPA框架无需精确停车或标记即可实现高精度自动化，适用于复杂工业环境下的柔性制造需求。

authors_text: Weria Khaksar,Diana Saplacan,Lee Andrew Bygrave,Jim Torresen
title: Robotics in Elderly Healthcare: A Review of 20 Recent Research Projects
title_zh: 老年保健机器人技术：近期 20 个研究项目回顾
abstract: Studies show dramatic increase in elderly population of Western Europe over the next few decades, which will put pressure on healthcare systems. Measures must be taken to meet these social challenges. Healthcare robots investigated to facilitate independent living for elderly. This paper aims to review recent projects in robotics for healthcare from 2008 to 2021. We provide an overview of the focus in this area and a roadmap for upcoming research. Our study was initiated with a literature search using three digital databases. Searches were performed for articles, including research projects containing the words elderly care, assisted aging, health monitoring, or elderly health, and any word including the root word robot. The resulting 20 recent research projects are described and categorized in this paper. Then, these projects were analyzed using thematic analysis. Our findings can be summarized in common themes: most projects have a strong focus on care robots functionalities; robots are often seen as products in care settings; there is an emphasis on robots as commercial products; and there is some limited focus on the design and ethical aspects of care robots. The paper concludes with five key points representing a roadmap for future research addressing robotic for elderly people.
summary: Studies show dramatic increase in elderly population of Western Europe over the next few decades, which will put pressure on healthcare systems. Measures must be taken to meet these social challenges. Healthcare robots investigated to facilitate independent living for elderly. This paper aims to review recent projects in robotics for healthcare from 2008 to 2021. We provide an overview of the focus in this area and a roadmap for upcoming research. Our study was initiated with a literature search using three digital databases. Searches were performed for articles, including research projects containing the words elderly care, assisted aging, health monitoring, or elderly health, and any word including the root word robot. The resulting 20 recent research projects are described and categorized in this paper. Then, these projects were analyzed using thematic analysis. Our findings can be summarized in common themes: most projects have a strong focus on care robots functionalities; robots are often seen as products in care settings; there is an emphasis on robots as commercial products; and there is some limited focus on the design and ethical aspects of care robots. The paper concludes with five key points representing a roadmap for future research addressing robotic for elderly people.
abstract_zh: 研究表明，未来几十年西欧老年人口急剧增加，这将对医疗保健系统造成压力。必须采取措施应对这些社会挑战。研究医疗机器人以促进老年人的独立生活。本文旨在回顾 2008 年至 2021 年医疗保健机器人技术的最新项目。我们概述了该领域的重点以及即将开展的研究的路线图。我们的研究是通过使用三个数字数据库进行文献检索开始的。搜索的文章包括包含“老年护理”、“辅助老龄化”、“健康监测”或“老年人健康”等词的研究项目，以及任何包含词根“机器人”的词。本文对由此产生的 20 个近期研究项目进行了描述和分类。然后，使用主题分析法对这些项目进行了分析。我们的发现可以概括为共同主题：大多数项目都非常关注护理机器人的功能；机器人通常被视为护理环境中的产品；强调机器人作为商业产品；对护理机器人的设计和伦理方面的关注有限。该论文最后提出了五个关键点，代表了针对老年人的机器人的未来研究路线图。

AI.tldr: 本文回顾了2008年至2021年间20个与老年人护理机器人相关的研究项目，分析其功能、设计及伦理问题，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 西方欧洲老年人口激增将加剧医疗系统压力，需通过护理机器人技术提升老年人独立生活能力以应对社会挑战。
AI.method: 通过三个数字数据库检索包含关键词（如‘老年护理’‘健康监测’‘机器人’）的文献，筛选出20个项目并采用主题分析法进行分类与归纳。
AI.result: 多数项目聚焦护理机器人功能，视其为医疗场景中的商品；商业属性突出，但设计与伦理问题研究相对不足。
AI.conclusion: 提出未来研究需关注机器人人性化设计、伦理框架、用户接受度、技术可靠性及跨学科协作等五个关键方向。
